Aberrant Sorcery.name: 畸變術法
Aberrant Sorcery.description:
操弄非自然的靈能之力

某種外來的影響曾經用它的卷鬚將你的意識纏繞，給予了你靈能之力。如今，你能夠使用這股力量觸碰他人的內心並顛覆你周遭的世界。這種力量會從你身上如希望的燈塔一般照耀着旁人嗎？亦或是你將成為那些受你心靈所傷害的人的恐懼呢？

或許是一股從星界吹來的靈能之風將靈能能量灌入你的體內，亦或是你曾暴露在遙遠國度的扭曲影響下。又或者，你可能被植入一隻奪心魔蝌蚪，但蛻變從未發生。如今，其靈能之力已被你佔為己有。無論你如何獲得這種力量，他都在你的心靈中熊熊燃燒。

Psionic Spells.title: 靈能法術
Psionic Spells.hint: 當你達到靈能法術表中所述的相應術士等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

Psychic Defenses.title: 心靈防禦
Psychic Defenses.hint: 你擁有對心靈傷害的抗性

Abjuration Savant.name: 防護學者
Abjuration Savant.description:
從@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.6AnqLUowgdsqMFvz]{防護學派}中選擇兩個不高於2環的法師法術（調整分組模式以便於選擇），並將其免費抄入你的法術書。

此外，每當你在此職業獲得新環階的法術位時，你可以從防護學派中選擇一個法師法術免費抄入你法術書。所選法術必須是你擁有的法術位環階。

Abjure Foes.name: 棄絕眾敵
Abjure Foes.description:
As a Magic action, you can expend one use of this class’s Channel Divinity to overwhelm foes with awe. As you present your Holy Symbol or weapon, you can target a number of creatures equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum of one creature) that you can see within 60 feet of yourself. Each target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the &Reference[Frightened] condition for 1 minute or until it takes any damage. While Frightened in this way, a target can do only one of the following on its turns: move, take an action, or take a Bonus Action.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which applies the Frightened condition.

Abjurer.name: 防護師
Abjurer.description:
Shield Companions and Banish Foes

Your study of magic is focused on spells that block, banish, or protect—ending harmful effects, banishing evil influences, and protecting the weak. Abjurers are sought when baleful spirits require exorcism, when locations must be guarded against magical spying, and when portals to other planes of existence must be closed. Adventuring parties value Abjurers for the protection they provide against a variety of hostile magic and other attacks.

Spell Breaker.title: 破咒者
Spell Breaker.hint: 妳始終準備反制法術以及解除魔法法術。

Acrobatic Movement.name: 飛簷走壁
Acrobatic Movement.description: 當你未穿戴護甲或握持盾牌時，你獲得在垂直表面移動，以及在你的回合中移動時橫越水面不會下沉的能力。

Action Surge.name: 動作如潮
Action Surge.description:
你可以短暫地驅策自己超越你的極限。在你回合中，你可以採取一次除了魔法動作外的額外動作。

一旦你使用此能力，你必須完成一次短休或長休後才能再次使用。從17級開始，你可以在一次休息前使用它二次，但同個回合只能使用一次。

Foundry Note

This feature includes a limited use that increases automatically at level 17.

Additional Fighting Style.name: 額外戰鬥風格
Additional Fighting Style.description: 你獲得其他你選擇的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.sbHImaCB8ZMEHYkb]{戰鬥風格專長}

Agonizing Blast.name: 痛苦衝擊
Agonizing Blast.description:
先決條件：契術師等級2以上，具有可造成傷害的契術師戲法

選擇一個你知曉可以造成傷害的契術師戲法，你可以將你的魅力調整值加到該法術的傷害骰上。

【可複選】你可以重複選擇此祈喚，但每次你都必須選擇不同且符合條件的戲法。

Foundry Note

The change to your cantrip will have to be made manually by adding "@abilties.cha.mod" to the "Bonus" field of your spell's damage.

Ambush.name: 突襲
Ambush.description: 當你進行敏捷（隱匿）檢定或擲先攻骰時，除非處於無力狀態，否則你可以消耗並擲一枚卓越骰，將該結果加入檢定或先攻中。

Animal Speaker.name: 動物語者
Animal Speaker.description:
You can cast the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplBeastSense]{Beast Sense} and @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSpeakwithA]{Speak with Animals} spells but only as Rituals. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for them.

Foundry Note

When you advance to level 3 these spells are added to your Spells tab as Rituals using your Wisdom modifier.

Aquatic Affinity.name: 水生親和
Aquatic Affinity.description:
The size of the Emanation created by your Wrath of the Sea increases to 10 feet.

In addition, you gain a Swim Speed equal to your Speed.

Foundry Note

The size of the emanation increases automatically but this feature does not automatically add the Swim Speed.

Arcane Apotheosis.name: 奧法極致
Arcane Apotheosis.description:
While your Innate Sorcery feature is active, you can use one Metamagic option on each of your turns without spending Sorcery Points on it.

Foundry Note

Uncheck the Consumption option when using the Metamagic option you would like to use for free.

Arcane Charge.name: Arcane Charge
Arcane Charge.description: When you use your Action Surge, you can teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see. You can teleport before or after the additional action.

Arcane Recovery.name: 奧術恢復
Arcane Recovery.description:
你可以通過研讀法術書來恢復一些魔法能量。當你完成一次短休時，你可以選擇已消耗的法術位來恢復。法術位的環階總和必須小於或等於你法師等級的一半（向上取整），且每個法術位都不能為6環或更高。舉例來說，若你是個4級法師，你可以恢復最多共計2個環階的法術位，可以恢復一個2環法術位，或恢復二個1環法術位。

一旦你使用此特性後，直到你完成一次長休前無法再次使用。

可用環階總和： [[(@classes.wizard.levels / 2)]]

Foundry Note

Since you can select the slots you will have to manually adjust your available slots. This feature can be used to track the one-time use though.

Arcane Trickster.name: 詭術師
Arcane Trickster.description:
以奧法咒語匿影藏形

一些盜賊透過學習法術來增強他們精妙的潛行與身法，將魔法詐術用於他們的勾當之中。有些詭術師憑藉他們的才能成為了扒手和竊賊，而其他人則是惡作劇者。

Arcane Ward.name: Arcane Ward
Arcane Ward.description:
You can weave magic around yourself for protection. When you cast an Abjuration spell with a spell slot, you can simultaneously use a strand of the spell’s magic to create a magical ward on yourself that lasts until you finish a Long Rest. The ward has a Hit Point maximum equal to twice your Wizard level plus your Intelligence modifier. Whenever you take damage, the ward takes the damage instead, and if you have any Resistances or Vulnerabilities, apply them before reducing the ward’s Hit Points. If the damage reduces the ward to 0 Hit Points, you take any remaining damage. While the ward has 0 Hit Points, it can’t absorb damage, but its magic remains.

Whenever you cast an Abjuration spell with a spell slot, the ward regains a number of Hit Points equal to twice the level of the spell slot. Alternatively, as a Bonus Action, you can expend a spell slot, and the ward regains a number of Hit Points equal to twice the level of the spell slot expended.

Once you create the ward, you can’t create it again until you finish a Long Rest.

Foundry Note

Track the HP of the Ward with the number of uses on this item.

The Create Ward activity has 1 use per Long Rest and updates the Arcane Ward to have full uses ("HP").

The Damage Ward activity will reduce the Ward's uses ("HP") by the amount of damage given.

The Restore Ward HP After Casting Spell activity can be used after you use an Abjuration spell. Set the scale value to the spell slot level you used to restore the correct number of uses ("HP").

The Expend Spell Slot for Ward activity allows you to choose a spell slot level, expends it, and restores the correct number of uses ("HP").

Create Ward.name: Create Ward
Create Ward.condition: When you cast an Abjuration spell with a spell slot

Restore Ward HP After Casting Spell.name: Restore Ward HP After Casting Spell
Restore Ward HP After Casting Spell.condition: When you cast an Abjuration spell with a spell slot

Archdruid.name: 大德魯伊
Archdruid.description:
The vitality of nature constantly blooms within you, granting you the following benefits.

Evergreen Wild Shape. Whenever you roll Initiative and have no uses of Wild Shape left, you regain one expended use of it.

Nature Magician. You can convert uses of Wild Shape into a spell slot (no action required). Choose a number of your unexpended uses of Wild Shape and convert them into a single spell slot, with each use contributing 2 spell levels. For example, if you convert two uses of Wild Shape, you produce a level 4 spell slot. Once you use this benefit, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

Longevity. The primal magic that you wield causes you to age more slowly. For every ten years that pass, your body ages only one year.

Foundry Note

This feature does not automate regaining a use of Wild Shape when rolling initiative but it does include an activity which will restore a use when activated.

The Nature Magician activity can be used to convert Wild Shape uses to spell slots.

Archfey Patron.name: 至高妖精宗主
Archfey Patron.description:
Bargain with Whimsical Fey

Your pact draws on the power of the Feywild. When you choose this subclass, you might make a deal with an archfey, such as the Prince of Frost; the Queen of Air and Darkness, ruler of the Gloaming Court; Titania of the Summer Court; or an ancient hag. Or you might call on a spectrum of Fey, weaving a web of favors and debts. Whoever they are, your patron is often inscrutable and whimsical.

Beguiling Defenses.hint: Your patron teaches you how to guard your mind and body. You are immune to the Charmed condition.
Beguiling Defenses.title: Beguiling Defenses

Archfey Spells.title: Archfey Spells
Archfey Spells.hint: 你宗主的魔法確保你始終準備特定的法術，當你達到至高妖精法術表所提及的契術師等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

Archfey Spells.name: 至高妖精法術
Archfey Spells.description:
你宗主的魔法確保你始終準備特定的法術，當你達到至高妖精法術表所提及的契術師等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術

至高妖精法術
契術師等級Spells
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCalmEmotio]{安定心神}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFaerieFire]{妖火術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMistyStep0]{迷蹤步}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbPhantasmalFor]{魅影之力}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSleep00000]{睡眠術}
5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplBlink00000]{閃現術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplPlantGrowt]{植物滋長}
7@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDominateBe]{支配野獸}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGreaterInv]{高等隱形術}
9@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDominatePe]{支配人類}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSeeming000]{偽裝術}

Foundry Note

As you level up these spells will be granted to you automatically.

Armor of Shadows.name: 暗影護甲
Armor of Shadows.description:
你可以不消耗任何法術位對自己施放@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMageArmor0]{法師護甲}。

Foundry Note

The Mage Armor activity is configured with the spell's effect and duration, including an Active Effect to set the spell's provided AC formula.

Mage Armor.name: Mage Armor
Mage Armor.description: The target's base AC becomes 13 + its Dexterity modifier.

Ascendant Step.name: 躍升步伐
Ascendant Step.description:
先決條件：契術師等級5以上

你可以不消耗任何法術位對自己施放@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplLevitate00]{浮空術}。

Levitating.name: Levitating
Levitating.description: The target can move only by pushing or pulling against a fixed object or surface within reach (such as a wall or a ceiling), which allows it to move as if it were climbing.

Aspect of the Wilds.name: 荒野之形
Aspect of the Wilds.description:
你獲得下列一個你所選擇的選項。每當完成一次長休後，你可以更改你的選擇。

【梟】 你擁有60呎You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet. If you already have Darkvision, its range increases by 60 feet.

【豹】You have a Climb Speed equal to your Speed.

【鮭】 You have a Swim Speed equal to your Speed.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an activity with an Active Effect which automates the Darkvision changes from the Owl option. The Speed changes are not automatically applied.

Aspect of the Owl.name: Aspect of the Owl
Aspect of the Owl.description: You have Darkvision with a range of 60 feet. If you already have Darkvision, its range increases by 60 feet.

Assasinate.name: 暗殺
Assasinate.description:
你擅長伏擊目標，並獲得下列好處。

【先攻】你在先攻骰上具有優勢。

【奇襲】每場戰鬥的首輪中，你對任何尚未進行過回合的生物發動的攻擊檢定具有優勢。任何在該輪中被你的偷襲命中的目標將承受等同於你遊蕩者等級的額外武器類型傷害。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which automates the advantage on Initiative rolls.

The Damage activity can be used to apply extra damage equal to your level. You can choose the damage type in the roll's dialog box. Alternatively, you could add your level ([[lookup @classes.rogue.levels]]) as a situational bonus to your normal damage roll.

damage.condition: 任何在該輪中被你的偷襲命中的目標

Assassin.name: 刺客
Assassin.description:
修習殘忍的刺殺藝術

刺客的訓練專注於使用潛行、毒藥和偽裝來以致命的效率消滅敵人。儘管一些遵循此路的遊蕩者成為了受僱殺手、間諜或賞金獵人，這個子職業的能力也同樣適用於面對各種怪物的冒險者。

Assassin's Tools.title: 刺客工具
Assassin's Tools.hint: 你獲得易容工具組和一套製毒工具組

rvg1VPVkuaZrsvIx.title: 刺客工具
rvg1VPVkuaZrsvIx.hint: 你擁有易容工具組和一套製毒工具組的熟練。

Assassin's Tools.name: 刺客工具
Assassin's Tools.description:
你獲得一套易容工具組和一套製毒工具組，並且擁有其熟練。

Foundry Note

The equipment and proficiencies are granted to you automatically as you level up.

Aura Expansion.name: Aura Expansion
Aura Expansion.description:
Your Aura of Protection is now a 30-foot Emanation.

Foundry Note

The range of your auras update automatically as you level up.

Aura of Alacrity.name: Aura of Alacrity
Aura of Alacrity.description:
Your Speed increases by 10 feet.

In addition, whenever an ally enters your Aura of Protection for the first time on a turn or starts their turn there, the ally’s Speed increases by 10 feet until the end of their next turn.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which increases your Speed by 10 feet. It does not automatically apply to creatures within your aura.

Aura of Courage.name: 勇氣靈光
Aura of Courage.description:
You and your allies have Immunity to the Frightened condition while in your Aura of Protection. If a Frightened ally enters the aura, that condition has no effect on that ally while there.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect for tracking who is within your aura but it is not automatically added/removed nor does it remove the Frightened condition.

Aura of Devotion.name: Aura of Devotion
Aura of Devotion.description:
You and your allies have Immunity to the Charmed condition while in your Aura of Protection. If a Charmed ally enters the aura, that condition has no effect on that ally while there.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect for tracking characters impacted by your aura but does not automate the effects.

Aura of Protection.name: Aura of Protection
Aura of Protection.description:
You radiate a protective, unseeable aura in a 10-foot Emanation that originates from you. The aura is inactive while you have the &Reference[Incapacitated apply=false] condition.

You and your allies in the aura gain a bonus to saving throws equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum bonus of +1, currently [[lookup @abilities.cha.mod]]).

If another Paladin is present, a creature can benefit from only one Aura of Protection at a time; the creature chooses which aura while in them.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which automatically improves your Saving Throws but it should not be used for other impacted characters because it will add their Charisma modifier and not the Paladin's. They should add your modifier manually.

Aura of Warding.name: Aura of Warding
Aura of Warding.description:
Ancient magic lies so heavily upon you that it forms an eldritch ward, blunting energy from beyond the Material Plane; you and your allies have Resistance to Necrotic, Psychic, and Radiant damage while in your @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.classes.Item.phbpdnProtection].

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect that applies the Resistances but it is not automatically granted when a character enters/exits your aura.

Avatar of Battle.name: Avatar of Battle
Avatar of Battle.description:
You gain Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which automates the damage resistance.

Avenging Angel.name: Avenging Angel
Avenging Angel.description:
As a Bonus Action, you gain the benefits below for 10 minutes or until you end them (no action required). Once you use this feature, you can’t use it again until you finish a Long Rest. You can also restore your use of it by expending a level 5 spell slot (no action required).

Flight. You sprout spectral wings on your back, have a Fly Speed of 60 feet, and can hover.

Frightful Aura. Whenever an enemy starts its turn in your Aura of Protection, that creature must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the Frightened condition for 1 minute or until it takes any damage. Attack rolls against the &Reference[Frightened] creature have Advantage.

Foundry Note

The Avenging Angel activity will consume a use of this feature and includes an Active Effect that grants you the Fly Speed and hover ability.

The Frightful Aura activity includes the saving throw and an Active Effect that applies the Frightened condition.

The Restore Use activity consumes a 5th level spell slot and restores a use of this feature.

Frightful Aura.name: Frightful Aura
Frightful Aura.condition: Whenever an enemy starts its turn in your Aura of Protection

Awakened Mind.name: 喚醒心靈
Awakened Mind.description:
你能夠在自己與他人的意識中構建一道心靈感應的連結。作為一個附贈動作，你可以選擇30尺內一個你所能看見的生物，只要你與你所選擇的生物在等同於你魅力調整值（最少1哩，當前[[lookup @abilities.cha.mod]]哩）的哩數內，你們就可以通過心靈感應的方式進行交流。為了理解彼此，你們都必須在心靈交流中使用對方知曉的語言。

心靈感應的連結將持續等同於你契術師等級的分鐘。當你使用此能力與其他生物構建連結時，其將提前結束。

Bait and Switch.name: Bait and Switch
Bait and Switch.description:
When you're within 5 feet of a creature on your turn, you can expend one Superiority Die and switch places with that creature, provided you spend at least 5 feet of movement and the creature is willing and doesn't have the Incapacitated condition. This movement doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks.

Roll the Superiority Die. Until the start of your next turn, you or the other creature (your choice) gains a bonus to AC equal to the number rolled.

Foundry Note

This feature includes a Active Effects for each possible Superiority Die value, which grants the indicated AC bonus.

Switch Places.name: Switch Places
Switch Places.condition: When you're within 5 feet of a creature on your turn

Baited AC +6.name: Baited AC +6
Baited AC +6.description: Until the start of your next turn, you or the other creature (your choice) gains a bonus to AC equal to the number rolled.

Baited AC +12.name: Baited AC +12
Baited AC +12.description: Until the start of your next turn, you or the other creature (your choice) gains a bonus to AC equal to the number rolled.

Baited AC +1.name: Baited AC +1
Baited AC +1.description: Until the start of your next turn, you or the other creature (your choice) gains a bonus to AC equal to the number rolled.

Baited AC +2.name: Baited AC +2
Baited AC +2.description: Until the start of your next turn, you or the other creature (your choice) gains a bonus to AC equal to the number rolled.

Baited AC +3.name: Baited AC +3
Baited AC +3.description: Until the start of your next turn, you or the other creature (your choice) gains a bonus to AC equal to the number rolled.

Baited AC +4.name: Baited AC +4
Baited AC +4.description: Until the start of your next turn, you or the other creature (your choice) gains a bonus to AC equal to the number rolled.

Baited AC +5.name: Baited AC +5
Baited AC +5.description: Until the start of your next turn, you or the other creature (your choice) gains a bonus to AC equal to the number rolled.

Baited AC +7.name: Baited AC +7
Baited AC +7.description: Until the start of your next turn, you or the other creature (your choice) gains a bonus to AC equal to the number rolled.

Baited AC +8.description: Until the start of your next turn, you or the other creature (your choice) gains a bonus to AC equal to the number rolled.
Baited AC +8.name: Baited AC +8

Baited AC +9.name: Baited AC +9
Baited AC +9.description: Until the start of your next turn, you or the other creature (your choice) gains a bonus to AC equal to the number rolled.

Baited AC +10.description: Until the start of your next turn, you or the other creature (your choice) gains a bonus to AC equal to the number rolled.
Baited AC +10.name: Baited AC +10

Baited AC +11.name: Baited AC +11
Baited AC +11.description: Until the start of your next turn, you or the other creature (your choice) gains a bonus to AC equal to the number rolled.

Barbarian.name: 野蠻人
Barbarian.description:
原始狂怒的兇猛戰士

野蠻人核心特性

關鍵屬性

力量

生命骰

每野蠻人等級D12

豁免熟練

力量和體質

技能熟練

選擇2個：馴獸、運動、威嚇、自然、察覺或求生

武器熟練

簡易武器和軍用武器

護甲訓練

輕甲、中甲、盾牌

起始裝備

選擇A或B： (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepGreataxe00]、4個@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepHandaxe000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagExplorersPa]、[[/award 15GP]]; or (B) [[/award 75GP]]

野蠻人是強大的戰士，他們由多元宇宙的原初力量所驅動，而這股力量便是「狂暴」。野蠻人的狂暴不只是一種情感，而且是獵食者在絕境中激發的兇暴，是暴風雨般不顧一切的猛襲，也是大海中翻滾不息的波濤。

有些野蠻人將「狂暴」具象為兇蠻的靈體，或敬仰的先祖；有些野蠻人卻認為狂暴與世界的痛苦悲傷皆有聯繫，還有人認為狂暴是來自狂野魔法的無情糾纏；更有些人認為，狂暴是他們內心最深處的一種自我表達。對所有野蠻人來說，這股狂暴不僅為他們點燃了戰鬥狂熱，更是他們靈活閃避、抵禦傷害和增強力量的源泉。

野蠻人通常扮演著社群的保護者和領導者。他們往往隻身衝向危險，只為保護他人。敢於面對任何危險的勇氣使野蠻人非常適合冒險。

成為野蠻人...

作為首級角色

  • 獲得野蠻人核心特徵表中的所有特徵。
  • 獲得野蠻人特性表中列出的1級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得野蠻人核心特徵表中的以下特徵：生命骰、熟練軍用武器、盾牌訓練。
  • 獲得野蠻人特性表中列出的 1 級特性。

Primal Champion.title: 原初勇士
Primal Champion.hint: 你體現了原初的力量。你的力量與體質提升4點，上限為25。

Weapon Mastery.title: 武器精通
Weapon Mastery.hint: 你受過武器的訓練，令你能夠使用額外武器的精通屬性。

Primal Knowledge.title: 原初知識
Primal Knowledge.hint: 你獲得1級野蠻人技能列表可用的另一項技能熟練。

Bard.name: 吟遊詩人
Bard.description:
集音樂舞蹈魔法於一身的激昂演藝家

核心吟遊詩人特徵

關鍵屬性

魅力

生命骰

每吟遊詩人等級D8

豁免熟練

敏捷和魅力

技能熟練

選擇任意3個技能

武器熟練

簡易武器

工具熟練

選擇3種樂器

護甲訓練

輕甲

起始裝備

選擇A或B： (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmLeatherArm]、2把@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepDagger0000]、你所選擇的樂器、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagEntertainer]、[[/award 19gp]]；或(B) [[/award 90GP]]

通過音樂、舞蹈、詩歌施放魔法，吟遊詩人是鼓舞他人、撫慰傷痛、打擊敵人和製造幻象的能手。他們認為多元宇宙是被“說”出來的，而那原初的創世真言至今在各個位面迴響。詩人的音樂就是對這迴響的一種操控，試圖將其編織成所需的法術與力量。

任何事物都可以激發他們創作出新的歌曲或故事，所以詩人往往對萬事萬物都具有好奇心。他們的知識廣博如同大海，演奏音樂施展魔法都是信手拈來，緩和氣氛也是一把好手。

吟遊詩人的一生都在大地巡遊中度過，他們搜集逸聞、分享故事、然後享受聽眾的掌聲。這跟一般藝人其實沒區別，只是在知識的深度，音樂技巧的層次，對魔法的觸動上，吟遊詩人就不能和那些普通貨色相比了。

吟遊詩人的表演曲目

你的吟遊詩人會一邊擊鼓、一邊高唱遠古英雄的事蹟嗎？彈奏魯特琴、低吟愛情小調？演唱激昂動人的詠嘆調？背誦經典悲劇中的戲劇獨白？運用民間舞蹈的節奏，引導戰場上盟友的動作？還是創作一些不太正經的打油詩？

當你扮演吟遊詩人時，請思考你偏好的藝術表演風格、你可能喚起的情緒，以及啟發你創作主題的靈感來源。你的詩句是源自對自然美景的讚頌，還是對失落的沉思？你偏好高遠的聖歌，還是熱鬧的酒館小曲？你傾心於為逝者哀悼，還是為歡樂而慶賀？你跳的是歡快的吉格舞，還是華麗繁複的詮釋性編舞？你專精於單一風格，還是追求精通百藝？

成為吟遊詩人...

作為首級角色

  • 獲得吟遊詩人核心特徵表中的所有特徵。
  • 獲得吟遊詩人特性表中列出的 1 級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得吟遊詩人核心特徵表中下列特徵：生命骰，一項自選技能的熟練，一種自選樂器的熟練，以及輕甲訓練。
  • 獲得吟遊詩人特性表中列出的 1 級特性。請參閱第 2 章中的兼職規則來確定你的可用法術位。

Bardic Inspiration.name: 吟遊激勵
Bardic Inspiration.description:
你可以透過言語、音樂或舞蹈以超自然地激勵他人。此激勵表現為你的吟遊激勵骰，會由d6開始（當前[[lookup @scale.bard.inspiration.die]]）。

【使用吟遊激勵】作為一個附贈動作，你可以激勵自身60呎內能看見或聽見你的另一個生物。該生物獲得一枚你的吟遊激勵骰。一個生物在一次只能擁有一枚吟遊激勵骰。

在接下來的一小時以內一次，當一個生物在D20檢定上失敗時，該生物可以擲吟遊激勵骰，並將其數值添加在d20上，此舉可能將失敗轉為成功。當擲出吟遊激勵骰時其將被消耗。

【使用次數】你可以賦予吟遊激勵骰的次數等同於你的魅力調整值（最少一次），並在你完成一次長休時重獲所有已消耗次數。

【在更高等級】當你達到特定吟遊詩人等級時，你的吟遊激勵骰將發生變化，如吟遊詩人特性表上的吟遊激勵骰欄所示。在5級時變成d8，10級時變成d10，15級時變成d12。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect for tracking when a character has Bardic Inspiration to use.

Recovery is set to long rest (for levels before @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.classes.Item.phbbrdFontOfInsp]{Font of Inspiration} is gained). Please manually adjust as required.

Inspired.name: 激勵
Inspired.description: 你已獲得吟遊激勵，在接下來的一小時以內一次，當你在D20檢定上失敗時，你可以擲吟遊激勵骰，並將其數值添加在d20上，此舉可能將失敗轉為成功。當擲出吟遊激勵骰時其將被消耗。

Bastion of Law.name: Bastion of Law
Bastion of Law.description:
You can tap into the grand equation of existence to imbue a creature with a shimmering shield of order. As a Magic action, you can expend 1 to 5 Sorcery Points to create a magical ward around yourself or another creature you can see within 30 feet of yourself. The ward is represented by a number of d8s equal to the number of Sorcery Points spent to create it. When the warded creature takes damage, it can expend a number of those dice, roll them, and reduce the damage taken by the total rolled on those dice.

The ward lasts until you finish a Long Rest or until you use this feature again.

Foundry Note

The Expend Sorcery Points activity allows you to expend the desired number of Sorcery Points. It includes an Active Effect which can be used for tracking the warded creature. It also includes a "Ward Die" roll which rolls 1d8. You will have to manually track the number of dice available.

Warded by Law.description: When the warded creature takes damage, it can expend a number of those dice, roll them, and reduce the damage taken by the total rolled on those dice. The ward lasts until you finish a Long Rest or until you use this feature again.
Warded by Law.name: Warded by Law

Battering Roots.name: Battering Roots
Battering Roots.description:
During your turn, your reach is 10 feet greater with any Melee weapon that has the Heavy or Versatile property, as tendrils of the World Tree extend from you. When you hit with such a weapon on your turn, you can activate the Push or Topple mastery property in addition to a different mastery property you're using with that weapon.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which grants you the Push and Topple mastery property.

Battle Magic.name: Battle Magic
Battle Magic.description: After you cast a spell that has a casting time of an action, you can make one attack with a weapon as a Bonus Action.

Battle Master.name: 戰鬥大師
Battle Master.description:
Master Sophisticated Battle Maneuvers

Battle Masters are students of the art of battle, learning martial techniques passed down through generations. The most accomplished Battle Masters are well-rounded figures who combine their carefully honed combat skills with academic study in the fields of history, theory, and the arts.

Beast Master.name: 獸王
Beast Master.description:
與遠古野獸建立友誼

借助原初魔法，通天地之靈，獸王與某些獨特動物構建起了神秘的連結。

Beast Spells.name: Beast Spells
Beast Spells.description: While using Wild Shape, you can cast spells in Beast form, except for any spell that has a Material component with a cost specified or that consumes its Material component.

Beguiling Defenses.name: Beguiling Defenses
Beguiling Defenses.description:
Your patron teaches you how to guard your mind and body. You are immune to the &Reference[Charmed] condition.

In addition, immediately after a creature you can see hits you with an attack roll, you can take a Reaction to reduce the damage you take by half (round down), and you can force the attacker to make a Wisdom saving throw against your spell save DC. On a failed save, the attacker takes Psychic damage equal to the damage you take. Once you use this Reaction, you can’t use it again until you finish a Long Rest unless you expend a Pact Magic spell slot (no action required) to restore your use of it.

Foundry Note

The Beguiling Reaction activity includes the saving throw.

With your token selected you can either right click on the damage roll's chat card and select  Apply Half Damage or click the "1/2" button and then the  Apply button.

Beguiling Reaction.name: Beguiling Reaction
Beguiling Reaction.condition: Immediately after a creature you can see hits you with an attack roll

Beguiling Magic.name: 迷人魔法
Beguiling Magic.description:
你始終準備@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCharmPerso]與@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMirrorImag]法術。

此外，緊接在你使用一個法術位施放惑控或幻術系法術後，你可以使自身60呎內你所能看見的一個生物依你的法術豁免DC進行一次感知豁免檢定。在豁免失敗時，目標陷入1分鐘魅惑或恐懼狀態（由你選擇）&Reference[Charmed]／&Reference[Frightened]。目標在其每個回合結束時重複該豁免，若豁免成功則結束在其身上的效果。

一旦你使用此好處，直到你完成一次長休前無法再次使用。你也可以消耗一次吟遊激勵恢復該特性的使用次數（無需動作）。

Foundry Note

The Save activity includes an Active Effect for both the Charmed and Frightened status.

The Recharge with Inspiration activity restores a use of this feature.

The spells are automatically added to your sheet as Always Prepared.

save.condition: 在使用法術位施放惑控系或幻術系法術後

Beguiling Twist.name: Beguiling Twist
Beguiling Twist.description:
The magic of the Feywild guards your mind. You have Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Charmed or Frightened condition.

In addition, whenever you or a creature you can see within 120 feet of you succeeds on a saving throw to avoid or end the Charmed or Frightened condition, you can take a Reaction to force a different creature you can see within 120 feet of yourself to make a Wisdom save against your spell save DC. On a failed save, the target is &Reference[Charmed] or &Reference[Frightened] (your choice) for 1 minute. The target repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Bend Luck.name: Bend Luck
Bend Luck.description: You have the ability to twist fate using your wild magic. Immediately after another creature you can see rolls the d20 for a D20 Test, you can take a Reaction and spend 1 Sorcery Point to roll 1d4 and apply the number rolled as a bonus or penalty (your choice) to the d20 roll.

Bend Luck.name: Bend Luck
Bend Luck.condition: Immediately after another creature you can see rolls the d20 for a D20 Test

Bestial Fury.name: Bestial Fury
Bestial Fury.description:
When you command your Primal Companion beast to take the Beast’s Strike action, the beast can use it twice.

In addition, the first time each turn it hits a creature under the effect of your Hunter’s Mark spell, the beast deals extra Force damage equal to the bonus damage of that spell.

Foundry Note

The Damage activity includes the additional damage roll.

Bewitching Magic.name: Bewitching Magic
Bewitching Magic.description: Your patron grants you the ability to weave your magic with teleportation. Immediately after you cast an Enchantment or Illusion spell using an action and a spell slot, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMistyStep0]{迷蹤步} as part of the same action and without expending a spell slot.

Blessed Healer.name: Blessed Healer
Blessed Healer.description:
The healing spells you cast on others heal you as well. Immediately after you cast a spell with a spell slot that restores Hit Points to one or more creatures other than yourself, you regain Hit Points equal to 2 plus the spell slot's level.

Foundry Note

This feature includes a healing activity. Set the scale to the spell slot level you cast and it will provide a healing roll for you.

Blessed Strikes.name: Blessed Strikes
Blessed Strikes.description:
Divine power infuses you in battle. You gain one of the following options of your choice (if you get either option from a Cleric subclass in an older book, use only the option you choose for this feature).

Divine Strike. Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll using a weapon, you can cause the target to take an extra 1d8 Necrotic or Radiant damage (your choice).

Potent Spellcasting. Add your Wisdom modifier to the damage you deal with any Cleric cantrip.

Foundry Note

During advancement you will be able to choose which option you prefer.

Blessed Strikes: Divine Strike.name: Blessed Strikes: Divine Strike
Blessed Strikes: Divine Strike.description:
Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll using a weapon, you can cause the target to take an extra 1d8 Necrotic or Radiant damage (your choice).

Foundry Note

This feature's damage will automatically increase when you gain @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.classes.Item.phbclcImprovedBl]{Improved Blessed Strikes}.

Blessed Strikes: Potent Spellcasting.name: Blessed Strikes: Potent Spellcasting
Blessed Strikes: Potent Spellcasting.description:
Add your Wisdom modifier to the damage you deal with any Cleric cantrip.

Foundry Note

This bonus damage is not automatically included.

The Damage activity includes your Wisdom modifier and allows you to choose the damage type in the roll's dialog box.

You can also instead add [[lookup @abilties.wis.mod]] to the Situational Bonus field of your cantrip's damage roll's dialog box.

damage.condition: Deal damage with any Cleric cantrip

Blessing of the Trickster.name: Blessing of the Trickster
Blessing of the Trickster.description:
As a Magic action, you can choose yourself or a willing creature within 30 feet of yourself to have Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks. This blessing lasts until you finish a Long Rest or you use this feature again.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect for tracking the blessing but it does not automate the advantage on Stealth checks or automatically end when you use this feature again.

Blessing of the Trickster.name: Blessing of the Trickster
Blessing of the Trickster.description: You have Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks. This blessing lasts until the caster finishes a Long Rest or they use this feature again.

Body and Mind.name: Body and Mind
Body and Mind.description: You have developed your body and mind to new heights. Your 敏捷和感知 scores increase by 4, to a maximum of 25.

Bonus Proficiencies.name: 附贈熟練
Bonus Proficiencies.description: 你獲得三項你所選擇的技能熟練。

Branches of the Tree.name: Branches of the Tree
Branches of the Tree.description:
Whenever a creature you can see starts its turn within 30 feet of you while your Rage is active, you can take a Reaction to summon spectral branches of the World Tree around it. The target must succeed on a Strength saving throw (DC 8 plus your Strength modifier and Proficiency Bonus) or be teleported to an unoccupied space you can see within 5 feet of yourself or in the nearest unoccupied space you can see. After the target teleports, you can reduce its Speed to 0 until the end of the current turn.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which can be applied to the target and will reduce their Speed.

save.condition: Whenever a creature you can see starts its turn within 30 feet of you while your Raging

Branches of the Tree.name: Branches of the Tree
Branches of the Tree.description: A creature moved by Branches of the Tree's Speed can be reduced to until the end of its current turn.

Brutal Strike.name: Brutal Strike
Brutal Strike.description:
If you use [[/item Reckless Attack]], you can forgo any Advantage on one Strength-based attack roll of your choice on your turn. The chosen attack roll mustn't have Disadvantage. If the chosen attack roll hits, the target takes an extra [[lookup @scale.barbarian.brutal-strike]] damage of the same type dealt by the weapon or Unarmed Strike, and you can cause one Brutal Strike effect of your choice. You have the following effect options.

Forceful Blow. The target is pushed 15 feet straight away from you. You can then move up to half your Speed straight toward the target without provoking &Reference[Opportunity Attacks].

Hamstring Blow. The target's Speed is reduced by 15 feet until the start of your next turn. A target can be affected by only one Hamstring Blow at a time - the most recent one.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect for the Hamstring Blow which can be applied to a target.

The damage activity automatically scales when you gain Improved Brutal Strike (2).

Hamstrung.name: Hamstrung
Hamstrung.description: Hit by a hamstring blow, this character's Speed has been reduced by 15 feet until the start of the attacker's next turn.

Bulwark of Force.name: Bulwark of Force
Bulwark of Force.description:
You can shield yourself and others with telekinetic force. As a Bonus Action, you can choose creatures, including yourself, within 30 feet of yourself, up to a number of creatures equal to your Intelligence modifier (minimum of one creature). Each of the chosen creatures has &Reference[Half Cover] for 1 minute or until you have the Incapacitated condition.

Once you use this feature, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest unless you expend a Psionic Energy Die (no action required) to restore your use of it.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which applies the Half Cover status but it does not automatically end.

The Recharge with Psionic Energy activity will consume a use of your Psionic Energy Die and grant another use of this feature automatically.

Careful Spell.name: 謹慎法術
Careful Spell.description:
消耗1法術點

當你施放一個會強迫其他生物進行豁免檢定的法術時，你可以保護其中一些生物不受該法術的完整威力影響。要這麼做，消耗1點術法點，並選擇最多等同於你魅力調整值數量的生物（最少一個生物）。被選擇的生物將在對抗該法術的豁免檢定中自動成功，並且若該法術在豁免成功時會造成一半傷害，則不會受到任何傷害。

你能保護的生物： [[lookup @abilities.cha.mod]]

Careful Spell.name: 謹慎法術
Careful Spell.condition: 當你施放一個會強迫其他生物進行豁免檢定的法術時

Celestial Patron.name: 天界宗主
Celestial Patron.description:
Call on the Power of the Heavens

Your pact draws on the Upper Planes, the realms of everlasting bliss. You might enter an agreement with an empyrean, a couatl, a sphinx, a unicorn, or another heavenly entity. Or you might call on numerous such beings as you pursue goals aligned with theirs. Your pact allows you to experience a hint of the holy light that illuminates the multiverse.

Radiant Soul.title: Radiant Soul
Radiant Soul.hint: Your link to your patron allows you to serve as a conduit for radiant energy. You have Resistance to Radiant damage.

Celestial Spells.title: Celestial Spells
Celestial Spells.hint: 你宗主的魔法確保你始終準備特定的法術，當你達到天界法術表所提及的契術師等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

Celestial Resilience.name: 天族韌性
Celestial Resilience.description:
You gain Temporary Hit Points whenever you use your @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.classes.Item.phbwlkMagicalCun]{Magical Cunning} feature or finish a Short or Long Rest. These Temporary Hit Points equal your Warlock level plus your Charisma modifier. Additionally, choose up to five creatures you can see when you gain the points. Those creatures each gain Temporary Hit Points equal to half your Warlock level plus your Charisma modifier.

Foundry Note

The Your Temporary Hit Points and the Chosen Creatures Hit Points activities both include the correct number of Temporary Hit Points for their respective targets.

Chosen Creatures Hit Points.condition: Whenever you use your Magical Cunning or finish a Short or Long Rest
Chosen Creatures Hit Points.name: Chosen Creatures Hit Points

Your Temporary Hit Points.name: Your Temporary Hit Points
Your Temporary Hit Points.condition: Whenever you use your Magical Cunning or finish a Short or Long Rest

Celestial Spells.name: 天界法術
Celestial Spells.description:
你宗主的魔法確保你始終準備特定的法術，當你達到天界法術表所提及的契術師等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

天界法術
契術師等級Spells
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplAid0000000]{援助術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCureWounds]{治療傷勢}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGuidingBol]{光導箭}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplLesserRest]{次級復原術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplLight00000]{光亮術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSacredFlam]{聖焰}
5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDaylight00]{晝明術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplRevivify00]{回生術}
7@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGuardianof]{虔誠守衛}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplWallofFire]{火牆術}
9@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGreaterRes]{高等復原術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSummonCele]{天界召喚術}

Foundry Note

As you level up these spells will be granted to you automatically.

Champion.name: 勇士
Champion.description:
Pursue Physical Excellence in Combat

A Champion focuses on the development of martial prowess in a relentless pursuit of victory. Champions combine rigorous training with physical excellence to deal devastating blows, withstand peril, and garner glory. Whether in athletic contests or bloody battle, Champions strive for the crown of the victor.

Channel Divinity.name: 引導神力
Channel Divinity.description:
你可以引導來自外層位面的神聖力量，激發各種魔法效果。你首先學會創造兩種效應：神聖火花和驅散不死生物，並在下文分別詳述。每當你使用本職業的引導神力，你都需要從本職業的引導神力中選擇你要創造的效應。你將在更高的牧師等級獲得額外的引導神力效應選項。

你可以使用此職業的引導神力兩次。當你完成短休時重獲一次已消耗的使用次數，且當你完成長休時重獲所有已消耗的使用次數。當你達到特定的牧師等級時，你將獲得額外的使用次數，如牧師特性表中的引導神力一欄所示。

若一個引導神力效應需要豁免檢定，則該DC等同於此職業施法特性中的法術豁免DC。

【神聖火花】作為魔法動作，你舉起聖徽指向30呎內的另一個你所能看見的生物，並將神聖能量聚焦於其，擲1d8並加上你的感知調整值。你可以恢復該生物等同於結果總值的生命值，或是迫使該生物進行體質豁免檢定。在豁免失敗時，該生物承受等同於結果總值的光耀或黯蝕傷害（由你選擇）；在成功豁免時，該生物僅承受一半傷害（向下取整）。

隨著等級提升，能增加擲出d8骰的數量。當你達到牧師7級時2d8、13級時3d8、18級時4d8。

【驅散不死生物】作為魔法動作，你展示你的聖徽並說出斥責不死生物的禱詞。每個距離你30呎內的不死生物必須進行感知豁免檢定。若該生物豁免失敗，則其陷入恐懼與無力狀態1分鐘。在此期間，這些生物在其回合中盡可能遠離你。若生物承受任何傷害、你陷入無力狀態或死亡，則此效應提前終止。

Foundry Note

This feature will automatically restore 1 use on a Short Rest and all on a Long Rest. The uses scale automatically as you level up.

The Divine Spark: Heal activity includes the healing effect.

The Divine Spark: Save activity includes the saving throw.

The Turn Undead activity includes an Active Effect that applies the Frightened and Incapacitated conditions.

Circle Forms.name: Circle Forms
Circle Forms.description:
你學會了如何引導月之魔力強化自己的荒野形態，從而獲得以下好處：

【挑戰等級】野獸形態的最大挑戰等級變為你的德魯伊等級除以 3（向下取整，當前可用挑戰等級：[[(floor(@classes.druid.levels / 3))]]）。

【護甲等級】直到你解除形態前，你的護甲等級等同於13 + 你的感知調整值，除非野獸的護甲等級比該總值更高。

【臨時生命值】你獲得等同於德魯伊等級三倍的臨時生命值。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which can be used to automate the increase of your Amor Class when you're in your Beast form. It does not automatically activate/deactivate though.

Circle of the Land.name: 大地結社
Circle of the Land.description:
Celebrate Connection to the Natural World

The Circle of the Land comprises mystics and sages who safeguard ancient knowledge and rites. These Druids meet within sacred circles of trees or standing stones to whisper primal secrets in Druidic. The circle's wisest members preside as the chief priests of their communities.

Circle of the Land Spells.name: 大地結社法術
Circle of the Land Spells.description:
Whenever you finish a Long Rest, choose one type of land: arid, polar, temperate, or tropical. Consult the table below that corresponds to the chosen type; you have the spells listed for your Druid level and lower prepared.

Arid Land
Druid LevelCircle Spells
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplBlur000000]{Blur}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplBurningHan]{燃燒之手}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFireBolt00]{Fire Bolt}

Foundry Note

This feature does not automate swapping between prepared spell options.

Circle of the Moon.name: 月亮結社
Circle of the Moon.description:
Adopt Animal Forms to Guard the Wilds

Druids of the Circle of the Moon draw on lunar magic to transform themselves. Their order gathers under the moon to share news and perform rituals.

Changeable as the moon, a Druid of this circle might prowl as a great cat one night, soar over the treetops as an eagle the next day, and then crash through undergrowth as a bear to drive off a trespassing monster. The wild is in the Druid's blood.

Circle of the Moon Spells.name: 月亮結社法術
Circle of the Moon Spells.description:
當你達到月亮結社法術列表上指定的德魯伊等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

此外，當你處於荒野型態時，你可以施放此特性上的法術。

月亮結社Spells
德魯伊等級準備法術
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCureWounds]{治療傷勢}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMoonbeam00]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplStarryWisp]
5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplConjureAni]
7@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFountofMoo]{Fount of Moonlight}
9@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMassCureWo]

Circle of the Sea.name: 海洋結社
Circle of the Sea.description:
Become One with Tides and Storms

Druids of the Circle of the Sea draw on the tempestuous forces of oceans and storms. Some view themselves as embodiments of nature's wrath, seeking vengeance against those who despoil nature. Others seek mystical unity with nature by attuning themselves to the ebb and flow of the tides, following the rush of currents and waves and listening to the inscrutable whispers and roars of the winds.

Circle of the Sea Spells.name: 海洋結社法術
Circle of the Sea Spells.description:
當你達到海洋結社法術列表上指定的德魯伊等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

海洋結社法術
德魯伊等級準備法術
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFogCloud00]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGustofWind]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplRayofFrost]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplShatter000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplThunderwav]
5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplLightningB]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplWaterBreat]

Circle of the Stars.name: 星辰結社
Circle of the Stars.description:
Harness Secrets Hidden in Constellations

The Circle of the Stars has tracked heavenly patterns since time immemorial, discovering secrets hidden amid the constellations. By understanding these secrets, the Druids of this circle seek to harness the powers of the cosmos.

Star Map: Guidance.title: Star Map: Guidance
Star Map: Guidance.hint: This spell can only be used when you have a Star Map.

Star Map: Guiding Bolt.title: Star Map: Guiding Bolt
Star Map: Guiding Bolt.hint: This spell can only be used when you have a Star Map.

Clairvoyant Combatant.name: 洞若觀火
Clairvoyant Combatant.description:
當你使用喚醒心靈與生物建立心靈連結時，你可以迫使該生物進行對抗你法術豁免DC的智力豁免。豁免失敗時，連結持續期間該生物對你的攻擊檢定具有劣勢，且你對該生物的攻擊檢定具有優勢。

一旦你使用此特性，直到你完成一次短休或長休前無法再次使用，除非你消耗一個契約魔法法術位（無須動作）以重獲其使用次數。

Foundry Note

The Save activity includes an Active Effect which can be used for tracking the Disadvantage but it does not automate the Advantage/Disadvantage.

The Regain Use activity will deduct a Pact Magic spell slot and restore a use of this feature.

save.condition: 當你使用喚醒心靈與生物建立心靈連結時

Cleric.name: 牧師
Cleric.description:
以神力降下奇蹟的教士

牧師核心特徵

關鍵屬性

感知

生命骰

每牧師等級D8

豁免熟練

感知與魅力

技能熟練

從歷史、洞悉、醫藥、說服、宗教中選擇兩項

武器熟練

簡易武器

護甲訓練

輕甲、中甲、盾牌

起始裝備

選擇A或B： (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmChainShirt]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmShield0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepMace000000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagHolySymbolV]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagPriestsPack]、[[/award 7GP]]； (B) [[/award 110GP]]

牧師們從諸神領域中汲取力量，以之展現奇蹟。受到神祇、神系或其他非凡存在的祝福，牧師得以感應到神明所在的外層位面之力，並將那神聖的魔法用於普渡眾生，懲擊敵寇。

牧師們的力量即是神明的恩賜，因此他們常常侍奉於那些賦予自身魔法的神祇或非凡之力的神廟中。掌控對神聖魔法的運用並非依賴專項訓練，而需要牧師們從祈禱和儀式中學會如何獲取外層位面的神力。

當然，並非所有神廟或神社的成員都是牧師。還有一些祭司被召至神廟中，僅僅過著簡單的侍僧生活，透過祈禱和儀式而非魔法來實現他們對神明的獻身。許多凡人都聲稱自己能為諸神代言，但很少有人能像牧師那樣真正調動諸神的力量。

成為牧師…

作為首級角色

  • 獲得牧師核心特徵表中的所有特徵。
  • 獲得牧師特性表中列出的1級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得下列牧師核心特徵表中的特徵：生命骰以及輕甲、中甲和盾牌的訓練。
  • 獲得牧師特性表中列出的1級特性。請參閱第 2 章中的兼職規則以確定你的可用法術位。

Divine Order Choice.title: 神聖使命選擇
Divine Order Choice.hint: 你已將自己奉獻給下列一種神聖使命：

Blessed Strikes Choice.title: 神祐打擊選擇
Blessed Strikes Choice.hint: 你在戰鬥時充滿神性的光輝，選擇並獲得下列你所選擇的一個選項（即使你在舊書中的牧師子職業中已經獲得了下列任一選項，你也只能使用此特性中獲得選項）。

Cloak of Shadows.name: Cloak of Shadows
Cloak of Shadows.description:
As a Magic action while entirely within Dim Light or Darkness, you can expend 3 Focus Points to shroud yourself with shadows for 1 minute, until you have the Incapacitated condition, or until you end your turn in Bright Light. While shrouded by these shadows, you gain the following benefits.

Invisibility. You have the Invisible condition.

Partially Incorporeal. You can move through occupied spaces as if they were Difficult Terrain. If you end your turn in such a space, you are shunted to the last unoccupied space you were in.

Shadow Flurry. You can use your Flurry of Blows without expending any Focus Points.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which will apply the Invisible condition to you.

Shroud.name: Shroud
Shroud.condition: While entirely within Dim Light or Darkness

Clockwork Cavalcade.name: 時械矩陣
Clockwork Cavalcade.description:
You momentarily summon spirits of order to expunge disorder around you. As a Magic action, you summon the spirits in a 30-foot Cube originating from you. The spirits look like modrons or other Constructs of your choice. The spirits are intangible and invulnerable, and they create the effects below within the Cube before vanishing. Once you use this action, you can’t use it again until you finish a Long Rest unless you spend 7 Sorcery Points (no action required) to restore your use of it.

Heal. The spirits restore up to 100 Hit Points, divided as you choose among any number of creatures of your choice in the Cube.

Repair. Any damaged objects entirely in the Cube are repaired instantly.

Dispel. Every spell of level 6 and lower ends on creatures and objects of your choice in the Cube.

Foundry Note

The Cavalcade (Free) activity includes a free use and the Cavalcade (Sorcery Points) activity expends the correct number of Sorcery Points. Both include a template for tracking the impacted area.

Clockwork Sorcery.name: 時械術法
Clockwork Sorcery.description:
引導寰宇的秩序之力

一股源自宇宙本身的秩序之力，從機械境或與之類似完全由時械般精確的效率所構成的存在位面使你充滿了魔力。你或你宗族中的某個人也許已經捲入到魔冢這種居住在機械境的秩序生命的陰謀之中。又或許，你的先祖甚至參與過魔冢長征。無論是何種起源，秩序的力量也許對旁人來說有些奇怪，但於你而言，它是一個宏偉而璀璨的系統的一部分。

Clockwork Spells.hint: 當你達到時械法術表中所述的相應術士等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。
Clockwork Spells.title: Clockwork Spells

Clockwork Spells.name: 時械法術
Clockwork Spells.description:
當你達到時械法術表中所述的相應術士等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

時械法術
術士等級法術
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplAid0000000]{援助術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplAlarm00000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplLesserRest]{次級復原術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbEvilAndGoodPr]{Protection from Evil and Good}
5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDispelMagi]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbProtectionFro]
7@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFreedomofM]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSummonCons]{Summon Construct}
9@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGreaterRes]{高等復原術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplWallofForc]

此外，你可以從秩序顯跡表格中選擇或擲骰決定一種你在施法時顯現出與秩序之聯繫的方式。

@Embed[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.tables.RollTable.phbManifestation rollable caption=false]

Foundry Note

法術會隨著你升級時自動獲得。

College of Dance.name: 舞蹈學院
College of Dance.description:
踏著宇宙旋律而舞

舞蹈學院的吟遊詩人認為，創世真言只用言語和歌聲去表達是遠遠不夠的；上到天體流轉，下到動物蹦跳，這點點滴滴匯聚成的節奏才是創世真言的真正蘊含。這些吟遊詩人勤學苦練旋轉跳躍，只為和宇宙萬物同頻舞動，他們靈敏迅捷，舞姿優雅。

Dazzling Footwork.hint: 此徒手打擊使用敏捷或力量（依較高者），並使用你的吟遊激勵骰作為傷害，而非一般傷害。
Dazzling Footwork.title: Dazzling Footwork

College of Glamour.name: 迷惑學院
College of Glamour.description:
編織迷人的妖精魔法

迷惑學院的起源可以追溯到妖精荒野的魅惑魔法。學習這種魔法的吟遊詩人擅長將出靚麗與怖人一同編織進他們的歌聲和故事中，最強大的絢麗學院詩人可以將自己披上異界般的威嚴。他們的表演激起人們對過往純真的思念，也會喚起人們對長久以來恐懼的無意識回憶，甚至會牽動最鐵石心腸聽眾的情緒。

College of Lore.name: 軼聞學院
College of Lore.description:
探索魔法知識的深度

軼聞學院的吟遊詩人從各種來源收集法術和秘密， 不論是學術典籍、神秘儀式還是坊間傳聞。該學院的成員會在圖書館甚至大學院校裡搜集知識，與會友交流分享所見所聞。在節日或公眾事件期間他們也會見面，然後痛快的暢所欲言。他們通常喜歡揭發腐敗與謊言，並嘲弄那些高高在上的要人與權威。

College of Valor.name: 勇氣學院
College of Valor.description:
歌頌古代英雄事跡

勇氣學院的吟遊詩人可謂是豪情萬丈的說書人，他們口中的故事承載著對過去偉大英雄的回憶。這些詩人們或匯聚在金色大廳裡，或圍坐在熊熊篝火旁，頌唱著古往今來那些英勇事跡。他們行走大陸親身見識體驗那些偉大的事件，確保那些值得記憶的事不會被世界所遺忘。他們以激昂的詩歌激勵旁人，向著英雄們的道路不倦的前進。

Combat Inspiration.name: 戰鬥激勵
Combat Inspiration.description:
你能運用你的機智扭轉戰局。擁有你的吟遊激勵骰的生物可以使用其以獲得下列其中一項效果。

【防禦】當一個生物被攻擊檢定命中時，該生物可以使用其反應擲出吟遊激勵骰，並將結果添加到其對抗該攻擊的AC中，此舉可能使該攻擊變為失手。

【進攻】緊接在一個生物以攻擊檢定命中目標後，該生物可以擲出吟遊激勵骰，並將結果添加到對目標的攻擊傷害中。

Combat Superiority.name: Combat Superiority
Combat Superiority.description:
Your experience on the battlefield has refined your fighting techniques. You learn maneuvers that are fueled by special dice called Superiority Dice.

Maneuvers. You learn three maneuvers of your choice from the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFighter000000.JournalEntryPage.Ihf36UhEn91djWwP]{Maneuver Options} section. Many maneuvers enhance an attack in some way. You can use only one maneuver per attack.

You learn two additional maneuvers of your choice when you reach Fighter levels 7, 10, and 15. Each time you learn new maneuvers, you can also replace one maneuver you know with a different one.

Superiority Dice. You have four Superiority Dice, which are d8s. A Superiority Die is expended when you use it. You regain all expended Superiority Dice when you finish a Short or Long Rest.

You gain an additional Superiority Die when you reach Fighter levels 7 (five dice total) and 15 (six dice total).

Saving Throws. If a maneuver requires a saving throw, the DC equals 8 plus your 力量和敏捷 modifier (your choice) and Proficiency Bonus.

Foundry Note

Your Superiority Dice will automatically increase in count and die type as you level up.

Commander's Strike.name: Commander's Strike
Commander's Strike.description:
When you take the Attack action on your turn, you can replace one of your attacks to direct one of your companions to strike. When you do so, choose a willing creature who can see or hear you and expend one Superiority Die. That creature can immediately use its Reaction to make one attack with a weapon or an Unarmed Strike, adding the Superiority Die to the attack's damage roll on a hit.

Foundry Note

The Directed Strike activity allows you to select the type of damage it should deal in the roll dialog.

Directed Attack.name: Directed Attack
Directed Attack.condition: When you take the Attack action on your turn

Commanding Presence.name: Commanding Presence
Commanding Presence.description: When you make a Charisma (Intimidation, Performance, or Persuasion) check, you can expend one Superiority Die and add that die to the roll.

utility.condition: When you make a Charisma (Intimidation, Performance, or Persuasion) check

Contact Patron.name: Contact Patron
Contact Patron.description:
In the past, you usually contacted your patron through intermediaries. Now you can communicate directly; you always have the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplContactOth]{Contact Other Plane} spell prepared. With this feature, you can cast the spell without expending a spell slot to contact your patron, and you automatically succeed on the spell’s saving throw.

一旦你使用該法術後，直到你完成一次長休前無法再次使用。

Foundry Note

The spell is granted to you automatically at this level with a free use.

Controlled Chaos.name: Controlled Chaos
Controlled Chaos.description: You gain a modicum of control over the surges of your wild magic. Whenever you roll on the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.tables.RollTable.phbWildMagicSurg]{Wild Magic Surge} table, you can roll twice and use either number.

Corona of Light.name: Corona of Light
Corona of Light.description:
As a Magic action, you cause yourself to emit an aura of sunlight that lasts for 1 minute or until you dismiss it (no action required). You emit Bright Light in a 60-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet. Your enemies in the Bright Light have Disadvantage on saving throws against your Radiance of the Dawn and any spell that deals Fire or Radiant damage.

You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once), and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

Foundry Note

This feature includes a target template of 60 feet for tracking the emitted Bright Light and an Active Effect for marking affected creatures but it does not automate the Disadvantage.

Cosmic Omen.name: Cosmic Omen
Cosmic Omen.description:
Whenever you finish a Long Rest, you can consult your Star Map for omens and roll a die. Until you finish your next Long Rest, you gain access to a special Reaction based on whether you rolled an even or an odd number on the die:

Weal (Even). Whenever a creature you can see within 30 feet of you is about to make a D20 Test, you can take a Reaction to roll 1d6 and add the number rolled to the total.

Woe (Odd). Whenever a creature you can see within 30 feet of you is about to make a D20 Test, you can take a Reaction to roll 1d6 and subtract the number rolled from the total.

You can use this Reaction a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once), and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

Foundry Note

The Weal and Woe activities will consume a use of this feature and provide an Add or Subtract roll.

Woe (Odd).condition: Whenever a creature you can see within 30 feet of you is about to make a D20 Test
Woe (Odd).name: Woe (Odd)

Weal (Even).name: Weal (Even)
Weal (Even).condition: Whenever a creature you can see within 30 feet is about to make a D20 Test

Countercharm.name: Countercharm
Countercharm.description: You can use musical notes or words of power to disrupt mind-influencing effects. If you or a creature within 30 feet of you fails a saving throw against an effect that applies the Charmed or Frightened condition, you can take a Reaction to cause the save to be rerolled, and the new roll has Advantage.

utility.condition: You or a creature within 30 feet of you fails a saving throw against an effect that applies the Charmed or Frightened condition

Create Thrall.name: Create Thrall
Create Thrall.description:
You can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSummonAber]{異怪召喚術}, you can modify it so that it doesn’t require Concentration. If you do so, the spell’s duration becomes 1 minute for that casting, and when summoned, the Aberration has a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to your Warlock level plus your Charisma modifier.

In addition, the first time each turn the Aberration hits a creature under the effect of your Hex, the Aberration deals extra Psychic damage to the target equal to the bonus damage of that spell.

Foundry Note

The Hex activity includes the extra damage.

The Thrall Temporary HP activity includes the Temporary HP to apply to your Thrall when summoning without Concentration.

The spell is granted automatically as you level up.

Hex Damage.name: Hex Damage
Hex Damage.condition: When your thrall hits a creature under the effect of your Hex

Thrall Temporary HP.name: Thrall Temporary HP
Thrall Temporary HP.condition: When you cast Hex without Concentration

Cunning Action.name: 靈巧動作
Cunning Action.description: 你精妙的反應與身手使你的行動無比迅速。在你的回合中，你可以採取下列一項動作作為附贈動作執行：疾走、撤離或躲藏。&Reference[Dash]、&Reference[Disengage]、&Reference[Hide].

Cunning Strike.name: Cunning Strike
Cunning Strike.description:
You’ve developed cunning ways to use your Sneak Attack. When you deal Sneak Attack damage, you can add one of the following Cunning Strike effects. Each effect has a die cost, which is the number of Sneak Attack damage dice you must forgo to add the effect. You remove the die before rolling, and the effect occurs immediately after the attack’s damage is dealt. For example, if you add the Poison effect, remove 1d6 from the Sneak Attack’s damage before rolling.

If a Cunning Strike effect requires a saving throw, the DC equals 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus.

Poison (消耗：1d6). You add a toxin to your strike, forcing the target to make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the target has the &Reference[Poisoned] condition for 1 minute. At the end of each of its turns, the Poisoned target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success.

To use this effect, you must have a Poisoner’s Kit on your person.

Trip (消耗：1d6). If the target is Large or smaller, it must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or have the &Reference[Prone] condition.

Withdraw (消耗：1d6). Immediately after the attack, you move up to half your Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

Foundry Note

After using Cunning Strike effects use the Cunning Sneak Attack activity on this feature. It will prompt you to select how many dice you expended on effects and deduct them from your Sneak Attack roll automatically.

You can select the damage type in the damage roll dialog.

The Poison activity includes an Active Effect that applies the Poisoned condition.

The Trip activity includes an Active Effect that applies the Prone condition or you can use the inline condition above.

Cunning Strike: Poisoned.name: Cunning Strike: Poisoned
Cunning Strike: Poisoned.description: On a failed save, the target has the Poisoned condition for 1 minute.

Poison.name: Poison
Poison.condition: When you deal Sneak Attack damage

Trip.name: Trip
Trip.condition: When you deal Snack Attack damage

Cunning Sneak Attack.name: Cunning Sneak Attack
Cunning Sneak Attack.condition: When you deal Sneak Attack damage

Withdraw.name: Withdraw
Withdraw.condition: When you deal Sneak Attack damage

Cutting Words.name: 語出驚人
Cutting Words.description: 你學會運用你的妙語連珠來打斷敵人，迷惑或影響他人的信心。當你自身60呎內一個你所能看見的生物擲出傷害骰或成功通過能力檢定或攻擊檢定時，你可以採取反應並消耗一次吟遊激勵，擲出吟遊激勵骰並以該結果減少生物的擲骰結果，此舉將減少造成的傷害或可能成功轉為失敗。

Cut with Words.name: 語出驚人
Cut with Words.condition: 60呎內你所能看見的生物進行傷害骰或是通過屬性檢定或攻擊檢定。

Danger Sense.name: 危險感知
Danger Sense.description: 你獲得對周遭異常情況超乎尋常的感測力，讓你能先一步脫離危險。除非你陷入無力&Reference[Incapacitated]狀態，你在敏捷豁免上具有優勢。

Dark One's Blessing.name: 黑暗者賜福
Dark One's Blessing.description: 當你將一個敵對生物的生命值歸零時，你獲得等同於你魅力調整值加上你契術師等級的臨時生命值（最少為1）。若其他人將一個距離你10呎內的敵對生物的生命值歸零時，你也會獲得此好處。

heal.condition: When you reduce an enemy to 0 Hit Points or  an enemy within 10 feet of you is reduced to 0 Hit Points

Dark One's Own Luck.name: Dark One's Own Luck
Dark One's Own Luck.description:
You can call on your fiendish patron to alter fate in your favor. When you make an ability check or a saving throw, you can use this feature to add 1d10 to your roll. You can do so after seeing the roll but before any of the roll’s effects occur.

You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum of once), but you can use it no more than once per roll. You regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

Luck.name: Luck
Luck.condition: When you make an ability check or saving throw

Dazzling Footwork.name: Dazzling Footwork
Dazzling Footwork.description:
在你未穿戴護甲或持握盾牌時，你獲得下列好處。

【舞蹈家】你在任何依賴舞蹈所進行的魅力（表演）檢定上具有優勢。

【無甲防禦】你的基礎護甲等級等同於10 + 你的敏捷調整值 + 你的魅力調整值。

【敏捷打擊】當你以動作、附贈動作或反應的一部分消耗一次你的吟遊激勵時，作為動作、附贈動作或反應的一部分，你可以進行一次[[/item Unarmed Strike]]。

【吟遊傷害】你可以使用敏捷取代力量進行徒手打擊的攻擊檢定。當你以徒手傷害造成傷害時，你可以造成你的吟遊激勵所擲出的結果 + 你的敏捷調整值的鈍擊傷害，而非一般的徒手打擊傷害。此擲骰不會消耗吟遊激勵骰。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect that sets up your Unarmored Defense which can be disabled if you would prefer to use armor.

The Unarmed Strike activity uses Dexterity and a Bardic Inspiration die for damage.

Death Strike.name: Death Strike
Death Strike.description:
When you hit with your Sneak Attack on the first round of a combat, the target must succeed on a Constitution saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus), or the attack’s damage is doubled against the target.

Foundry Note

The Death Strike activity includes the save and your normal Sneak Attack damage.

With the target selected you can either right click on the damage roll's chat card and select  Apply Double Damage or click the "2" button and then the  Apply button.

Death Strike.name: Death Strike
Death Strike.condition: When you hit with your Sneak Attack on the first round of a combat

Defensive Tactics.name: Defensive Tactics
Defensive Tactics.description:
You gain one of the following feature options of your choice. Whenever you finish a Short or Long Rest, you can replace the chosen option with the other one.

Escape the Horde. Opportunity Attacks have Disadvantage against you.

Multiattack Defense. When a creature hits you with an attack roll, that creature has Disadvantage on all other attack rolls against you this turn.

Foundry Note

This feature includes a Multiattack Defense activity with an Active Effect which can be used to track a creature that has Disadvantage against you but it does not automate the effect.

Multiattack Defense.name: Multiattack Defense
Multiattack Defense.condition: When a creature hits you with an attack roll

Deflect Attacks.name: 撥擋攻擊
Deflect Attacks.description:
當一個攻擊檢定命中你，並且其傷害包含鈍擊、穿刺或揮砍傷害時，你可以採取反應以減少攻擊對你造成的總傷害，減少的數值等同於1d10 + 你的敏捷調整值 + 你的武僧等級。

若你將傷害減少至0，你可以消耗1內力點以借力打力。撥擋近戰攻擊時，選擇距離你5呎內一個你所能看見的生物；撥擋遠程攻擊時，選擇距離你60呎內一個你所能看見且不處於全掩護後的生物。所選生物必須通過敏捷豁免檢定，否則將承受兩枚武藝骰 + 你的敏捷調整值的傷害，傷害類型與原攻擊的傷害類型一致。

Foundry Note

The Reduce activity can be used to heal yourself to reduce the total damage if it's not enough to reduce it to 0.

The Redirect activity can be used to roll damage and consume a use of your Focus Points if you can reduce it to 0. You can select the type of damage in the roll dialog. The dice increase automatically as you level up.

Reduce.name: 撥擋
Reduce.condition: 當一個攻擊檢定命中你，並且其傷害包含鈍擊、穿刺或揮砍傷害時

Deflect Energy.name: 撥擋能量
Deflect Energy.description:
You can now use your Deflect Attacks feature against attacks that deal any damage type, not just Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing.

The Reduce activity can be used to heal yourself to reduce the total damage if it's not enough to reduce it to 0.

The Redirect activity can be used to roll damage and consume a use of your Focus Points if you can reduce it to 0. You can select the type of damage in the roll dialog. The dice increase automatically as you level up.

Reduce.name: Reduce
Reduce.condition: When an attack roll hits you and its damage includes Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage

Redirect.name: Redirect
Redirect.condition: If you reduce the damage to 0

Deft Explorer.name: 熟練探險家
Deft Explorer.description:
得益於你的旅途，你獲得下列好處：

【專精】選擇一個你熟練但不具備專精的技能，你獲得該技能的專精。

【語言】你知曉兩種從第2章節的語言表中你所選擇的語言。

Foundry Note

You will be prompted for choices when you add the Ranger class to your character sheet.

Devil's Sight.name: 魔鬼視覺
Devil's Sight.description:
先決條件：契術師等級2以上

你可以在微光或黑暗中正常看見距離你120呎範圍內的事物，無論該黑暗是有魔力或無魔力的。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect that grants you darkvision to 120 feet.

Devious Strikes.name: Devious Strikes
Devious Strikes.description:
You’ve practiced new ways to use your Sneak Attack deviously. The following effects are now among your Cunning Strike options.

Daze (消耗：2d6). The target must succeed on a Constitution saving throw, or on its next turn, it can do only one of the following: move or take an action or a Bonus Action.

Knock Out (消耗：6d6). The target must succeed on a Constitution saving throw, or it has the &Reference[Unconscious] condition for 1 minute or until it takes any damage. The Unconscious target repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Obscure (消耗：3d6). The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw, or it has the &Reference[Blinded] condition until the end of its next turn.

Foundry Note

After using Cunning Strike effects use the [[/item Cunning Strike activity=Cunning Sneak Attack]]{Cunning Sneak Attack} activity. It will prompt you to select how many dice you expended on effects and deduct them from your Sneak Attack roll automatically.

You can control the damage type in the damage roll dialog box.

The Daze activity includes an Active Effect for tracking the dazed target but it does not automate the effect.

The Knock Out activity includes an Active Effect which applies the Unconscious condition.

The Obscure activity includes an Active Effect which applies the Blinded condition.

Daze.name: Daze
Daze.condition: When you deal Sneak Attack damage

Knock Out.name: Knock Out
Knock Out.condition: When you deal Sneak Attack damage

Obscure.name: Obscure
Obscure.condition: When you deal Sneak Attack damage

Devious Strikes: Knocked Out.description: The target has the Unconscious condition for 1 minute or until it takes any damage. The Unconscious target repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
Devious Strikes: Knocked Out.name: Devious Strikes: Knocked Out

Devious Strikes: Blinded.name: Devious Strikes: Blinded
Devious Strikes: Blinded.description: The target has the Blinded condition until the end of its next turn

Devious Strikes: Dazed.name: Devious Strikes: Dazed
Devious Strikes: Dazed.description: On its next turn, the target can do only one of the following: move or take an action or a Bonus Action.

Devouring Blade.name: Devouring Blade
Devouring Blade.description:
先決條件：契術師等級12以上，@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.classes.Item.phbinvThirstingB]祈喚

你的飢渴之刃額外攻擊賦予兩次額外攻擊而非一次

Disarming Attack.name: Disarming Attack
Disarming Attack.description:
When you hit a creature with an attack roll, you can expend one Superiority Die to attempt to disarm the target. Add the Superiority Die roll to the attack's damage roll. The target must succeed on a Strength saving throw or drop one object of your choice that it's holding, with the object landing in its space.

Foundry Note

This feature includes a Strength Save activity and a Dexterity Save activity which will consume a use of your Superiority Die.

The Damage activity can be used to roll the damage and allows you to select the type of damage it should deal in the roll dialog. It will remember your choice going forwards.

save.condition: When you hit a creature with an attack roll

Disciple of Life.name: Disciple of Life
Disciple of Life.description:
When a spell you cast with a spell slot restores Hit Points to a creature, that creature regains additional Hit Points on the turn you cast the spell. The additional Hit Points equal 2 plus the spell slot's level.

Foundry Note

This feature includes a healing activity. Set the scale to the spell slot level you cast and it will provide a healing roll for you.

Disciplined Survivor.name: 隨遇而安
Disciplined Survivor.description:
Your physical and mental discipline grant you proficiency in all saving throws.

Additionally, whenever you make a saving throw and fail, you can expend 1 Focus Point to reroll it, and you must use the new roll.

Foundry Note

You will automatically be granted the additional Saving Throw proficiencies as you level up.

Use this feature to expend 1 Focus Point.

Distant Spell.name: 遠程法術
Distant Spell.description:
消耗：1術法點

當你施放射程至少5尺的法術時，你可以消耗1術法點使法術射程翻倍。或者，當你施放射程為觸及的法術時，你可以消耗1術法點使法術射程變為30尺。

Distant Spell.name: 遠程法術
Distant Spell.condition: 當你施放射程至少5尺的法術或當你施放射程為觸及的法術時

Distracting Strike.name: Distracting Strike
Distracting Strike.description:
When you hit a creature with an attack roll, you can expend one Superiority Die to distract the target. Add the Superiority Die roll to the attack's damage roll. The next attack roll against the target by an attacker other than you has Advantage if the attack is made before the start of your next turn.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which can be used for tracking the distracted target but does not automate the Advantage.

The Damage activity allows you to select the type of damage it should deal in the roll dialog.

Divination Savant.name: 預言學者
Divination Savant.description:
從@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.6AnqLUowgdsqMFvz]{預言學派}中選擇兩個不高於2環的法師法術（調整分組模式以便於選擇），並將其免費抄入你的法術書。

此外，每當你在此職業獲得新環階的法術位時，你可以從預言學派中選擇一個法師法術免費抄入你法術書。所選法術必須是你擁有的法術位環階。

Divine Fury.name: Divine Fury
Divine Fury.description:
你可以引導神性之力到你的打擊中。在你狂暴啟用時的每一回合，你以武器或徒手打擊命中的第一個生物承受等同於1d6 + 你野蠻人等級的一半（向下取整）的額外傷害。該額外傷類型害為黯蝕或光耀，每次你造成傷害時選擇類型。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an activity for each type of damage.

Divine Intervention.name: Divine Intervention
Divine Intervention.description:
You can call on your deity or pantheon to intervene on your behalf. As a Magic action, choose any @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.SkHptN2PTzFGDaEj]{Cleric spell} of level 5 or lower that doesn't require a Reaction to cast. As part of the same action, you cast that spell without expending a spell slot or needing Material components. You can't use this feature again until you finish a Long Rest.

Foundry Note

Uncheck the "Consumption" box when casting the spell for the free use. This feature can be used to track available uses.

Divine Order.name: 神聖使命
Divine Order.description:
你已將自己奉獻給下列一種神聖使命：

【守護者】接受戰鬥訓練後，你獲得軍用武器熟練與重甲訓練。

【奇術使】你額外知曉一個 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.SkHptN2PTzFGDaEj]{牧師法術列表}中的戲法。此外，你與神明的緊密聯繫使你的智力（奧秘或宗教）檢定獲得等同於感知調整值的加值（至少+1）。

Foundry Note

During advancement you will be able to choose which option you prefer.

Divine Order: Protector.name: 神聖使命：守護者
Divine Order: Protector.description:
你將自己獻身於下列神聖的使命：

【守護者】接受戰鬥訓練後，你獲得軍用武器熟練和重甲訓練。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which grants the proficiency and training.

Divine Order: Thaumaturge.name: 神聖使命：奇術使
Divine Order: Thaumaturge.description:
你已將自己奉獻給下列的神聖使命：

【奇術使】你額外知曉一個 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.SkHptN2PTzFGDaEj]{牧師法術列表}中的戲法。此外，你與神明的緊密聯繫使你的智力（奧秘或宗教）檢定獲得等同於感知調整值的加值（至少+1，當前 [[lookup @abilities.wis.mod]]）。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which increases the number of cantrips you can know and grants the bonus to your Intelligence (Arcana or Religion) checks.

Diviner.name: 預言師
Diviner.description:
Learn the Secrets of the Multiverse

The counsel of a Diviner is sought by those who want a clearer understanding of the past, present, and future. As a Diviner, you strive to part the veils of space, time, and consciousness. You work to master spells of discernment, remote viewing, supernatural knowledge, and foresight.

Draconic Resilience.name: 龍族韌性
Draconic Resilience.description:
魔法在你體內流動，使你龍族贈禮的物理特徵開始浮現。你的生命值最大值增加3點，且每當你提升術士等級時都會再增加1點。

此外，你一部份的肌膚將會覆蓋著龍族般的鱗片。當你未穿戴護甲時，你的AC等於10 + 你的敏捷調整值 + 你的魅力調整值

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect that automatically increases your Hit Point maximum and sets up your Unarmored Defense which can be disabled if you would prefer to use armor.

Draconic Sorcery.name: 龍族術法
Draconic Sorcery.description:
吐息巨龍魔法

你的天生魔法來自於巨龍的贈禮。或許是一條瀕死的遠古巨龍將一部分的魔力賜予你或你的先祖。你也可能從滿溢著巨龍之力的某處吸收了魔力。又或者，你取得一件從巨龍寶庫中出來的寶藏，其充滿龍族之力。亦或是你的先祖是一條巨龍。

Draconic Spells.title: 龍族法術
Draconic Spells.hint: 當你達到龍族法術表中所述的相應術士等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

8UnvG3X4TR3MpCGe.hint:
你的龍族魔法表現出與某種巨龍的元素親和。選擇一種傷害類型：強酸、寒冷、火焰、閃電或毒素。
                
                你獲得該傷害類型的抗性。

Draconic Spells.name: 龍族法術
Draconic Spells.description:
當你達到龍族法術表中所述的相應術士等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

龍族法術
術士等級法術
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplAlterSelf0]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplChromaticO]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCommand000]{命令術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDragonsBre]
5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFear000000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFly0000000]
7@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplArcaneEye0]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCharmMonst]
9@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplLegendLore]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSummonDrag]

Foundry Note

法術會隨著你升級時自動獲得。

Dragon Companion.name: Dragon Companion
Dragon Companion.description:
You can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSummonDrag]{Summon Dragon} without a Material component. You can also cast it once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast it in this way when you finish a Long Rest.

Whenever you start casting the spell, you can modify it so that it doesn’t require Concentration. If you do so, the spell’s duration becomes 1 minute for that casting.

Foundry Note

This feature can be used for tracking your free usage. When you cast the spell you can uncheck the "Consumption" box and, optionally, the "Concentration" box.

Dragon Wings.name: Dragon Wings
Dragon Wings.description:
As a Bonus Action, you can cause draconic wings to appear on your back. The wings last for 1 hour or until you dismiss them (no action required). For the duration, you have a Fly Speed of 60 feet.

Once you use this feature, you can’t use it again until you finish a Long Rest unless you spend 3 Sorcery Points (no action required) to restore your use of it.

Foundry Note

The Dragon Wings activity includes an Active Effect that grants you a Fly Speed of 60 feet.

The Restore Use activity can be used to expend the Sorcery Points to restore a use of the Dragon Wings activity.

Winged.name: Winged
Winged.description: he wings last for 1 hour or until you dismiss them (no action required). For the duration, you have a Fly Speed of 60 feet.

Dread Ambusher.name: 恐怖伏兵
Dread Ambusher.description:
你精通於製造恐怖伏擊的藝術，並獲得下列好處。

【伏兵出擊】在每場戰鬥你的首個回合開始時，直到該回合結束前你的速度增加10呎。

【恐懼打擊】當你以武器攻擊一名生物並命中時，你可以額外造成2d6心靈傷害。你每回合僅能使用一次此好處，而你可以使用的總次數等同於你的感知調整值（最少一次），並在你完成長休時重獲所有已消耗的使用次數。

【先攻加值】當你擲先攻骰時，你可以將感知調整值加入擲骰結果中。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which automatically adds your Wisdom modifier to your Initiative roll.

The Dreadful Strike activity includes the additional damage and tracks your limited number of uses. It's damage will automatically increase when you gain the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.classes.Item.phbrgrStalkersFl]{Stalker's Flurry} feature.

The Ambusher's Leap activity includes an Active Effect that can be used to increase your Speed by 10 feet.

Dreadful Strike.name: 恐懼打擊
Dreadful Strike.condition: 當你以武器攻擊並命中一名生物時

Ambusher's Leap.condition: 每場戰鬥你的首個回合開始時
Ambusher's Leap.name: 伏兵出擊

Dreadful Strikes.name: 哀懼靈襲
Dreadful Strikes.description:
你可以使用來自妖精荒野中黑暗空洞的攝心魔法以強化你的武器攻擊。當你以武器命中一個生物時，你可以對目標造成額外1d4心靈傷害，每個生物在每回合僅會承受一次此額外傷害。該額外傷害在你的遊俠等級達到 11 級時增加為1d6。

Foundry Note

The Damage activity includes the extra damage. It automatically scales as you level up.

damage.condition: 當你以武器命中一個生物時

Druid.name: 德魯伊
Druid.description:
擁有原初力量的自然祭司

核心德魯伊特徵

關鍵屬性

感知

生命骰

每德魯伊等級D8

豁免熟練

智力與感知

技能熟練

從奧秘、馴獸、洞悉、醫藥、自然、察覺、宗教、求生中選擇兩項

武器熟練

簡易武器

工具熟練

草藥師工具組

護甲訓練

輕甲和盾牌

起始裝備

選擇A或B： (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmLeatherArm]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmShield0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepSickle0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagDruidicFocu]（@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepQuartersta]）、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagExplorersPa]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbtulHerbalismK]、[[/award 9GP]]; or (B) [[/award 50GP]]

德魯伊屬於呼喚自然之力的古老教派。利用動物、植物和四大元素的魔力，德魯伊們可以治癒疾病、變身動物，乃至駕馭元素施加毀滅。

德魯伊崇敬自然至上，他們的魔法來自自然、自然神祇，或兩者兼有。通常，德魯伊會與其他德魯伊一起進行儀式，以記錄季節和自然週期的變化。

德魯伊不僅關注並維持著動植物間微妙的生態平衡，更注重人類與自然的和諧相處。通常，德魯伊們守護著聖地或看顧未受破壞的自然區域，但當世界出現重大危險之時，德魯伊亦將作為冒險者主動出擊，與之抗衡。

成為德魯伊…

作為首級角色

  • 獲得德魯伊核心特徵表中的所有特徵。
  • 獲得德魯伊特性表中列出的 1 級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得下列德魯伊核心特徵表中的特徵：生命骰以及輕甲和盾牌的訓練。
  • 獲得德魯伊特性表中列出的 1 級特性。請參閱第 2 章中的兼職規則來確定你的可用法術位。

Primal Order.title: 原初誓約
Primal Order.hint: 你已將自己奉獻給下列一種神聖使命

Elemental Fury.title: 元素怒火
Elemental Fury.hint: 元素的力量在你身上流淌。你獲得下列你所選擇的其中一種效果

Druidic.title: 德魯伊語
Druidic.hint: 你知曉德魯伊語，這是一種德魯伊間的秘密語言。

Druidic.name: 德魯伊語
Druidic.description:
你知曉德魯伊語，這是一種德魯伊間的秘密語言。在學習這門古老語言的過程中，你獲悉了與動物交流的魔法；你始終準備@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSpeakwithA]

你可以使用這門語言用它留下隱藏的資訊。懂得這門語言的人（包括你自己）會自動注意到此資訊。而不懂該語言的人通過[[/check inv 15]]檢定後也可以注意到其存在，但無法以非魔法手段解讀。

Foundry Note

Druidic and Speak with Animals are automatically added during advancement.

Elder Champion.name: Elder Champion
Elder Champion.description:
As a Bonus Action, you can imbue your Aura of Protection with primal power, granting the benefits below for 1 minute or until you end them (no action required). Once you use this feature, you can’t use it again until you finish a Long Rest. You can also restore your use of it by expending a level 5 spell slot (no action required).

Diminish Defiance. Enemies in the aura have Disadvantage on saving throws against your spells and Channel Divinity options.

Regeneration. At the start of each of your turns, you regain 10 Hit Points.

Swift Spells. Whenever you cast a spell that has a casting time of an action, you can cast it using a Bonus Action instead.

Foundry Note

The Elder Champion activity will consume a use and includes an Active Effect which can be used for tracking creatures impacted by Diminished Defense.

The Regeneration activity includes the 10 Hit Points you can regain each turn.

The Restore Use activity will consume a 5th level spell slot and restore a use of this feature.

Eldritch Hex.name: Eldritch Hex
Eldritch Hex.description:
Your alien patron grants you a powerful curse. You always have the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHex0000000]{Hex} spell prepared. When you cast Hex and choose an ability, the target also has Disadvantage on saving throws of the chosen ability for the duration of the spell.

Foundry Note

The spell is automatically added to your sheet when you level up.

Eldritch Invocations.name: 魔能祈喚
Eldritch Invocations.description:
