發掘禁忌的知識殘章賦予了你恆久的魔法能力。你獲得一個你所選擇的魔能祈喚，例如@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.classes.Item.phbinvPactTome00]。魔能祈喚在本職業後文的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbWarlock000000.JournalEntryPage.FA4hxx49eazhISIt]{魔能祈喚選項} 一節中描述。

【先決條件】若魔能祈喚有先決條件，則你必須滿足條件以習得該魔能祈喚。例如，若魔能祈喚需要你的契術師5級以上，那麼只有在你達到契術師5級後才可以選擇該祈喚。

【替換與獲得祈喚】每當你獲得契術師等級，你可以將一個祈喚替換為另一個符合條件的祈喚。若某個祈喚是你擁有的其他祈喚的先決條件，那麼你不能將其替換。

當你達到特定的契術師等級時，你將獲得更多你所選擇的祈喚，如契術師特性表中祈喚一欄所示。

當前最大魔能祈喚：[[lookup @scale.warlock.invocations-known]]

除非描述另有說明，否則你無法選擇同一祈喚。

Foundry Note

You will be prompted for your choices as you level up. The advancement system does not prevent you from taking any invocations so be sure that you meet the requirements before selecting one.

Eldritch Knight.name: 魔能騎士
Eldritch Knight.description:
Support Combat Skills with Arcane Magic

Eldritch Knights combine the martial mastery common to all Fighters with a careful study of magic. Their spells both complement and extend their combat skills, providing additional protection to shore up their armor and also allowing them to engage many foes at once with explosive magic.

Eldritch Master.name: Eldritch Master
Eldritch Master.description:
When you use your Magical Cunning feature, you regain all your expended Pact Magic spell slots.

Foundry Note

Use this feature to restore all expended Pact Magic spell slots. It will consume the free use from your Magical Cunning feature.

Eldritch Mind.name: 魔能意志
Eldritch Mind.description: 你在保持專注的體質豁免檢定上具有優勢。

Eldritch Smite.name: 魔能重斬
Eldritch Smite.description:
先決條件：契術師等級5以上，具有@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.classes.Item.phbinvPactBlade0]{鋒刃魔契}祈喚

每回合一次，當你使用你的契約武器命中一個生物時，你可以消耗一個契約魔法法術位對目標造成額外的1d8 + 每法術位環階1d8的力場傷害，並且若目標體型在巨型以下，則可以使其陷入&Reference[Prone]狀態

Foundry Note

The Smite activity consumes a Pact Magic spell slot and increases the damage based on your pact spell level.

Smite.name: Smite
Smite.condition: Hit a creature with your pact weapon

Eldritch Spear.name: 魔能之矛
Eldritch Spear.description:
先決條件：契術師等級2以上，具有可造成傷害的契術師戲法

選擇一個你知曉可以造成傷害且範圍10呎以上的契術師戲法。當你施放該法數時，其範圍增加等同於你契術師等級的30倍。

【可複選】你可以重複選擇此祈喚，但每次你都必須選擇不同且符合條件的戲法。

Foundry Note

Use the Increase Range enchantment activity and drag your chosen cantrip to the chat card to increase its range and append ", Eldritch Spear" for easier identification.

Eldritch Strike.name: Eldritch Strike
Eldritch Strike.description:
You learn how to make your weapon strikes undercut a creature's ability to withstand your spells. When you hit a creature with an attack using a weapon, that creature has Disadvantage on the next saving throw it makes against a spell you cast before the end of your next turn.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which can be used for tracking but does not automate the Disadvantage.

Elemental Affinity.name: Elemental Affinity
Elemental Affinity.description:
你的龍族魔法表現出與某種巨龍的元素親和。選擇一種傷害類型：強酸、寒冷、火焰、閃電或毒素。

你獲得該傷害類型的抗性，且當你施放造成該傷害類型的法術時，你可以將你的魅力調整值添加在該法術的一次傷害擲骰中。

Foundry Note

當你升級時，系統會提示你選擇一種傷害類型。額外的傷害不會自動加上，但此特性會為每種傷害類型各包含一個行動。

你可以將所選的傷害類型移到最上方，來加快此特性的使用，這樣在使用此特性時會自動套用該傷害類型。

Poison.name: Poison
Poison.condition: When you cast a spell that deals damage of your elemental affinity

Acid.name: Acid
Acid.condition: When you cast a spell that deals damage of your elemental affinity

Cold.name: Cold
Cold.condition: When you cast a spell that deals damage of your elemental affinity

Fire.name: Fire
Fire.condition: When you cast a spell that deals damage of your elemental affinity

Lightning.name: Lightning
Lightning.condition: When you cast a spell that deals damage of your elemental affinity

Elemental Attunement.name: 四象同調
Elemental Attunement.description:
在你回合開始時，你可以消耗1點內力讓元素能量充滿己身。這股能量將會持續存在10分鐘，或直到你陷入無力狀態時。啟用此特性時，你獲得下列好處：

【觸及】將元素能量延伸至體外，當你做出徒手打擊時，你的觸及範圍比原本多出10呎。

【元素注拳】每當你使用徒手打擊命中時，你可以選擇造成強酸或寒冷或火焰或閃電傷害，而非普通的傷害類型。當你以徒手攻擊造成上述傷害類型之一時，你可以迫使目標進行一次DC 8的力量豁免。在豁免失敗時，你可以將元素能量產繞在目標上，並將其拉近或推離最多10呎。

Foundry Note

The Elemental Attunement activity expends 1 Focus Point and includes an Active Effect for tracking this feature.

The Elemental Strike activity can be used for your Unarmed Strike and will allow you to select the damage type in the roll dialog.

The Elemental Save activity includes the Strength saving throw.

Elemental Attunement.name: Elemental Attunement
Elemental Attunement.condition: At the start of your turn

Elemental Save.name: Elemental Save
Elemental Save.condition: When you deal Elemental Strike damage

Elemental Attunement.name: Elemental Attunement
Elemental Attunement.description: You gain the following benefits while this feature is active: Reach and Elemental Strikes.

Elemental Burst.name: Elemental Burst
Elemental Burst.description:
As a Magic action, you can expend 2 Focus Points to cause elemental energy to burst in a 20-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point within 120 feet of yourself. Choose a damage type: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder.

Each creature in the Sphere must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes damage of the chosen type equal to three rolls of your Martial Arts die. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage.

Foundry Note

The damage type can be selected in the roll dialog.

Elemental Epitome.name: Elemental Epitome
Elemental Epitome.description:
While your Elemental Attunement is active, you also gain the following benefits.

Damage Resistance. You gain Resistance to one of the following damage types of your choice: Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder. At the start of each of your turns, you can change this choice.

Destructive Stride. When you use your Step of the Wind, your Speed increases by 20 feet until the end of the turn. For that duration, any creature of your choice takes damage equal to one roll of your Martial Arts die when you enter a space within 5 feet of it. The damage type is your choice of Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Thunder. A creature can take this damage only once per turn.

Empowered Strikes. Once on each of your turns, you can deal extra damage to a target equal to one roll of your Martial Arts die when you hit it with an Unarmed Strike. The extra damage is the same type dealt by that strike.

Foundry Note

This Damage Resistance activity includes 5 Active Effects which you can toggle between to select your preferred Resistance.

The Destructive Stride activity includes an Active Effect which can increase your Movement Speed by 20 feet and allows you to choose the type of damage in the roll dialog.

The Empowered Strike activity allows you to choose the damage type in the roll dialog.

Destructive Stride.name: Destructive Stride
Destructive Stride.condition: When you use your Step of the Wind

Damage Resistance.condition: While your Elemental Attunement is active
Damage Resistance.name: Damage Resistance

Empowered Strike.name: Empowered Strike
Empowered Strike.condition: 每回合一次，當你以徒手打擊命中時

Elemental Fury.name: 元素怒火
Elemental Fury.description:
The might of the elements flows through you. You gain one of the following options of your choice.

Potent Spellcasting. Add your Wisdom modifier to the damage you deal with any Druid cantrip.

Primal Strike. Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll using a weapon or a Beast form's attack in Wild Shape, you can cause the target to take an extra 1d8 [[/damage 1d8 type=cold]]{cold}, [[/damage 1d8 type=fire]]{fire}, [[/damage 1d8 type=lightning]]{lightning}, or [[/damage 1d8 type=thunder]]{thunder} damage (choose when you hit).

Foundry Note

You will be prompted to choose during advancement.

Elemental Fury: Potent Spellcasting.name: 元素怒火：強力施法
Elemental Fury: Potent Spellcasting.description:
任何你以德魯伊戲法所造成的傷害添加上你的感知調整值（當前感知調整值：[[lookup @abilities.wis.mod]]）。

Foundry Note

This feature does not automate the addition of the Wisdom modifier to Druid cantrips.

Elemental Fury: Primal Strike.name: 元素怒火：原力蠻擊
Elemental Fury: Primal Strike.description:
Once on each of your turns when you hit a creature with an attack roll using a weapon or a Beast form's attack in Wild Shape, you can cause the target to take an extra 1d8 [[/damage 1d8 type=cold]]{cold}, [[/damage 1d8 type=fire]]{fire}, [[/damage 1d8 type=lightning]]{lightning}, or [[/damage 1d8 type=thunder]]{thunder} damage (choose when you hit).

Foundry Note

This feature's damage will automatically increase when you gain @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.classes.Item.phbdrdImprovedEl]{Improved Elemental Fury}. If using the activity you will be able to select the damage type when rolling. It will default to your previously chosen damage type.

Elusive.name: Elusive
Elusive.description: You’re so evasive that attackers rarely gain the upper hand against you. No attack roll can have Advantage against you unless you have the Incapacitated condition.

Empowered Evocation.name: Empowered Evocation
Empowered Evocation.description:
每當你施放塑能學派的法師法術時，你可以將你的智力調整值添加到該法術的其中一個傷害骰中。

Foundry Note

You can add your Intelligence modifier to the spell's Situational Bonus in the damage dialog or use this feature's Damage activity which allows you to select the type in the damage dialog.

damage.condition: 每當你施放塑能學派的法師法術時

Empowered Spell.name: 強效法術
Empowered Spell.description:
消耗：1術法點

當你為法術擲傷害骰時，你可以消耗 1 術法點重擲其中至多等同於你魅力調整值（最小為1，當前[[lookup @abilities.cha.mod]]）的傷害骰，且你必須使用重擲的結果。

即使你已經在施法時應用了不同的超魔法選項，你仍可以使用強效法術。

Empowered Spell.name: 強效法術
Empowered Spell.condition: 當你為法術擲傷害骰時

Empowered Strikes.name: 真力注拳
Empowered Strikes.description:
每當你使用徒手打擊造成傷害時，你可以選擇造成力場傷害或其原本的傷害類型。

Foundry Note

The Empowered Strike activity on this feature can allows you to choose between Force and Bludgeoning damage in the roll dialog. It will remember your choice going forward.

It uses your Martial Arts Die (currently [[lookup @scale.monk.die]] for damage and will automatically update as you level up.

Envenom Weapons.name: Envenom Weapons
Envenom Weapons.description:
When you use the [[/item Cunning Strike activity="Poison"]]{Poison} option of your Cunning Strike, the target also takes [[/damage 2d6 poison]] damage whenever it fails the saving throw. This damage ignores Resistance to Poison damage.

Foundry Note

The Poison activity on this feature includes the save and poison damage.

Alternatively, you can use the inline roll above if you've already used the original activity.

Important: This damage does not automatically bypass resistances so ensure the correct damage is being applied.

Poison.name: Poison
Poison.condition: When you deal Sneak Attack damage

Epic Boon.name: 史詩恩惠
Epic Boon.description:
You gain an @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.GxfrwkJbrIvn7reC]{Epic Boon feat} or another feat of your choice for which you qualify. @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.feats.Item.phbBoonofSpellRe]{Boon of Spell Recall} is recommended.

Foundry Note

You will be prompted for a choice while leveling up.

Evasion.name: 反射閃避
Evasion.description:
You can nimbly dodge out of the way of certain dangers. When you’re subjected to an effect that allows you to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, you instead take no damage if you succeed on the saving throw and only half damage if you fail. You can’t use this feature if you have the Incapacitated condition.

Foundry Note

With your token selected you can either right click on the damage roll's chat card and select  Apply Half Damage or click the "1/2" button and then the  Apply button.

Evasive Footwork.name: Evasive Footwork
Evasive Footwork.description: As a Bonus Action, you can expend one Superiority Die and take the Disengage action. You also roll the die and add the number rolled to your AC until the start of your next turn.

Evocation Savant.name: 塑能學者
Evocation Savant.description:
從@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.6AnqLUowgdsqMFvz]{塑能學派}中選擇兩個不高於2環的法師法術（調整分組模式至「學派」以便於選擇），並將其免費抄入你的法術書。

此外，每當你在此職業獲得新環階的法術位時，你可以從塑能學派中選擇一個法師法術免費抄入你法術書。所選法術必須是你擁有的法術位環階。

Evoker.name: 塑能師
Evoker.description:
Create Explosive Elemental Effects

Your studies focus on magic that creates powerful elemental effects such as bitter cold, searing flame, rolling thunder, crackling lightning, and burning acid. Some Evokers find employment in military forces, serving as artillery to blast armies from afar. Others use their power to protect others, while some seek their own gain.

Exceptional Training.name: Exceptional Training
Exceptional Training.description:
When you take a Bonus Action to command your Primal Companion beast to take an action, you can also command it to take the &Reference[Dash], &Reference[Disengage], &Reference[Dodge], or &Reference[Help] action using its Bonus Action.

In addition, whenever it hits with an attack roll and deals damage, it can deal your choice of Force damage or its normal damage type.

Foundry Note

The Primal Companion's damage roll dialog's will allow you to choose the type of damage. It defaults to your previous choice each time going forward.

Expert Divination.name: Expert Divination
Expert Divination.description:
Casting Divination spells comes so easily to you that it expends only a fraction of your spellcasting efforts. When you cast a Divination spell using a level 2+ spell slot, you regain one expended spell slot. The slot you regain must be of a level lower than the slot you expended and can’t be higher than level 5.

Foundry Note

You can manually regain the expended spell slot or use the Regain Spell Slot activity which will prompt you for the slot to restore.

Expertise.name: 專精
Expertise.description:
你在自己擁有熟練的技能中，任選兩項獲得專精。若你熟練表演與說服，建議選擇這兩項。

在你吟遊詩人9級時，你可以再任選兩項已熟練的技能獲得專精。

Extended Spell.name: 延時法術
Extended Spell.description:
消耗：1術法點

當你施放持續時間不短於1分鐘的法術時，你可以消耗1術法點使法術的持續時間翻倍且至多不超過 24 小時。

若受影響的法術需要專注，則你為維持該專注而進行的體質豁免檢定具有優勢。

Extended Spell.name: 延時法術
Extended Spell.condition: 當你施放持續時間不短於 1 分鐘的法術時

Extra Attack.name: 額外攻擊
Extra Attack.description: 每當你在你的回合採取攻擊動作時，你可以攻擊兩次，而非一次。

Faithful Steed.name: Faithful Steed
Faithful Steed.description:
You can call on the aid of an otherworldly steed. You always have the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFindSteed0]{Find Steed} spell prepared.

You can also cast the spell once without expending a spell slot, and you regain the ability to do so when you finish a Long Rest.

Foundry Note

The Find Steed spell is added to your spell list as always prepared and with a free use per Long Rest when you reach this level.

Fanatical Focus.name: Fanatical Focus
Fanatical Focus.description: 每次啟用狂暴一次，若你豁免失敗，則你可以重骰，在結果加上等同於你狂暴傷害的加（當前 [[/r @scale.barbarian.rage-damage]]）並且你必須使用新的結果。

Fast Hands.name: Fast Hands
Fast Hands.description:
As a Bonus Action, you can do one of the following.

Sleight of Hand. Make a Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) check to pick a lock or disarm a trap with Thieves’ Tools or to pick a pocket.

Use an Object. Take the Utilize action, or take the Magic action to use a magic item that requires that action.

Foundry Note

The Sleight of Hand and Thieves' Tools activities include the relevant checks.

The Use an Object activity can be used for tracking Bonus Action use.

Fast Movement.name: 快速移動
Fast Movement.description:
若你為穿戴重甲，你的速度提升10呎。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which will automatically increase your movement speed. Disable the Fast Movement Active Effect if you're wearing Heavy armor.

Favored Enemy.name: 宿敵
Favored Enemy.description:
你始終準備@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHuntersMar]{獵人印記}法術。你可以不消耗法術位施放此法術兩次，並在你完成一次長休後恢復所有此能力的使用次數。

你可以不消耗法術位施放此法術的次數會在你達到特定的遊俠等級時增加，具體詳見遊俠特性表中的宿敵一欄。

Foundry Note

The spell is granted to you at this level and will increase the number of free uses available automatically as you level up.

Feinting Attack.name: Feinting Attack
Feinting Attack.description:
As a Bonus Action, you can expend one Superiority Die to feint, choosing one creature within 5 feet of yourself as your target. You have Advantage on your next attack roll against that target this turn. If that attack hits, add the Superiority Die to the attack's damage roll.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect for tracking the target but it does not automate the Advantage.

The Damage activity allows you to select the type of damage it should deal in the roll dialog.

Feral Instinct.name: Feral Instinct
Feral Instinct.description: Your instincts are so honed that you have Advantage on Initiative rolls.

Feral Senses.name: Feral Senses
Feral Senses.description:
Your connection to the forces of nature grants you Blindsight with a range of 30 feet.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which upgrades your Blindsight to 30 feet if you do not already have it.

Fey Reinforcements.name: Fey Reinforcements
Fey Reinforcements.description:
You can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSummonFey0]{Summon Fey} without a Material component. You can also cast it once without a spell slot, and you regain the ability to cast it in this way when you finish a Long Rest.

Whenever you start casting the spell, you can modify it so that it doesn’t require Concentration. If you do so, the spell’s duration becomes 1 minute for that casting.

Foundry Note

This feature can be used for tracking the free use. Then cast the spell and uncheck the "Consumption" box and optionally the "Concentration" option.

Fey Wanderer.name: 妖精漫遊者
Fey Wanderer.description:
散播妖精歡喜與怒火

或來自一位至高妖精的恩惠，或是來自你食用的一枚從能言之樹上取下的閃亮果實，或是來自你曾浸游於中的魔法清泉，或是來自其它妙事，你的身側因那次奇遇而有妖精的魔力纏繞。無論你是怎麼得到你來自妖精的魔法的，你現在是一名代表了凡間與妖精國度雙方的遊俠妖精漫遊者。你漫步於多元宇宙之時，你輕快的笑聲為受壓迫者們帶來欣喜的希望，你英勇的技藝直擊你敵人的恐懼，你所就的偉績乃是妖精的喜悅，你散布的恐懼乃是妖精的憤怒。

Fey Wanderer Spells.name: 妖精漫遊者法術
Fey Wanderer Spells.description:
當你達到妖精漫遊者法術表中所述的相應遊俠等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

妖精漫遊者法術
遊俠等級Spell
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCharmPerso]
5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMistyStep0]{迷蹤步}
9@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSummonFey0]
13@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDimensionD]
17@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMislead000]

你還獲得了來自妖精的神奇祝福。你可以從妖精荒野之賜表中自行選擇或隨機決定。

@Embed[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.tables.RollTable.phbFeywildGifts0 rollable]

Foundry Note

法術會隨著你升級時自動獲得。

Fiend Patron.name: 邪魔宗主
Fiend Patron.description:
Make a Deal with the Lower Planes

Your pact draws on the Lower Planes, the realms of perdition. You might forge a bargain with a demon lord such as Demogorgon or Orcus; an archdevil such as Asmodeus; or a pit fiend, balor, yugoloth, or night hag that is especially mighty. That patron’s aims are evil—the corruption or destruction of all things, ultimately including you—and your path is defined by the extent to which you strive against those aims.

Fiend Spells.title: Fiend Spells
Fiend Spells.hint: 你宗主的魔法確保你始終準備特定的法術，當你達到邪魔法術表所提及的契術師等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

Fiend Spells.name: 邪魔法術
Fiend Spells.description:
你宗主的魔法確保你始終準備特定的法術，當你達到邪魔法術表所提及的契術師等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

邪魔法術
契術師等級法術
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplBurningHan]{燃燒之手}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCommand000]{命令術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplScorchingR]{灼熱射線}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSuggestion]{暗示術}
5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFireball00]{火球術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplStinkingCl]{臭雲術}
7@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFireShield]{火焰護盾}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplWallofFire]{火牆術}
9@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGeas000000]{指使術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplInsectPlag]{疫病蟲群}

Foundry Note

As you level up these spells will be granted to you automatically.

Fiendish Resilience.name: 邪魔韌性
Fiendish Resilience.description:
Choose one damage type, other than Force, whenever you finish a Short or Long Rest. You have Resistance to that damage type until you choose a different one with this feature.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect for each type of damage which will grant you the correct Resistance. Apply and disable the effects as necessary when you change types.

Fiendish Vigor.name: 邪魔精力
Fiendish Vigor.description:
先決條件：契術師等級2以上

你可以不消耗任何法術位對自己施放@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFalseLife0]{摹造生命}。當你以此特性施放法術時，你不用為臨時生命值擲骰，而是將每個骰子自動取滿。

Foundry Note

The False Life activity provides a healing roll that includes the maximum die roll and the additional Hit Points for being cast at a higher level based on your current Pact Magic Level.

Fighter.name: 戰士
Fighter.description:
十八般武藝樣樣精通的能手

核心戰士特徵

關鍵屬性

力量和敏捷

生命骰

每戰士等級D10

豁免熟練

力量與體質

技能熟練

從特技、馴獸、運動、歷史、洞悉、威嚇、遊說、察覺或求生中選擇兩項

武器熟練

簡易武器和軍用武器

護甲訓練

輕甲、中甲、重甲、盾牌

起始裝備

選擇A或B或C： (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmChainMail0]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepGreatsword]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepFlail00000]、8把@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepJavelin000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagDungeoneers]、[[/award 4GP]]；(B) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmStuddedLea]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepScimitar00]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepShortsword]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepLongbow000]、20支@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbamoArrows0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagQuiver00000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagDungeoneers]、[[/award 11GP]]；(C) [[/award 155GP]]

戰士往往馳騁於戰場。戰士可以是探險騎士，皇家鬥士，精英士兵或是老練傭兵，他們熟習各種武器與護甲，他們的生活與死亡相伴，既不害怕手上染滿鮮血，也不畏懼迎接死亡。

戰士精通各種武器技藝，裝備精良的戰士總能在任何戰鬥中找到合適的武器。同樣，戰士對於各種盔甲也駕輕就熟。除掌握基本使用技巧外，每位戰士還專精於某種特定的戰鬥風格。有些專攻箭術，有些專精雙持武器戰鬥，有些則擅長於用魔法增強自己的戰鬥能力。泛用與專精相結合，讓戰士無往而不利。

成為戰士…

作為首級角色

  • 獲得戰士核心特徵表中的所有特徵。
  • 獲得戰士特性表中列出的1級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得下列戰士核心特徵表中的特徵：生命骰，軍用武器熟練，以及輕甲和盾牌的訓練。
  • 獲得戰士特性表中列出的1級特性。

Fighting Style.name: 戰鬥風格
Fighting Style.description:
你已磨練你的戰鬥技藝並獲得一項你所選擇的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.sbHImaCB8ZMEHYkb]{戰鬥風格專長}。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.feats.Item.phbfstDefense000]。

每當你獲得戰士等級時，你可以將原專長替換為另一個不同的戰鬥風格專長。

Fleet Step.name: Fleet Step
Fleet Step.description: When you take a Bonus Action other than Step of the Wind, you can also use Step of the Wind immediately after that Bonus Action.

Flurry of Healing and Harm.name: Flurry of Healing and Harm
Flurry of Healing and Harm.description:
When you use Flurry of Blows, you can replace each of the Unarmed Strikes with a use of Hand of Healing without expending Focus Points for the healing.

In addition, when you make an Unarmed Strike with Flurry of Blows and deal damage, you can use Hand of Harm with that strike without expending a Focus Point for Hand of Harm. You can still use Hand of Harm only once per turn.

You can use these benefits a total number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once). You regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

Foundry Note

This feature can be used for tracking your available uses.

Foe Slayer.name: Foe Slayer
Foe Slayer.description:
@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHuntersMar]{Hunter’s Mark} is a d10 rather than a d6.

Foundry Note

You may use this feature in place of the Bonus Mark Damage activity on the Hunter's Mark spell.

Font of Inspiration.name: Font of Inspiration
Font of Inspiration.description:
你現在完成一次短休或長休時，你重獲所有已消耗的吟遊激勵骰使用次數。

此外，你可以消耗一個法術位（無須動作），重獲一次吟遊激勵使用次數。

Foundry Note

You must update the Bardic Inspiration feature on your sheet to refresh on Short Rest as it defaults to Long rest.

The Recharge with Spell Slot activity will expend a spell slot and grant another use of Bardic Inspiration.

Font of Magic.name: 魔力泉湧
Font of Magic.description:
你開始運用體內的魔法源泉，從中湧現的魔力體現為術法點。你可以使用術法點創造各種魔法效應。

你擁有2術法點，並在你達到更高等級後獲得額外更多，如術士特性表中的術法點一欄所示。你擁有的術法點無法超過表中對應你當前等級的所列數值。當你完成長休時，你重獲所有已消耗的術法點。

你可以使用你的術法點以啟用以下選項，其他特性—比如超魔法也需要消耗術法點來使用。

【法術位轉換為術法點】你可以消耗一個法術位以獲得等同於該法術位環階的術法點（無需動作）。

【創造法術位】作為附贈動作，你可以將未消耗的術法點轉換為法術位。創造法術位表中列出創造各環階法術位所需的術法點，以及所需的最低術士等級。你可以創造的不高於5環的法術位。

當你完成長休時，任何你以此特性創造的法術位將消散。

創造法術位
法術位環階術法點花費最低術士等級
122
233
355
467
579

Foundry Note

The Regain Spell Slot activity will convert your Sorcery Points into spell slots.

The Regain Sorcery Points activity will convert your chosen spell slot into Sorcery Points.

Frenzy.name: Frenzy
Frenzy.description:
在狂暴啟用期間，若你使用魯莽攻擊，你對在自己回合基於力量攻擊並命中的第一個目標造成額外傷害。擲等同於你狂暴傷害加值的D6，結果即為造成的額外傷害數值。該傷害與你所使用武器或徒手打擊造成的傷害類型相同。

Foundry Note

The Damage activity scales automatically as you level up and allows you to select the type of damage to use in the damage roll's dialog box. It will then remember your choice going forward.

Full of Stars.name: Full of Stars
Full of Stars.description:
While in your Starry Form, you become partially incorporeal, giving you Resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which automates the addition of the Resistances. It is not automatically applied when entering your Starry Form though. It can be activated by using this feature and applying it or by turning the Active Effect on in your character sheet's Effects tab.

Gaze of Two Minds.name: Gaze of Two Minds
Gaze of Two Minds.description:
先決條件：Level 5+ Warlock

You can use a Bonus Action to touch a willing creature and perceive through its senses until the end of your next turn. As long as the creature is on the same plane of existence as you, you can take a Bonus Action on subsequent turns to maintain this connection, extending the duration until the end of your next turn. The connection ends if you don’t maintain it in this way.

While perceiving through the other creature’s senses, you benefit from any special senses possessed by that creature, and you can cast spells as if you were in your space or the other creature’s space if the two of you are within 60 feet of each other.

Gift of the Depths.name: Gift of the Depths
Gift of the Depths.description:
先決條件：Level 5+ Warlock

You can breathe underwater, and you gain a Swim Speed equal to your Speed.

You can also cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplWaterBreat]{Water Breathing} once without expending a spell slot. You regain the ability to cast it in this way again when you finish a Long Rest.

Foundry Note

The Gift Water Breathing activity consumes a limited use and includes an Active Effect for tracking the chosen creatures.

Gift of the Protectors.name: Gift of the Protectors
Gift of the Protectors.description:
先決條件：Level 9+ Warlock, @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.classes.Item.phbinvPactTome00]{Pact of the Tome} Invocation

A new page appears in your @UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.items.Item.CwWbeQ6XyqFzbMYw]{Book of Shadows} when you conjure it. With your permission, a creature can take an action to write its name on that page, which can contain a number of names equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum of one name).

When any creature whose name is on the page is reduced to 0 Hit Points but not killed outright, the creature magically drops to 1 Hit Point instead. Once this magic is triggered, no creature can benefit from it until you finish a Long Rest.

As a Magic action, you can erase a name on the page by touching it.

Foundry Note

The Protect activity consumes a use of its activity which refreshes every Long Rest.

The Write Name activity consumes a use of the item which can be used for tracking how many names you've written down.

The Erase Name activity will restore a use of the item and allows you to add another name.

Protect.name: Protect
Protect.condition: When any creature whose name is on the page is reduced to 0 Hit Points but not killed outright

Gloom Stalker.name: 幽域追蹤者
Gloom Stalker.description:
借幽影魔法與你的敵人戰鬥

幽域追蹤者居身於至暗之地，運用來自墮影冥界的魔法與隱於黑暗中的敵人戰鬥。

Iron Mind.title: 鋼鐵意志
Iron Mind.hint: 你獲得感知豁免的熟練。若你已擁有此熟練，你可以改為獲得智力或魅力豁免的熟練（由你選擇）。

Gloom Stalker Spells.name: 幽域追蹤者法術
Gloom Stalker Spells.description:
當你達到幽域追蹤者法術表中所述的相應遊俠等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

幽域追蹤者法術
遊俠等級法術
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDisguiseSe]
5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplRopeTrick0]
9@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFear000000]
13@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGreaterInv]{高等隱形術}
17@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSeeming000]{偽裝術}

Foundry Note

法術會隨著你升級時自動獲得。

Glorious Defense.name: Glorious Defense
Glorious Defense.description:
You can turn defense into a sudden strike. When you or another creature you can see within 10 feet of you is hit by an attack roll, you can take a Reaction to grant a bonus to the target’s AC against that attack, potentially causing it to miss. The bonus equals your Charisma modifier (minimum of +1). If the attack misses, you can make one attack with a weapon against the attacker as part of this Reaction if the attacker is within your weapon’s range.

You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum of once), and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

Glorious Defense.name: Glorious Defense
Glorious Defense.condition: When you or another creature you can see within 10 feet of you is hit by an attack roll

Goading Attack.name: Goading Attack
Goading Attack.description:
When you hit a creature with an attack roll, you can expend one Superiority Die to attempt to goad the target into attacking you. Add the [[/damage @scale.battle-master.superiority.die]]{Superiority Die} to the attack's damage roll. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have Disadvantage on attack rolls against targets other than you until the end of your next turn.

Foundry Note

This feature includes activities for saving against your Strength or Dexterity. You can use the inline damage roll for the extra damage or the Damage activity.

The Damage activity allows you to select the type of damage it should deal in the roll dialog.

save.condition: When you hit a creature with an attack roll

Goaded.name: Goaded
Goaded.description: The target has Disadvantage on attack rolls against targets other than you until the end of your next turn.

Great Old One Patron.name: 舊日支配者宗主
Great Old One Patron.description:
重現不可名狀之物的禁忌傳說

當你選擇此子職業時，你便與古神，或遙遠國度那不可言說的存在聯結在了一起，其中有那受縛之神薩瑞茲頓、歸來者扎貢、烏黯之飢渴哈達或偉大克蘇魯。不過你也有可能並沒有束縛在單一存在上，而是攀附了許多實體。祂們的動機凡人難以理解，甚至這些舊日支配者對你的存在都毫不在乎，但你習得的密傳卻多多少少讓你可以從祂們身上汲取怪異的魔法。

Great Old One Spells.title: 舊日支配者法術
Great Old One Spells.hint: 你宗主的魔法確保你始終準備特定的法術，當你達到舊日支配者法術表所提及的契術師等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

Eldritch Hex.title: 駭異惡咒
Eldritch Hex.hint: 你的異界宗主賜予了你強大的詛咒能力。

Great Old One Spells.name: 舊日支配者法術
Great Old One Spells.description:
你宗主的魔法確保你始終準備特定的法術，當你達到舊日支配者法術表所提及的契術師等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

舊日支配者法術
契術師等級法術
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDetectThou]{偵測思想}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDissonantW]{噪音暗語}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbPhantasmalFor]{魅影之力}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplTashasHide]{塔莎狂笑術}
5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplClairvoyan]{銳眼術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHungerofHa]{哈達之慾}
7@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplConfusion0]{困惑術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSummonAber]{異怪召喚術}
9@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplModifyMemo]{修改記憶}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplTelekinesi]{心靈遙控}

Foundry Note

As you level up these spells will be granted to you automatically.

Greater Divine Intervention.name: Greater Divine Intervention
Greater Divine Intervention.description:
You can call on even more powerful divine intervention. When you use your Divine Intervention feature, you can choose @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplWish000000]{Wish} when you select a spell. If you do so, you can't use Divine Intervention again until you finish [[/r 2d4]] Long Rests.

Foundry Note

This feature will consume a use of your Divine Intervention but it can not automatically recharge the usage after the rolled number of Long Rests.

Greater Portent.name: Greater Portent
Greater Portent.description: The visions in your dreams intensify and paint a more accurate picture in your mind of what is to come. Roll three d20s for your Portent feature rather than two.

Guarded Mind.name: Guarded Mind
Guarded Mind.description:
You have Resistance to Psychic damage. Moreover, if you start your turn with the Charmed or Frightened condition, you can expend a Psionic Energy Die (no action required) and end every effect on yourself giving you those conditions.

Foundry Note

The Psychic Resistance is granted as you level up.

The End Effects activity can be used to consume a use of your Psionic Energy Die. It does not automatically end the effects though.

Guided Strike.name: Guided Strike
Guided Strike.description:
When you or a creature within 30 feet of you misses with an attack roll, you can expend one use of your Channel Divinity and give that roll a +10 bonus, potentially causing it to hit. When you use this feature to benefit another creature's attack roll, you must take a Reaction to do so.

Foundry Note

The Guide Yourself activity doesn't consume a reaction.

The Guide Another Creature activity does.

Guide Yourself.name: Guide Yourself
Guide Yourself.condition: When you miss with an attack roll

Guide Another Creature.name: Guide Another Creature
Guide Another Creature.condition: When you or a creature within 30 feet of you misses with an attack roll

Hand of Harm.name: 奪命之手
Hand of Harm.description: 一回合一次，當你使用徒手打擊命中一個生物並造成傷害時，可以消耗1點內力以造成等同於你一顆武藝骰加上你感知調整值的額外黯蝕傷害。

damage.condition: 每回合一次，當你以徒手打擊命中一個生物並造成傷害時

Hand of Healing.name: 予命之手
Hand of Healing.description:
作為一個魔法動作，你可以消耗1點內力來接觸一個生物，並恢復目標等同於一個你的武藝骰加上你感知調整值的生命值。

當你使用疾風連擊時，你能在不消耗氣的情況下使用此特性將一次徒手攻擊替換成治療。

Foundry Note

For the free use when replacing an Unarmed Strike uncheck the Consume Item Use prompt.

Hand of Ultimate Mercy.name: Hand of Ultimate Mercy
Hand of Ultimate Mercy.description:
Your mastery of life energy opens the door to the ultimate mercy. As a Magic action, you can touch the corpse of a creature that died within the past 24 hours and expend 5 Focus Points. The creature then returns to life with a number of Hit Points equal to 4d10 plus your Wisdom modifier. If the creature died with any of the following conditions, the creature revives with the conditions removed: Blinded, Deafened, Paralyzed, Poisoned, and Stunned.

Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

Foundry Note

This feature includes a single use per Long Rest and a healing roll.

Healing Light.name: 治癒之光
Healing Light.description:
你獲得引導天界能量以治療傷口的能力，你擁有數量等同於1加上你契術師等級的d6骰池。

作為一個附贈動作，你可以消耗骰池中任意數量的骰子，治療你自己或一個60呎內你所能看見的生物。每次消耗的骰子最大數量等同於你的魅力調整值（至少一個）。擲出你所消耗的骰子，並恢復等同於擲骰結果總和的生命值。在你完成一次長休時恢復所有已消耗的骰子。

Foundry Note

The Heal activity allows you to scale the number of dice expended from your pool and is automatically limited to your Charisma modifier.

Heightened Focus.name: 出神入化
Heightened Focus.description:
Your Flurry of Blows, Patient Defense, and Step of the Wind gain the following benefits.

Flurry of Blows. You can expend 1 Focus Point to use Flurry of Blows and make three Unarmed Strikes with it instead of two.

Patient Defense. When you expend a Focus Point to use Patient Defense, you gain a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to two rolls of your Martial Arts die.

Step of the Wind. When you expend a Focus Point to use Step of the Wind, you can choose a willing creature within 5 feet of yourself that is Large or smaller. You move the creature with you until the end of your turn. The creature's movement doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks.

Foundry Note

The Flurry of Blows activity will expend 1 Focus Point and you can then make three Unarmed Strikes.

The Patient Defense activity will roll the Temporary Hit Points for you.

Patient Defense.name: Patient Defense
Patient Defense.condition: When you expend a Focus Point to use Patient Defense

Heightened Spell.name: 升階法術
Heightened Spell.description:
消耗：2術法點

當你施放一道迫使生物進行豁免檢定的法術時，你可以消耗 2 術法點使該法術的其中一個目標在進行該法術的豁免檢定時具有劣勢。

Heightened Spell.name: 升階法術
Heightened Spell.condition: 當你施放一道迫使生物進行豁免檢定的法術時

Heroic Warrior.name: Heroic Warrior
Heroic Warrior.description: 戰鬥帶來的快感驅使你向勝利邁進。在戰鬥中，每當你回合開始時沒有英勇激勵，你可以獲得一次。

Holy Nimbus.name: Holy Nimbus
Holy Nimbus.description:
As a Bonus Action, you can imbue your Aura of Protection with holy power, granting the benefits below for 10 minutes or until you end them (no action required). Once you use this feature, you can’t use it again until you finish a Long Rest. You can also restore your use of it by expending a level 5 spell slot (no action required).

Holy Ward. You have Advantage on any saving throw you are forced to make by a Fiend or an Undead.

Radiant Damage. Whenever an enemy starts its turn in the aura, that creature takes Radiant damage equal to your Charisma modifier plus your Proficiency Bonus.

Sunlight. The aura is filled with Bright Light that is sunlight.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect for tracking your Holy Nimbus but it does not automate the Advantage on Saving Throws.

The Holy Nimbus activity includes a damage roll.

The Regain Use activity will consume a 5th level spell slot and restore a use of this feature.

Hunter.name: 獵人
Hunter.description:
守護自然與眾生不被摧毀

你在荒野和別處追蹤獵物，運用作為獵人的屬性守護自然和各地的人類遠離摧毀力量。

Hunter's Lore.name: 獵人學識
Hunter's Lore.description: 你可以召喚自然神力以顯露獵物的優勢和弱點。當生物被你的獵人印記標記時，你將知曉該生物是否擁有任何免疫、抗性或易傷，以及知曉分別是什麼。

Hunter's Prey.name: 狩者獵物
Hunter's Prey.description:
你獲得下列一項你所選擇的特性。每當你完成短休或長休時，你可以用另一項特性來替換所選特性。

【斬殺者】你強而有力的攻擊可以擊倒最強壯的對手。當你以武器命中生物時，若目標失去過任何生命值，則武器額外造成1d8傷害。你每回合只能造成一次此額外傷害。

【破陣者】你每回合一次，當你以武器進行攻擊時，你可以用同一武器對武器範圍內位於原目標5呎內的另一個此回合尚未被你攻擊過的不同生物發動一次攻擊。

Foundry Note

This feature includes a Colossus Slayer activity for the additional damage. You can select the correct damage type in the roll dialog.

For the Horde Breaker option simply make another attack.

damage.condition: 每回合一次當你以武器命中一個生物時

Hurl Through Hell.name: Hurl Through Hell
Hurl Through Hell.description:
Once per turn when you hit a creature with an attack roll, you can try to instantly transport the target through the Lower Planes. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw against your spell save DC, or the target disappears and hurtles through a nightmare landscape. The target takes 8d10 Psychic damage if it isn’t a Fiend, and it has the &Reference[Incapacitated] condition until the end of your next turn, when it returns to the space it previously occupied or the nearest unoccupied space.

Once you use this feature, you can’t use it again until you finish a Long Rest unless you expend a Pact Magic spell slot (no action required) to restore your use of it.

Foundry Note

This feature includes one limited use.

The Regain Use activity will expend a Pact Magic spell slot and restore a use of this feature.

Hurl Through Hell.name: Hurl Through Hell
Hurl Through Hell.condition: Once per turn when you hit a creature with an attack roll

Illusion Savant.name: 幻術學者
Illusion Savant.description:
從@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.6AnqLUowgdsqMFvz]{幻術學派}中選擇兩個不高於2環的法師法術（調整分組模式至「學派」以便於選擇），並將其免費抄入你的法術書。

此外，每當你在此職業獲得新環階的法術位時，你可以從幻術學派中選擇一個法師法術免費抄入你法術書。所選法術必須是你擁有的法術位環階。

Illusionist.name: 幻術師
Illusionist.description:
Weave Subtle Spells of Deception

You specialize in magic that dazzles the senses and tricks the mind, and the illusions you craft make the impossible seem real.

Phantasmal Creatures.hint: You always have the Summon Beast and Summon Fey spells prepared.
Phantasmal Creatures.title: Phantasmal Creatures

Illusory Reality.name: 亦真亦幻
Illusory Reality.description: You have learned to weave shadow magic into your illusions to give them a semi-reality. When you cast an Illusion spell with a spell slot, you can choose one inanimate, nonmagical object that is part of the illusion and make that object real. You can do this on your turn as a Bonus Action while the spell is ongoing. The object remains real for 1 minute, during which it can’t deal damage or give any conditions. For example, you can create an illusion of a bridge over a chasm and then make it real and cross it.

Illusory Self.name: Illusory Self
Illusory Self.description:
When a creature hits you with an attack roll, you can take a Reaction to interpose an illusory duplicate of yourself between the attacker and yourself. The attack automatically misses you, then the illusion dissipates.

Once you use this feature, you can’t use it again until you finish a Short or Long Rest. You can also restore your use of it by expending a level 2+ spell slot (no action required).

Interpose.condition: When a creature hits you with an attack roll
Interpose.name: Interpose

Implements of Mercy.name: 命流之器
Implements of Mercy.description:
你獲得洞悉和醫藥技能的熟練，以及草藥工具的熟練。

Foundry Note

These proficiencies are granted automatically as you level up.

Improved Blessed Strikes.name: Improved Blessed Strikes
Improved Blessed Strikes.description:
The option you chose for Blessed Strikes grows more powerful.

Divine Strike. The extra damage of your Divine Strike increases to 2d8.

Potent Spellcasting. When you cast a Cleric cantrip and deal damage to a creature with it, you can give vitality to yourself or another creature within 60 feet of yourself, granting a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to twice your Wisdom modifier.

Foundry Note

If you chose Divine Strike the damage is automatically increased. If you chose Potent Spellcasting you can use the Potent Spellcasting activity on this feature.

Potent Spellcasting: Heal.name: Potent Spellcasting: Heal
Potent Spellcasting: Heal.condition: When you cast a Cleric cantrip and deal damage to a creature with it

Improved Brutal Strike.name: Improved Brutal Strike
Improved Brutal Strike.description:
You have honed new ways to attack furiously. The following effects are now among your Brutal Strike options.

Staggering Blow. The target has Disadvantage on the next saving throw it makes, and it can't make Opportunity Attacks until the start of your next turn.

Sundering Blow. Before the start of your next turn, the next attack roll made by another creature against the target gains a +5 bonus to the roll. An attack roll can gain only one Sundering Blow bonus.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an activity for each option which includes an Active Effect for tracking the Staggering and Sundering Blows but does not automate their effects.

Staggered.name: Staggered
Staggered.description: Hit by a staggering blow, this character has Disadvantage on the next Saving Throw it makes, and it can't make Opportunity Attacks until the start of the attacker's next turn.

Sundered.name: Sundered
Sundered.description: Hit by a sundering blow, the next attack roll made by another creature against the target gains a +5 bonus to the roll.

Improved Brutal Strike (2).name: Improved Brutal Strike (2)
Improved Brutal Strike (2).description:
The extra damage of your Brutal Strike increases to 2d10. In addition, you can use two different Brutal Strike effects whenever you use your Brutal Strike feature.

Foundry Note

The damage roll in Brutal Strike will automatically scale to use this new value.

Improved Circle Forms.name: Improved Circle Forms
Improved Circle Forms.description:
While in a Wild Shape form, you gain the following benefits.

Lunar Radiance. Each of your attacks in a Wild Shape form can deal its normal damage type or Radiant damage. You make this choice each time you hit with those attacks.

Increased Toughness. You can add your Wisdom modifier to your Constitution saving throws.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which automates the bonus to Constitution saving throws.

Improved Critical.name: Improved Critical
Improved Critical.description:
你在武器與徒手打擊所進行攻擊檢定的d20中擲出19或20時造成暴擊。

Foundry Note

This feature automatically increases the Critical Hit threshold to 19.

Improved Cunning Strike.name: Improved Cunning Strike
Improved Cunning Strike.description:
You can use up to two Cunning Strike effects when you deal Sneak Attack damage, paying the die cost for each effect.

Foundry Note

After using Cunning Strike effects use the [[/item Cunning Strike activity=Cunning Sneak Attack]]{Cunning Sneak Attack} activity. It will prompt you to select how many dice you expended on effects and deduct them from your Sneak Attack roll automatically.

You can control the damage type in the damage roll dialog box.

Improved Duplicity.name: Improved Duplicity
Improved Duplicity.description:
The illusion of your Invoke Duplicity has grown more powerful in the following ways.

Shared Distraction. When you and your allies make attack rolls against a creature within 5 feet of the illusion, the attack rolls have Advantage.

Healing Illusion. When the illusion ends, you or a creature of your choice within 5 feet of it regains a number of Hit Points equal to your Cleric level.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an activity for the Healing Illusion but it does not automate the advantage against creatures within 5 feet of the illusion.

Improved Elemental Fury.name: Improved Elemental Fury
Improved Elemental Fury.description:
The option you chose for Elemental Fury grows more powerful, as detailed below.

Potent Spellcasting. When you cast a Druid cantrip with a range of 10 feet or greater, the spell's range increases by 300 feet.

Primal Strike. The extra damage of your Primal Strike increases to 2d8.

Foundry Note

The damage for Primal Strike is automatically increased at this level. This feature does not automate the range changes.

Improved Illusions.name: Improved Illusions
Improved Illusions.description:
You can cast Illusion spells without providing Verbal components, and if an Illusion spell you cast has a range of 10+ feet, the range increases by 60 feet.

You also know the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMinorIllus]{Minor Illusion} cantrip. If you already know it, you learn a different Wizard cantrip of your choice. The cantrip doesn’t count against your number of cantrips known. You can create both a sound and an image with a single casting of Minor Illusion, and you can cast it as a Bonus Action.

Foundry Note

The Minor Illusion cantrip is added to your sheet as you level up.

Improved Shadow Step.name: Improved Shadow Step
Improved Shadow Step.description:
You can draw on your Shadowfell connection to empower your teleportation. When you use your Shadow Step, you can expend 1 Focus Point to remove the requirement that you must start and end in Dim Light or Darkness for that use of the feature. As part of this Bonus Action, you can make an Unarmed Strike immediately after you teleport.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an activity which will expend a Focus Point.

Improved War Magic.name: Improved War Magic
Improved War Magic.description: 當你在自己回合內採取攻擊動作時，你可以施放一道施法時間為動作的1環或2環的法師法術，以此替代動作中的兩次攻擊。

Improved Warding Flare.name: 精通守護閃光
Improved Warding Flare.description:
當你完成一次短休或長休時，重獲所有已消耗的守護閃光使用次數。

此外，每當你使用守護閃光時，你可以給予被攻擊的目標提供數量等同於2d6 + 你感知調整值的臨時生命值。

Foundry Note

此特性不會自動將守護光輝更新為短休恢復。你需編輯該項目並將恢復期設為短休。

治療行動包含臨時生命值恢復效果。

Indomitable.name: Indomitable
Indomitable.description:
若你豁免檢定失敗，則你可以重擲並加上等同於你戰士等級（當前[[lookup @classes.fighter.levels]]級）的額外加值。你必須使用重擲的結果，且直到你完成長休前無法再次使用此特性。

當你到達 13 級時，你能夠在長休前使用此特性兩次，到達 17 級時三次。

Foundry Note

This feature's maximum usages scale automatically as you level up.

Indomitable Might.name: Indomitable Might
Indomitable Might.description: If your total for a Strength check or Strength saving throw is less than your Strength score, you can use that score in place of the total.

Infiltration Expertise.name: Infiltration Expertise
Infiltration Expertise.description:
You are expert at the following techniques that aid your infiltrations.

Masterful Mimicry. You can unerringly mimic another person’s speech, handwriting, or both if you have spent at least 1 hour studying them.

Roving Aim. Your Speed isn’t reduced to 0 by using Steady Aim.

Innate Sorcery.name: 天生術法
Innate Sorcery.description:
某個奇怪事件在你身上留下了無法磨滅的印記，為你注入了湧動的魔力。作為附贈動作，你可以釋放該魔力，持續1分鐘。在此期間你獲得下列好處：

  • 你的術士法術的法術豁免DC提升1。
  • 你施放術士法術進行的攻擊檢定具有優勢。

你可以使用此特性兩次，並在你完成長休時重獲所有已消耗的使用次數。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which will increase your spell save DC. The Advantage on attack rolls is not automated.

Innate Sorcery.name: Innate Sorcery
Innate Sorcery.description:
你的術士法術的法術豁免DC提升1。（自動附加）

你施放術士法術進行的攻擊檢定具有優勢。（非自動附加）

Inspiring Movement.name: Inspiring Movement
Inspiring Movement.description:
When an enemy you can see ends its turn within 5 feet of you, you can take a Reaction and expend one use of your Bardic Inspiration to move up to half your Speed (currently [[lookup @attributes.movement.walk]]). Then one ally of your choice within 30 feet of you can also move up to half their Speed using their Reaction.

None of this feature's movement provokes Opportunity Attacks.

Move.name: 移動
Move.condition: When an enemy you can see ends it turns within 5 feet o fyou

Inspiring Smite.name: Inspiring Smite
Inspiring Smite.description: 緊接在你施放@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDivineSmit]後，你可以消耗一次引導神力，並將臨時生命值分配給你自身30呎內你所選擇的生物（可以包括你自身）。臨時生命值的總值等同於2d8 + 你的聖騎士等級，由你隨意為所選生物分配臨時生命值。

heal.condition: Immediately after you cast Divine Smite

Instinctive Pounce.name: Instinctive Pounce
Instinctive Pounce.description: As part of the Bonus Action you take to enter your Rage, you can move up to half your Speed.

Intimidating Presence.name: Intimidating Presence
Intimidating Presence.description:
As a Bonus Action, you can strike terror into others with your menacing presence and primal power. When you do so, each creature of your choice in a 30-foot Emanation originating from you must make a Wisdom saving throw (DC 8 plus your Strength modifier and Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, a creature has the Frightened condition for 1 minute. At the end of each of the &Reference[Frightened] creature's turns, the creature repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest unless you expend a use of your Rage (no action required) to restore your use of it.

Foundry Note

The Save activity includes an Active Effect which adds the Frightened condition.

The Recharge activity consumes a use of Rage and recharges your use of Intimidating Presence.

Investment of the Chain Master.name: Investment of the Chain Master
Investment of the Chain Master.description:
先決條件：Level 5+ Warlock, @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.classes.Item.phbinvPactChain0]{Pact of the Chain} Invocation

When you cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFindFamili]{Find Familiar}, you infuse the summoned familiar with a measure of your eldritch power, granting the creature the following benefits.

Aerial or Aquatic. The familiar gains either a Fly Speed or a Swim Speed (your choice) of 40 feet.

Quick Attack. As a Bonus Action, you can command the familiar to take the Attack action.

Necrotic or Radiant Damage. Whenever the familiar deals Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage, you can make it deal Necrotic or Radiant damage instead.

Your Save DC. If the familiar forces a creature to make a saving throw, it uses your spell save DC.

Resistance. When the familiar takes damage, you can take a Reaction to grant it Resistance against that damage.

Foundry Note

The Find Familiar with Flight and with Swimming activities both allow you to summon a familiar with the relevant movement bonus. Both activities consume a Pact Magic spell slot.

The Invest with Resistance activity includes an Active Effect for resisting each type of damage which can be applied to get the relevant resistance. Be sure you disable/delete the previous Active Effect in the "Effects" tab of your sheet when you change Resistances.

The familiar automatically uses your Save DC.

Invoke Duplicity.name: Invoke Duplicity
Invoke Duplicity.description:
As a Bonus Action, you can expend one use of your Channel Divinity to create a perfect visual illusion of yourself in an unoccupied space you can see within 30 feet of yourself. The illusion is intangible and doesn't occupy its space. It lasts for 1 minute, but it ends early if you dismiss it (no action required) or have the &Reference[Incapacitated] condition. The illusion is animated and mimics your expressions and gestures. While it persists, you gain the following benefits.

Cast Spells. You can cast spells as though you were in the illusion's space, but you must use your own senses.

Distract. When both you and your illusion are within 5 feet of a creature that can see the illusion, you have Advantage on attack rolls against that creature, given how distracting the illusion is to the target.

Move. As a Bonus Action, you can move the illusion up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see that is within 120 feet of yourself.

Iron Mind.name: Iron Mind
Iron Mind.description:
You have honed your ability to resist mind-altering powers. You gain proficiency in Wisdom saving throws. If you already have this proficiency, you instead gain proficiency in Intelligence or Charisma saving throws (your choice).

Foundry Note

When you gain this feature during advancement you will be prompted to choose your Saving Throw. You should select Wisdom unless you are already proficient in it.

Jack of All Trades.name: 全能高手
Jack of All Trades.description:
你可以將你熟練加值的一半（向下取整）加入任何你尚未加入熟練加值的屬性檢定中。

舉例來說，若你進行力量（運動）檢定，且尚未熟練運動，你可以將熟練加值的一半加入檢定。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which will automatically grant you half proficiency for all skills which you aren't currently proficient in.

Know Your Enemy.name: Know Your Enemy
Know Your Enemy.description:
As a Bonus Action, you can discern certain strengths and weaknesses of a creature you can see within 30 feet of yourself; you know whether that creature has any Immunities, Resistances, or Vulnerabilities, and if the creature has any, you know what they are.

Once you use this feature, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest. You can also restore a use of the feature by expending one Superiority Die (no action required).

Foundry Note

This feature includes an activity for discerning the strengths and weaknesses and a recharge activity for restoring a use of this feature.

Land's Aid.name: Land's Aid
Land's Aid.description:
作為魔法動作，你可以消耗一次荒野形態次數並選擇你自身60呎內的一點，該點半徑10呎的球型區域內將生長出錦簇的鮮花與渴血的荊棘。球形區域內的每個你所選擇的生物必須通過一次你法術豁免DC的體質豁免檢定，豁免失敗承受2d6黯蝕傷害；豁免成功則傷害減半。區域內一個你所選擇的生物恢復[[/healing @scale.land.lands-aid]]{[[lookup @scale.land.lands-aid]]點生命值}。

傷害與治療會在特定等級增加1d6。當你達到德魯伊10級時3d6，14級時4d6。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an activity for the saving throw and the healing.

The healing/damage values automatically scale as you level up.

Lay on Hands.name: 聖療
Lay on Hands.description:
你的觸碰溢滿祝福，可以醫治傷口。你擁有一個每次長休後會補滿的治療能量池。能量池可恢復生命值的總數等於你聖騎士等級的五倍。能量池可以恢復生命值的總數等同於你聖騎士等級的五倍。

作為附贈動作，你可以觸碰一個生物（可以是你自己）並汲取治療池中的能量來恢復該生物的生命值，其恢復量至多等同於你治療能量池中所剩餘的治療量。

你也可以消耗治療能量池的5點治療量以移除生物的中毒狀態，但這些治療量不會恢復生物的生命值。

Foundry Note

The Heal activity allows you to select the number of Hit Points you would like to restore and reduces your Lay on Hands pool by that amount.

The Remove Poison activity reduces your pool by 5 but does not automatically remove the Poisoned condition.

Leading Evasion.name: Leading Evasion
Leading Evasion.description:
When you are subjected to an effect that allows you to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, you instead take no damage if you succeed on the saving throw and only half damage if you fail. If any creatures within 5 feet of you are making the same Dexterity saving throw, you can share this benefit with them for that save.

You can't use this feature if you have the &Reference[Incapacitated] condition.

Lessons of the First Ones.name: 初代的教誨
Lessons of the First Ones.description:
先決條件：契術師等級2以上

你獲得來自多元宇宙中一位古老存在的知識，令你獲得一個你所選擇的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.otAeQs0TLHYIBNuj]{起源專長}

【可複選】你可以重複選擇此祈喚，但每次你都必須選擇不同的起源專長。

Life Domain.name: 生命領域
Life Domain.description:
Soothe the Hurts of the World

The Life Domain focuses on the positive energy that helps sustain all life in the multiverse. Clerics who tap into this domain are masters of healing, using that life force to cure many hurts.

Existence itself relies on the positive energy associated with this domain, so a Cleric of almost any religious tradition might choose it. This domain is particularly associated with agricultural deities, gods of healing or endurance, and gods of home and community. Religious orders of healing also seek the magic of this domain.

Life Domain Spells.name: 生命領域法術
Life Domain Spells.description:
你與此神聖領域的連結保證你始終準備特定法術。當你達到生命領域法術列表上指定的牧師等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

生命領域法術
牧師等級準備法術
3

@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplAid0000000]{援助術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplBless00000]{祝福術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCureWounds]{治療傷勢},
@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplLesserRest]{次級復原術}

5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMassHealin]{Mass Healing Word}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplRevivify00]{回生術}
7@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplAuraofLife]{Aura of Life}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDeathWard0]{Death Ward}
9@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGreaterRes]{高等復原術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMassCureWo]{群體治療傷勢}

Foundry Note

These spells are granted automatically as you advance.

Lifedrinker.name: Lifedrinker
Lifedrinker.description:
先決條件：Level 9+ Warlock, @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.classes.Item.phbinvPactBlade0]{Pact of the Blade} Invocation

Once per turn when you hit a creature with your pact weapon, you can deal an extra 1d6 Necrotic, Psychic, or Radiant damage (your choice) to the creature, and you can expend one of your Hit Point Dice to roll it and regain a number of Hit Points equal to the roll plus your Constitution modifier (minimum of 1 Hit Point).

Foundry Note

The Damage activity allows you to choose the type of damage in the roll's dialog. It will remember your choice going forward.

The Heal (Largest Hit Die) and Smallest Hit Die activities expends the relevant Hit Die and provides a healing roll with your Constitution modifier included. Which you choose only matters if you are multi-classed with multiple hit die types.

damage.condition: Once per turn when you hit a creature with your pact weapon

Heal (Largest Hit Die).name: Heal (Largest Hit Die)
Heal (Largest Hit Die).condition: Once per turn when you hit a creature with your pact weapon

Heal (Smallest Hit Die).name: Heal (Smallest Hit Die)
Heal (Smallest Hit Die).condition: Once per turn when you hit a creature with your pact weapon

Light Domain.name: 光明領域
Light Domain.description:
帶來光明，驅散黑暗

光明領域致力於以神聖的力量帶來烈焰與啟示。踏入這一領域的牧師，其靈魂被注入了來自神明的光輝與洞察力，他們肩負驅散虛偽與燃燒黑暗的使命。

光明領域與掌管真理，警覺，美麗，洞察與革新的神明相關聯。其通常的象徵為太陽。某些這類的神會被描繪為太陽本身，或是駕著戰車引領太陽劃過天際的存在。還有一些則是不懈的哨兵之眼，時刻洞穿每一片陰影與詭計。而其中某些美與才藝的教義還會詮釋藝術即靈魂晉升容器的理念。

Light Domain Spells.name: 光明領域法術
Light Domain Spells.description:
你與此神聖領域的連結保證你始終準備特定法術。當你達到光明領域法術列表上指定的牧師等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

光明領域法術
牧師等級準備法術
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplBurningHan]{燃燒之手}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFaerieFire]{妖火術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplScorchingR]{灼熱射線}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSeeInvisib]{See Invisibility}
5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDaylight00]{晝明術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFireball00]{火球術}
7@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplArcaneEye0]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplWallofFire]{火牆術}
9@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFlameStrik]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplScrying000

Foundry Note

這些法術將在你升級時自動獲得。

Living Legend.name: Living Legend
Living Legend.description:
You can empower yourself with the legends—whether true or exaggerated—of your great deeds. As a Bonus Action, you gain the benefits below for 10 minutes. Once you use this feature, you can’t use it again until you finish a Long Rest. You can also restore your use of it by expending a level 5 spell slot (no action required).

Charismatic. You are blessed with an otherworldly presence and have Advantage on all Charisma checks.

Saving Throw Reroll. If you fail a saving throw, you can take a Reaction to reroll it. You must use this new roll.

Unerring Strike. Once on each of your turns when you make an attack roll with a weapon and miss, you can cause that attack to hit instead.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which can be used for tracking but the above benefits are not automated.

The Reroll Saving Throw activity is just for tracking Reaction use.

The Restore Use activity can be used to consume a 5th level slot and restore a use of this feature.

Lunar Form.name: Lunar Form
Lunar Form.description:
The power of the moon suffuses you, granting you the following benefits.

Improved Lunar Radiance. Once per turn, you can deal an extra 2d10 Radiant damage to a target you hit with a Wild Shape form's attack.

Shared Moonlight. Whenever you use Moonlight Step, you can also teleport one willing creature. That creature must be within 10 feet of you, and you teleport it to an unoccupied space you can see within 10 feet of your destination space.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an activity for dealing the Radiant damage.

damage.condition: 每回合一次，當你以荒野型態的攻擊命中目標時

Lunging Attack.name: Lunging Attack
Lunging Attack.description:
As a Bonus Action, you can expend one Superiority Die and take the Dash action. If you move at least 5 feet in a straight line immediately before hitting with a melee attack as part of the Attack action on this turn, you can add the Superiority Die to the attack's damage roll.

Foundry Note

The Damage activity allows you to select the type of damage it should deal in the roll dialog.

Mage Hand Legerdemain.name: 法師之手花招
Mage Hand Legerdemain.description: 你能以附贈動作施放法師之手，並且可以使幽靈手隱形。你能以附贈動作控制法師之手，並且你可以透過法師之手來進行[[/skill slt]]檢定。

Magical Ambush.name: Magical Ambush
Magical Ambush.description: If you have the &Reference[Invisible]{隱形} condition when you cast a spell on a creature, it has Disadvantage on any saving throw it makes against the spell on the same turn.

Magical Cunning.name: 魔法機靈
Magical Cunning.description:
你可以舉行一場耗時1分鐘的秘傳儀式，並在儀式結束後恢復等同於你契約魔法最大法術位一半（向上取整）的法術位。一旦你使用此特性，直到你完成一次長休前無法再次使用。

Foundry Note

This feature includes one free use and will restore the correct number of Pact Magic spell slots.

Magical Discoveries.name: Magical Discoveries
Magical Discoveries.description:
你習得兩種你所選擇的法術。這些法術可以從@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.SkHptN2PTzFGDaEj]{牧師}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.LhvuDQEyrCdg5EfU]{德魯伊}或@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.6AnqLUowgdsqMFvz]{法師}法術列表中選擇，或上述列表的任意組合。你所選擇的法術必須是戲法或你擁有環位的法術，參見@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbBard000000000.JournalEntryPage.V8pqIWlaL9GhY61t#equipment]{吟遊詩人特性}表。

你始終準備所選法術，且每當你獲得一個吟遊詩人等級，你可以將一個法術替換成另一個滿足條件的法術。

Magical Secrets.name: Magical Secrets
Magical Secrets.description: 你從各種魔法典籍中習得了大量祕法知識。每當你獲得一個吟遊詩人等級（包括此等級），且吟遊詩人特性表中準備法術數量提升時，你可以從 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.wwia6Wwo4BgE9GSI]{吟遊詩人}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.SkHptN2PTzFGDaEj]{牧師}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.LhvuDQEyrCdg5EfU]{德魯伊}、 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.6AnqLUowgdsqMFvz]{法師}法術列表中選擇任何一個新的準備法術，所選法術對你而言視為吟遊詩人法術。此外，每當你為此職業替換準備法術時，你可以從上述那些法術列表中替換。

Maneuvering Attack.name: Maneuvering Attack
Maneuvering Attack.description: When you hit a creature with an attack roll, you can expend one Superiority Die to maneuver one of your comrades into another position. Add the Superiority Die roll to the attack's damage roll, and choose a willing creature who can see or hear you. That creature can use its Reaction to move up to half its Speed without provoking an Opportunity Attack from the target of your attack.

Maneuver.name: Maneuver
Maneuver.condition: When you hit a creature with an attack roll

Manipulate Elements.name: 操控四象
Manipulate Elements.description:
你知曉@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplElementali]{四象法門}法術，感知是你的施法屬性。

Foundry Note

When you reach this level the Elementalism spell will be added to your sheet with Wisdom as your spellcasting ability.

Mantle of Inspiration.name: Mantle of Inspiration
Mantle of Inspiration.description: 你用編織入妖精魔法的歌曲或舞蹈來激發他人的活力。作為附贈動作，你可以消耗一次吟遊激勵，並擲出吟遊激勵骰。當你這麼做時，選擇60呎以內數量等同於你魅力調整值的其他生物（最少1個，目前可選[[lookup @abilities.cha.mod]]個）。每個所選生物獲得等同於吟遊激勵骰結果2倍的臨時生命，接著每個生物可以使用其反應移動最多等同於其速度的距離，且不觸發藉機攻擊。

Mantle of Majesty.name: Mantle of Majesty
Mantle of Majesty.description:
You always have the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCommand000]{命令術} spell prepared.

As a Bonus Action, you cast Command without expending a spell slot, and you take on an unearthly appearance for 1 minute or until your Concentration ends. During this time, you can cast Command as a Bonus Action without expending a spell slot.

Any creature &Reference[Charmed] by you automatically fails its saving throw against the Command you cast with this feature.

Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest. You can also restore your use of it by expending a level 3+ spell slot (no action required).

Foundry Note

The Restore with Spell Slot activity grants an additional use of this feature.

The spells are automatically added to your sheet as Always Prepared.

Martial Arts.name: 武藝
Martial Arts.description:
你的武術訓練讓你掌握了使用徒手打擊和武僧武器的作戰方式，而武僧武器包括下列類型：

  • 簡易近戰武器
  • 具有輕型屬性的軍用近戰武器

當你徒手或僅使用武僧武器，並且未著裝護甲或持盾時，你獲得下列好處。

【額外徒手打擊】你能以附贈動作進行一次徒手打擊

【武藝骰】你可以使用1d6代替你徒手打擊和武僧武器的正常傷害。此傷害骰會在你達到特定的武僧等級後增加，如武僧特性表中的武藝一欄所示。

當前武藝骰：[[lookup @scale.monk.die]]

【敏捷攻擊】你可以使用敏捷調整值而非力量調整值進行徒手打擊和武僧武器的攻擊和傷害骰。此外，當你使用徒手打擊的推撞或擒抱選項時，你也可以使用敏捷調整值代替力量調整值來計算豁免DC。

Foundry Note

This feature includes activities for enchanting a weapon which adds a Monk Attack activity to it that integrates the changes mentioned above.

Master Light Martial Weapon.name: 武僧武器（輕型軍用武器）

Martial Training.name: Martial Training
Martial Training.description:
你獲得軍用武器的熟練，且獲得中甲和盾牌的訓練。

此外，你可以使用簡易或軍用武器作為施法法器從@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.wwia6Wwo4BgE9GSI]{吟遊詩人法術列表}中施放法術。

Foundry Note

You are automatically granted proficiency with Martial weapons and training with Medium armor and shields during advancement.

Mask of Many Faces.name: 千面之臉
Mask of Many Faces.description:
先決條件：契術師等級2以上

你可以不消耗任何法術位施放@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDisguiseSe]{易容術}。

Foundry Note

The Cast activity can be used in-place of Disguise Self and includes an Active Effect for tracking when you are disguised.

Disguised.name: Disguised
Disguised.description: To discern that you are disguised, a creature must take the Study action to inspect your appearance and succeed on an [[/check ability=int skill=inv]] check against your spell save DC.

Master of Myriad Forms.name: Master of Myriad Forms
Master of Myriad Forms.description:
先決條件：Level 5+ Warlock

You can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplAlterSelf0]{Alter Self} without expending a spell slot.

Foundry Note

This feature includes Alter Self's activities.

The Aquatic Adaptation, Change Appearance, and Natural Weapons activities include Active Effects for tracking your choice and require Concentration.

The Attack activities can be used for your attack/damage rolls when you choose the Natural Weapons option.

Natural Weapon.name: Natural Weapon
Natural Weapon.description: When you use your Unarmed Strike to deal damage with that new growth, it deals 1d6 damage of the type in parentheses instead of dealing the normal damage for your Unarmed Strike, and you use your spellcasting ability modifier for the attack and damage rolls rather than using Strength.

Aquatic Adaptation.name: Aquatic Adaptation
Aquatic Adaptation.description: You can breathe underwater and gain a Swim Speed equal to your Speed.

Memorize Spell.name: Memorize Spell
Memorize Spell.description: 每檔你完成一次短休時，你可以研讀你的法術書，將你以施法特性準備的1環以上法師法術替換為另一個書中的1環以上法術。

Menacing Attack.name: Menacing Attack
Menacing Attack.description:
When you hit a creature with an attack roll, you can expend one Superiority Die to attempt to frighten the target. Add the Superiority Die to the attack's damage roll. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the Frightened condition until the end of your next turn.

Foundry Note

This feature includes a Strength Save activity and a Dexterity Save activity which will consume a use of your Superiority Die.

The Damage activity allows you to select the type of damage it should deal in the roll dialog.

save.condition: When you hit a creature with an attack roll

Metamagic.name: 超魔法
Metamagic.description:
由於你的魔法源自體內流動，你可以修改你的法術以適應自己的需求。你獲得2個超魔法選項中你所選擇的超魔法選項。你使用你所選的超魔法來臨時改變你施放的法術。當使用一個超魔法選項時，你必須消耗其描述中需求的術法點。

當你施放法術時，你只能使用一次超魔法選項，除非超魔法選項中另有說明。

每當你獲得術士等級時，你可以將一個超魔法選項替換為一個你不知道的超魔法選項。當你的術士等級達到10和17時，你可以分別再獲得兩個超魔法選項。

Foundry Note

You will be prompted to choose Metamagic options as you level up.

Mindless Rage.name: Mindless Rage
Mindless Rage.description:
You have Immunity to the &Reference[Charmed] and &Reference[Frightened] conditions while your Rage is active. If you're Charmed or Frightened when you enter your Rage, the condition ends on you.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which grants the Charmed and Frightened condition immunity. It is not applied automatically when you begin your Rage though.

Misty Escape.name: Misty Escape
Misty Escape.description:
You can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMistyStep0]{迷蹤步} as a Reaction in response to taking damage.

In addition, the following effects are now among your Steps of the Fey options.

Disappearing Step. You have the &Reference[Invisible]{隱形} condition until the start of your next turn or until immediately after you make an attack roll, deal damage, or cast a spell.

Dreadful Step. Creatures within 5 feet of the space you left or the space you appear in (your choice) must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw against your spell save DC or take 2d10 Psychic damage.

Foundry Note

The Disappearing Step activity includes an Active Effect which applies the Invisible condition.

The spell is granted to you automatically as you level up.

Misty Visions.name: 迷霧幻影
Misty Visions.description:
先決條件：契術師等級2以上

你可以不消耗法術位施放@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSilentImag]{無聲幻影}。

Foundry Note

This feature includes Silent Image's activities and can be used in its place.

Misty Wanderer.name: Misty Wanderer
Misty Wanderer.description:
You can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMistyStep0]{迷蹤步} without expending a spell slot. You can do so a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once), and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

In addition, whenever you cast 迷蹤步, you can bring along one willing creature you can see within 5 feet of yourself. That creature teleports to an unoccupied space of your choice within 5 feet of your destination space.

Foundry Note

This feature can be used for tracking your limited uses. Then you can cast the spell normally and uncheck the "Consumption" box.

Monk.name: 武僧
Monk.description:
超凡脫俗的武術家

核心武僧特徵

關鍵屬性

敏捷和感知

生命骰

每武僧等級D8

豁免熟練

力量與敏捷

技能熟練

從特技、運動、歷史、洞悉、宗教或隱匿中選擇2項

武器熟練

簡易武器以及擁有輕型屬性的軍用武器

工具熟練

任選一種工匠工具或樂器

護甲訓練

無

起始裝備

選擇A或B： (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepSpear00000]、5把@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepDagger0000]、上述工具熟練所選擇的工匠工具或樂器、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagExplorersPa]、[[/award 11GP]]；(B) [[/award 50GP]]

武僧們靠著嚴苛的戰鬥訓練和精神修煉，令身心與多元宇宙調諧並知曉如何集中內在的力量。不同的武僧對這股力量有著不同的解讀，比如說呼吸、能量、生命力、精華或自相。在武僧的手中，這股力量時而化作迅猛狂暴的武術與戰技，時而化作精巧快速的身法與防禦。

武僧們凝聚自身的內在之力實現各種非凡之舉，甚至足以超脫自然。不論是否手持武器，他們的攻擊在如此技藝下兼具驚人的速度與力量。即使是最基本的武具在武僧手中也能化為神兵利器。

許多武僧認為持戒禁慾的生活有助於維持身心專注，以此能令自己更好地駕馭力量。也有其他武僧認為，沉浸在紛亂的世俗生活中才有助於增強他們的決心和戒律。

武僧通常將冒險視為對肉體和精神成長的考驗。他們的驅動力不僅僅是戰勝怪物和尋獲財寶，更是希望磨練自己至爐火純青。

成為武僧…

作為首級角色

  • 獲得武僧核心特徵表中的所有特徵。
  • 獲得武僧特性表中列出的 1 級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得武僧核心特徵表中的生命骰。
  • 獲得武僧特性表中列出的 1 級特性。

Monk's Focus.name: 武僧內功
Monk's Focus.description:
你的心法以及武藝的訓練，使你得以掌握自身非凡的能量，而內力點則代表著這股能量。你的武僧等級將決定你擁有多少內力點，具體內力點詳見武僧特性表。

你可以消耗內力點以增強或啟用特定的武僧特性，你一開始知曉三個這類特性：疾風連擊、堅強防禦、行步如風。能力細節詳見下方。

當你消耗1點內力時，直到你完成一次長休或短休時，該內力點都無法再使用。在完成長休或短休後，你將重獲所有已消耗的內力點。

某些使用內力點的特性需要目標進行豁免檢定。豁免DC = 8+你的感知調整值+你的熟練加值。

【疾風連擊】你可以消耗1內力點以附贈動作進行兩次徒手打擊。

【閃轉騰挪】你能以附贈動作採取撤離動作。或者，你可以消耗1內力點，以附贈動作同時採取撤離和迴避兩個動作。

【疾步如風】你能以附贈動作採取疾走動作。或者，你可以消耗1內力點，以附贈動作同時採取撤離和疾走兩個動作，且該回合內你的跳躍距離翻倍。

Foundry Note

The Flurry of Blows activity is a Bonus Action which expends a Focus Point and includes the Attack Roll and Damage for an Unarmored Strike using your Martial Arts Die which automatically scales as you level up.

The Patient Defense Bonus Action activity includes an Active Effect for tracking that you're Disengaged. The Patient Defense (Focus Point) activity expends a Focus Point and includes an Active Effect that adds the Dodging status.

The Step of the Wind Bonus Action activity expends 1 Focus Point and includes an Active Effect for tracking that you're Disengaged.

Moonlight Step.name: Moonlight Step
Moonlight Step.description:
You magically transport yourself, reappearing amid a burst of moonlight. As a Bonus Action, you teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see, and you have Advantage on the next attack roll you make before the end of this turn.

You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once), and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest. You can also regain uses by expending a level 2+ spell slot for each use you want to restore (no action required).

Foundry Note

This feature includes an activity with an Active Effect for tracking when you have Advantage but it does not automate the Advantage.

It also includes a Recharge with Spell Slot activity which can be used to convert spell slots into uses of this feature. You can select higher level slots by increasing the scale.

Mystic Arcanum.name: Mystic Arcanum
Mystic Arcanum.description:
Your patron grants you a magical secret called an arcanum. Choose one level 6 Warlock spell as this arcanum.

You can cast your arcanum spell once without expending a spell slot, and you must finish a Long Rest before you can cast it in this way again.

You gain another Warlock spell of your choice that can be cast in this way when you reach Warlock levels 13 (level 7 spell), 15 (level 8 spell), and 17 (level 9 spell). You regain all uses of your Mystic Arcanum when you finish a Long Rest.

Whenever you gain a Warlock level, you can replace one of your arcanum spells with another Warlock spell of the same level.

Natural Recovery.name: Natural Recovery
Natural Recovery.description:
You can cast one of the level 1+ spells that you have prepared from your Circle Spells feature without expending a spell slot, and you must finish a Long Rest before you do so again.

In addition, when you finish a Short Rest, you can choose expended spell slots to recover. The spell slots can have a combined level that is equal to or less than half your Druid level (round up, currently [[lookup @classes.druid.levels]]), and none of them can be level 6+. For example, if you're a level 6 Druid, you can recover up to three levels' worth of spell slots. You can recover a level 3 spell slot, a level 2 and a level 1 spell slot, or three level 1 spell slots. Once you recover spell slots with this feature, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

Foundry Note

The Cast Spell activity can be used to track its single free use.

The Recover Spell Slot activity does not automate the restoration of spell slots but can be used for tracking its own single use.

Recover Spell Slots.name: Recover Spell Slots
Recover Spell Slots.condition: When you finish a Short Rest

Nature Speaker.name: Nature Speaker
Nature Speaker.description:
You can cast the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCommunewit]{Commune with Nature} spell but only as a Ritual. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for it.

Foundry Note

The spell is granted to you as ritual-only spell and is pre-configured with Wisdom as your spellcasting modifier.

Nature's Sanctuary.name: Nature's Sanctuary
Nature's Sanctuary.description:
As a Magic action, you can expend a use of your Wild Shape and cause spectral trees and vines to appear in a 15-foot Cube on the ground within 120 feet of yourself. They last there for 1 minute or until you have the Incapacitated condition or die. You and your allies have Half Cover while in that area, and your allies gain the current Resistance of your Nature's Ward while there.

As a Bonus Action, you can move the Cube up to 60 feet to ground within 120 feet of yourself.

Foundry Note

This feature includes Active Effects for each Nature's Ward land type and adds the Half Cover status effect which automatically applies the relevant bonuses. Apply the relevant effect to your allies.

These Active Effects are not automatically added/removed to/from Actors in the designated area however.

It also includes an activity which can be used for tracking your Bonus Action usage when moving the spectral trees and vines.

Nature's Veil.name: Nature's Veil
Nature's Veil.description:
You invoke spirits of nature to magically hide yourself. As a Bonus Action, you can give yourself the Invisible condition until the end of your next turn.

You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once), and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which applies the Invisible condition.

Nature's Ward.name: Nature's Ward
Nature's Ward.description:
You are immune to the Poisoned condition, and you have Resistance to a damage type associated with your current land choice in the Circle Spells feature, as shown in the Nature's Ward table.

Nature's Ward
Land TypeResistance
AridFire
PolarCold
TemperateLightning
TropicalPoison

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect for the Poison condition immunity and an Active Effect for each land type. You can activate the Active Effect for your chosen land type.

Nature's Wrath.name: Nature's Wrath
Nature's Wrath.description:
As a Magic action, you can expend one use of your Channel Divinity to conjure spectral vines around nearby creatures. Each creature of your choice that you can see within 15 feet of yourself must succeed on a Strength saving throw or have the Restrained condition for 1 minute.
