A Restrained creature repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which applies the Restrained condition.

Oath of Devotion.name: 奉獻之誓
Oath of Devotion.description:
Uphold the Ideals of Justice and Order

The Oath of Devotion binds Paladins to the ideals of justice and order. These Paladins meet the archetype of the knight in shining armor. They hold themselves to the highest standards of conduct, and some—for better or worse—hold the rest of the world to the same standards.

Many who swear this oath are devoted to gods of law and good and use their gods’ tenets as the measure of personal devotion. Others hold angels as their ideals and incorporate images of angelic wings into their helmets or coats of arms.

These paladins share the following tenets:

  • Let your word be your promise.
  • Protect the weak and never fear to act.
  • Let your honorable deeds be an example.

Oath of Devotion Spells.name: 奉獻之誓法術
Oath of Devotion Spells.description:
The magic of your oath ensures you always have certain spells ready; when you reach a Paladin level specified in the Oath of Devotion Spells table, 你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

Oath of Devotion Spells
Paladin LevelSpells
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbEvilAndGoodPr]{Protection from Evil and Good}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplShieldofFa]{Shield of Faith}
5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplAid0000000]{援助術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplZoneofTrut]{Zone of Truth}
9@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplBeaconofHo]{Beacon of Hope}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDispelMagi]{Dispel Magic}
13@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFreedomofM]{Freedom of Movement}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGuardianof]{虔誠守衛}
17@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCommune000]{Commune}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFlameStrik]{Flame Strike}

Foundry Note

法術會隨著你升級時自動獲得。

Oath of Glory.name: 榮耀之誓
Oath of Glory.description:
Strive for the Heights of Heroism

Paladins who take the Oath of Glory believe they and their companions are destined to achieve glory through deeds of heroism. They train diligently and encourage their companions, so they’re all ready when destiny calls.

These paladins share the following tenets:

  • Endeavor to be known by your deeds.
  • Face hardships with courage.
  • Inspire others to strive for glory.

Oath of Glory Spells.name: 榮耀之誓法術
Oath of Glory Spells.description:
The magic of your oath ensures you always have certain spells ready; when you reach a Paladin level specified in the Oath of Glory Spells table, 你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

Oath of Glory Spells
Paladin LevelSpells
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGuidingBol]{光導箭}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHeroism000]{Heroism}
5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplEnhanceAbi]{Enhance Ability}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMagicWeapo]{Magic Weapon}
9@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHaste00000]{Haste}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbProtectionFro]{Protection from Energy}
13@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCompulsion]{Compulsion}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFreedomofM]{Freedom of Movement}
17@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplLegendLore]{Legend Lore}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplYolandesRe]{Yolande’s Regal Presence}

Foundry Note

法術會隨著你升級時自動獲得。

Oath of the Ancients.name: 遠古之誓
Oath of the Ancients.description:
Preserve Life and Light in the World

The Oath of the Ancients is as old as the first elves. Paladins who swear this oath cherish the light; they love the beautiful and life-giving things of the world more than any principles of honor, courage, and justice. They often adorn their armor and clothing with images of growing things—leaves, antlers, or flowers—to reflect their commitment to preserving life and light.

These paladins share the following tenets:

  • Kindle the light of hope.
  • Shelter life.
  • Delight in art and laughter.

Oath of the Ancients Spells.name: 遠古之誓法術
Oath of the Ancients Spells.description:
The magic of your oath ensures you always have certain spells ready; when you reach a Paladin level specified in the Oath of the Ancients Spells table, 你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

Oath of the Ancients
Paladin LevelSpells
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplEnsnaringS]{Ensnaring Strike}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSpeakwithA]{Speak with Animals}
5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMistyStep0]{迷蹤步}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMoonbeam00]{Moonbeam}
9@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplPlantGrowt]{植物滋長}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbProtectionFro]{Protection from Energy}
13@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplIceStorm00]{Ice Storm}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplStoneskin0]{Stoneskin}
17@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCommunewit]{Commune with Nature}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplTreeStride]{Tree Stride}

Foundry Note

法術會隨著你升級時自動獲得。

Oath of Vengeance.name: 復仇之誓
Oath of Vengeance.description:
Punish Evildoers at Any Cost

The Oath of Vengeance is a solemn commitment to punish those who have committed grievously evil acts. When evil armies slaughter helpless villagers, when a tyrant defies the will of the gods, when a thieves’ guild grows too violent, when a dragon rampages through the countryside—at times like these, paladins arise and swear an Oath of Vengeance to set right what has gone wrong.

These paladins share the following tenets:

  • Show the wicked no mercy.
  • Fight injustice and its causes.
  • Aid those harmed by injustice.

Oath of Vengeance Spells.name: 復仇之誓法術
Oath of Vengeance Spells.description:
The magic of your oath ensures you always have certain spells ready; when you reach a Paladin level specified in the Oath of Vengeance Spells table, 你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

Oath of Vengeance
Paladin LevelSpells
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplBane000000]{Bane}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHuntersMar]{Hunter’s Mark}
5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHoldPerson]{Hold Person}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMistyStep0]{迷蹤步}
9@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHaste00000]{Haste}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbProtectionFro]{Protection from Energy}
13@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplBanishment]{Banishment}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDimensionD]{Dimension Door}
17@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHoldMonste]{Hold Monster}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplScrying000]{Scrying}

Foundry Note

法術會隨著你升級時自動獲得。

Oceanic Gift.name: 大洋贈禮
Oceanic Gift.description:
Instead of manifesting the Emanation of Wrath of the Sea around yourself, you can manifest it around one willing creature within 60 feet of yourself. That creature gains all the benefits of the Emanation and uses your spell save DC and Wisdom modifier for it.

In addition, you can manifest the Emanation around both the other creature and yourself if you expend two uses of your Wild Shape instead of one when manifesting it.

Foundry Note

You can use this feature in place of Wrath of the Sea and Stormborn. It includes an activity for a single emanation or a double manifestation. It also includes the Active Effect from Stormborn which can be applied to both characters when manifesting a second emanation.

One with Shadows.name: One with Shadows
One with Shadows.description:
先決條件：Level 5+ Warlock

While you’re in an area of &Reference[Dim Light] or &Reference[Darkness]{黑暗}, you can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplInvisibili]{Invisibility} on yourself without expending a spell slot.

Foundry Note

The Cast activity can be used in place of the Invisibility spell and includes an Active Effect that sets the Invisible status effect.

Invisible.name: Invisible
Invisible.description: The spell ends early immediately after the target makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell.

Open Hand Technique.name: 散打技巧
Open Hand Technique.description:
每當你使用疾風連擊的攻擊命中一個生物時，你可以強迫其承受下列效果之一：

【慌神】目標直到你的下個回合結束前都不能做出藉機攻擊。

【推離】目標必須通過一次力量豁免，否則將被推離最多15呎。

【失衡】目標必須通過一次敏捷豁免，否則將被擊倒伏地。

Foundry Note

The Addle activity includes an Active Effect for tracking the addled target.

The Topple activity includes an Active Effect that applies the Prone status.

Topple.condition: Whenever you hit a creature with an attack granted by your Flurry of Blows
Topple.name: Topple

Addle.name: Addle
Addle.condition: Whenever you hit a creature with an attack granted by your Flurry of Blows

Push.name: Push
Push.condition: Whenever you hit a creature with an attack granted by your Flurry of Blows

Otherworldly Glamour.name: 異界魅影
Otherworldly Glamour.description:
每當你進行魅力檢定時，你都能在檢定中獲得等同於你感知調整值的加值（至少+1）。

你還將獲得這些技能中一項你所選擇的技能：欺瞞、表演或遊說。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which will automatically add the bonus to your Charisma checks.

You will be prompted to choose your proficiency as you level up.

Otherworldly Leap.name: 超凡跳躍
Otherworldly Leap.description:
先決條件：契術師等級2以上

你可以不消耗任何法術位對自己施放@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplJump000000]{跳躍術}

Foundry Note

This feature can be used in place of the Jump spell and includes an Active Effect for tracking.

Jump.name: Jump
Jump.description: Once on each of its turns until the spell ends, that creature can jump up to 30 feet by spending 10 feet of movement.

Overchannel.name: Overchannel
Overchannel.description:
You can increase the power of your spells. When you cast a Wizard spell with a spell slot of levels 1–5 that deals damage, you can deal maximum damage with that spell on the turn you cast it.

The first time you do so, you suffer no adverse effect. If you use this feature again before you finish a Long Rest, you take 2d12 Necrotic damage for each level of the spell slot immediately after you cast it. This damage ignores Resistance and Immunity.

Each time you use this feature again before finishing a Long Rest, the Necrotic damage per spell level increases by 1d12.

Foundry Note

This feature has Limited Uses to track how many times it has been used to automate the damage.

The First Use activity includes one free activity use and restores all uses of the feature.

The Second+ Use activity consumes a use and increases the damage automatically and should be used for all subsequent uses until you finish a Long Rest.

First Use.name: First Use
First Use.condition: When you cast a Wizard spell with a spell slot of levels 1-5 that deals damage

Second+ Use.name: Second+ Use
Second+ Use.condition: When you cast a Wizard spell with a spell slot of levels 1-5 that deals damage

Pact Magic.name: 契約魔法
Pact Magic.description:
通過玄妙的儀式，你與一個神秘實體簽訂了契約，獲得了魔法力量。該實體有如陰影中的呢喃，其本體更是尚不可知，但他對你的益處卻是肉眼可見的：你可以施展法術了。參見第7章的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.mh3akteBDiLegqFK]{施法規則}。以下資訊詳細說明了如何將這些規則與契術師法術結合使用。契術師法術即該職業描述後的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.sSzagq8GvYXpfmfs]{契術師法術列表}中羅列的法術。

【戲法】你知曉兩個你所選擇的契術師戲法。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplEldritchBl]和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplPrestidigi]。每當你獲得契術師等級時，你可以將一個從此特性獲得的戲法替換為另一個你所選擇的契術師戲法。

當你達到契術師4級和10級時，你將習得一個新的契術師戲法，如契術師特性表中戲法一欄所示。

當前最大戲法： [[lookup @scale.warlock.cantrips-known]]

【法術位】@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbWarlock000000.JournalEntryPage.znue6EaGDDXgeQb0#class-features]{契術師特性表}記錄了你有多少法術位以施放1–5環的契術師法術。表格中也記錄法術位對應的法術環階，且所有的法術位都屬於同一環階。當你完成短休或長休時，你重獲所有已消耗的契約魔法法術位。

例如，作為5級契術師，你擁有兩枚3環法術位。為了施展1環法術@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplWitchBolt0]，你必須消耗其中一枚法術位，將該法術作為一道3環法術施放。

【準備1環以上的法術】通過此特性施法前，你需要準備數個可用的1環以上法術所構成的準備列表。首先，選擇兩個1環契術師法術。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCharmPerso]和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHex0000000]。

當前最大準備法術：[[lookup @scale.warlock.max-prepared]]

你的準備列表上的法術數量將隨著契術師等級而增加，如契術師特性表中準備法術一欄所示。每當該數量增加時，選擇額外的契術師法術來添加到你的準備列表中，直到你準備列表上的法術數量與契術師特性表中的數量相匹配。所選法術的環階不能超過表中法術位環階一欄中你當前等級所記錄的數值。例如，當你到達6級時，你可以從1–3環的契術師法術中習得一個新的契術師法術。

若其他的契術師特性給予你始終準備的法術，則這些法術不會計入你在此特性中的準備法術數量，但是這些法術對你而言仍視為契術師法術。

【更換準備法術】每當你獲得契術師等級時，你可以將準備列表中的一個法術，替換為另一個符合準備條件的契術師法術。

【施法屬性】魅力是你施放契術師法術的施法屬性。

【施法法器】你可以使用奧術法器作為契術師法術的施法法器。

Pact of the Blade.name: 鋒刃魔契
Pact of the Blade.description:
作為附贈動作，你可以從手中召喚一把你所選擇的簡易或軍用武器—該武器即為與你聯結的契約武器，或是與你所觸碰的魔法武器建立聯結。你無法與已被其他契術師聯結或已被他人同調的魔法武器建立聯結。直到聯結終止前，你擁有該武器的熟練，並可以將其作為施法法器。

每當你以聯結武器進行攻擊，你可以使用魅力調整值代替力量或敏捷進行攻擊和傷害擲骰，並且你可以使武器造成黯蝕、心靈、光耀傷害，或是武器原本的傷害類型。

若你再次使用此特性的附贈動作，或武器距離你5呎以上超過1分鐘，或你死亡時，則你與武器的聯結終止。召喚的武器在聯結終止時消失。

Pact of the Chain.name: 鎖鏈魔契
Pact of the Chain.description:
你習得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFindFamili]法術，且可以不消耗任何法術位以魔法動作施放該法術。

當你施放該法術，你為魔寵選擇一種正常型態或是下列一種特殊形態：@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobImp0000000]{小魔鬼}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobPseudodrag]{偽龍}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobQuasit0000]{誇塞魔}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobSkeleton00]{骷髏}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobSlaadTadpo]{史拉蟾蝌蚪}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobSphinxofWo]{神奇斯芬克斯}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobSprite0000]{小妖精}或@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobVenomousSn]{毒蛇}.

此外，當你採取攻擊動作時，你可以放棄你自己攻擊中的其中一次，轉而讓你的魔寵以其反應進行一次攻擊。

Foundry Note

The Summon Familiar activity includes the normal summoning options and the Summon Familiar (Expanded Options) activity includes the additional options.

Pact of the Tome.name: 書卷魔契
Pact of the Tome.description:
將暗影絲線縫合拼接，你將一本書於短休或長休結束後召喚至手中。這本@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.classes.Item.phbwlkBookOfShad]{影之書}（其外形由你決定）中的神秘魔法僅有你可以使用，給予你以下好處。這本書會在你通過該特性召喚另一本書或你死亡時消失。

【戲法和儀式】當這本書出現時，選擇三個戲法和兩個帶有儀式標籤的一環法術。這些法術可以來自任意職業的法術列表，且必須是你尚未準備的法術。只要這本書在你身上，你將準備著所有所選法術，且這些法術對你而言視為契術師法術。

【施法法器】你可以使用這本書作為施法法器。

Paladin.name: 聖騎士
Paladin.description:
立下神聖誓言的虔誠戰士

核心聖騎士特徵

關鍵屬性

力量和魅力

生命骰

每聖騎士等級D10

豁免熟練

感知與魅力

技能熟練

從運動、洞悉、威嚇、醫藥、遊說、宗教中選擇2項

武器熟練

簡易和軍用武器

護甲訓練

輕甲、中甲、重甲、盾牌

起始裝備

選擇A或B： (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmChainMail0]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmShield0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepLongsword0]、6把@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepJavelin000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagHolySymbolV]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagPriestsPack]、[[/award 9GP]]；(B) [[/award 150GP]]

聖騎士們在各自誓言的驅使下團結一致對抗邪惡勢力。他們也許是在神壇前由祭司見證宣誓，或在林中聖地向自然精魄許下承諾，又或是面臨絕望與災難卻只在死者的見證下立約，所有這些聖騎士誓言都是極強的契約。也正是誓言的偉力才讓一名虔誠的戰士化作身負祝福的勇者。

聖騎士經年累月苦練戰鬥技藝，並精通各種武器與護甲。即便如此，其武力的重要性也僅次於其行使的魔法力量。他們以之治療傷患，斬殺妄邪，守護清白者和所有為公義而戰的同伴。

聖騎士的存在本身即決定了其為冒險而生，這種生活會一直持續直至傷重無法繼續，否則他們總是會站在宇宙善惡大戰的最前線，與邪惡殊死搏鬥。在俗世中，真正能受到感召成為聖騎士的人，遠比民兵團或正規軍中可謂之戰士者要更為罕見。而這些勇士們受到感召時，都將放棄所擁有的身份地位，義無反顧投入與邪惡對抗的戰鬥之中。

成為聖騎士…

作為首級角色

  • 獲得聖騎士核心特徵表中的所有特徵。
  • 獲得聖騎士特性表中列出的1級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得下列聖騎士核心特徵表中的特徵：生命骰，軍用武器熟練，以及輕甲、中甲和盾牌訓練
  • 獲得聖騎士特性表中列出的1級特性。請參閱第 2 章的兼職規則來確定可用的法術位。

打破誓言

聖騎士堅持著最高的道德行為標準，但即使最虔誠的人也會犯錯。聖騎士有時也會違背誓言。

違背誓言的聖騎士常會通宵守夜或禁戒飲食，以這種方式進行懺悔。在寬恕儀式之後，聖騎士將重新啟程。

若你的聖騎士對違背誓言並無悔意，那麼請與你的 DM 討論。你的聖騎士也許應該選擇更合適的子職業，甚至放棄該職業去選用另一個職業。

Paladin's Smite.name: 聖騎士斬技
Paladin's Smite.description:
你始終準備@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDivineSmit]{至聖斬}法術。此外，你可以不消耗法術位施放該法術，一旦這麼做，你必須完成一次長休才能再次施放。

Foundry Note

When you reach this level the Divine Smite spell is added to your spells as Always Prepared and with a free use.

Parry.name: Parry
Parry.description:
When another creature damages you with a melee attack roll, you can take a Reaction and expend one Superiority Die to reduce the damage by the number you roll on your Superiority Die plus your 力量和敏捷 modifier (your choice).

Foundry Note

This feature includes a Healing Reaction activity which can be used to reduce the damage.

heal.condition: When another creature damages you with a melee attack roll

Path of the Berserker.name: 狂戰士道途
Path of the Berserker.description:
引導狂暴進入暴力狂怒

遵行狂戰士道途的野蠻人將其狂暴化為根本上的暴力。狂戰士道途追求無拘的狂怒。因狂暴與怒火加持，他們在戰鬥的混沌快感中興奮，捨生忘死的投入廝殺。

Path of the Wild Heart.name: 狂野之心道途
Path of the Wild Heart.description:
與動物世界共行

遵行狂野之心道途的野蠻人將自己視為動物的伙伴。這些野蠻人學會了如何以魔法與動物溝通，他們和動物之間的聯繫，也因狂暴帶來的超自然力量而更加緊密。

Animal Speaker.title: Animal Speaker
Animal Speaker.hint: The Animal Speaker feature grants you the Beast Sense and Speak with Animals spells but only as Rituals. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability for them.

Path of the World Tree.name: 世界樹道途
Path of the World Tree.description:
追溯多元宇宙的根源與分支

遵行世界樹道途的野蠻人透過他們的狂暴與宇宙之樹伊格德拉希爾相連。這棵樹生長在外層位面之間，連接著外層位面和物質位面。這些野蠻人借助世界之樹的魔力獲得生命力，並將其作為次元旅行的工具。

Path of the Zealot.name: 狂熱者道途
Path of the Zealot.description:
與神靈欣喜若狂的結合中狂暴

遵行狂熱者道途的野蠻人可獲得神或神系的恩賜。這些野蠻人將神人合一的狂想曲化為自身的狂暴，並因此獲得力量。他們通常是其神靈或神系的祭司或是其信徒的盟友。

Warrior of the Gods: Pool Size.title: Warrior of the Gods: Pool Size

Peerless Athlete.name: Peerless Athlete
Peerless Athlete.description: As a Bonus Action, you can expend one use of your Channel Divinity to augment your athleticism. For 1 hour, you have Advantage on Strength (Athletics) and Dexterity (Acrobatics) checks, and the distance of your Long and High Jumps increases by 10 feet (this extra distance costs movement as normal).

Peerless Skill.name: Peerless Skill
Peerless Skill.description: When you make an ability check or attack roll and fail, you can expend one use of Bardic Inspiration; roll the Bardic Inspiration die, and add the number rolled to the d20, potentially turning a failure into a success. On a failure, the Bardic Inspiration isn't expended.

utility.condition: When you fail an ability check or attack roll

Perfect Focus.name: 心無旁騖
Perfect Focus.description:
When you roll Initiative and don't use Uncanny Metabolism, you regain expended Focus Points until you have 4 if you have 3 or fewer.

Foundry Note

This feature does not automatically regain the expended Focus Points.

Persistent Rage.name: Persistent Rage
Persistent Rage.description:
When you roll Initiative, you can regain all expended uses of Rage. After you regain uses of Rage in this way, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

In addition, your Rage is so fierce that it now lasts for 10 minutes without you needing to do anything to extend it from round to round. Your Rage ends early if you have the &Reference[Unconscious] condition (not just the &Reference[Incapacitated] condition) or don Heavy armor.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an activity which can be used when you roll Initiative which will recharge all of your Rage uses.

Phantasmal Creatures.name: Phantasmal Creatures
Phantasmal Creatures.description:
You always have the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSummonBeas]{Summon Beast} and @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSummonFey0]{Summon Fey} spells prepared. Whenever you cast either spell, you can change its school to Illusion, which causes the summoned creature to appear spectral. You can cast the Illusion version of each spell without expending a spell slot, but casting it without a slot halves the creature’s Hit Points. Once you cast either spell without a spell slot, you must finish a Long Rest before you can cast the spell in that way again.

Foundry Note

The Summon Illusionary Beast and Fey activities can be used for a free cast at the spell's base level and automatically halves the summons HP.

Physician's Touch.name: Physician's Touch
Physician's Touch.description:
Your Hand of Harm and Hand of Healing improve, as detailed below.

Hand of Harm. When you use Hand of Harm on a creature, you can also give that creature the Poisoned condition until the end of your next turn.

Hand of Healing. When you use Hand of Healing, you can also end one of the following conditions on the creature you heal: Blinded, Deafened, Paralyzed, Poisoned, or Stunned.

Foundry Note

You can use the Hand of Harm and Hand of Healing activities on this feature going forward. Hand of Harm includes an Active Effect which will apply the Poisoned status.

Hand of Harm.name: Hand of Harm
Hand of Harm.condition: Once per turn when you hit a creature with an Unarmed Strike and deal damage

Portent.name: Portent
Portent.description:
Glimpses of the future begin to press on your awareness. Whenever you finish a Long Rest, roll two [[/r d20]] and record the numbers rolled. You can replace any &Reference[D20 Test] made by you or a creature that you can see with one of these foretelling rolls. You must choose to do so before the roll, and you can replace a roll in this way only once per turn.

Each foretelling roll can be used only once. When you finish a Long Rest, you lose any unused foretelling rolls.

Current Portent Rolls: x, y

Foundry Note

When you roll both of the d20 you can edit this feature's description to track them or log it another way.

Potent Cantrip.name: Potent Cantrip
Potent Cantrip.description:
Your damaging cantrips affect even creatures that avoid the brunt of the effect. When you cast a cantrip at a creature and you miss with the attack roll or the target succeeds on a saving throw against the cantrip, the target takes half the cantrip’s damage (if any) but suffers no additional effect from the cantrip.

Foundry Note

With their token selected you can either right click on the damage roll's chat card and select  Apply Half Damage or click the "1/2" button and then the  Apply button.

Power of the Wilds.name: Power of the Wilds
Power of the Wilds.description:
Whenever you activate your Rage, you gain one of the following options of your choice.

Falcon. While your Rage is active, you have a Fly Speed equal to your Speed if you aren't wearing any armor.

Lion. While your Rage is active, any of your enemies within 5 feet of you have Disadvantage on attack rolls against targets other than you or another Barbarian who has this option active.

Ram. While your Rage is active, you can cause a Large or smaller creature to have the &Reference[Prone] condition when you hit it with a melee attack.

Foundry Note

The Ram activity includes an Active Effect which applies the Prone condition.

The Falcon and Lion options are not automated.

Falcon.name: Falcon
Falcon.chatFlavor: You gain a Fly Speed equal to your Speed if you aren't wearing any armor.

Ram.name: Ram
Ram.condition: When you a Large or smaller creature with a melee attack

Precise Hunter.name: Precise Hunter
Precise Hunter.description: You have Advantage on attack rolls against the creature currently marked by your Hunter’s Mark.

Precision Attack.name: Precision Attack
Precision Attack.description: When you miss with an attack roll, you can expend one Superiority Die, roll that die, and add it to the attack roll, potentially causing the attack to hit.

utility.condition: When you miss with an attack roll

Preserve Life.name: Preserve Life
Preserve Life.description:
As a Magic action, you present your Holy Symbol and expend a use of your Channel Divinity to evoke healing energy that can restore a number of Hit Points equal to five times your Cleric level. Choose &Reference[Bloodied] creatures within 30 feet of yourself (which can include you), and divide those Hit Points among them. This feature can restore a creature to no more than half its Hit Point maximum.

Foundry Note

The Heal activity does not automatically restrict the HP gained to 50% of the target's max.

Primal Champion.name: Primal Champion
Primal Champion.description: You embody primal power. Your Strength and Constitution scores increase by 4, to a maximum of 25.

Primal Companion.name: 元出夥伴
Primal Companion.description:
你魔法般地召出一隻原初野獸，其力量來源於你和自然的聯繫。從@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbBeastoftheLan]{陸地之獸}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbBeastoftheSea]{海洋之獸}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbBeastoftheSky]{天空之獸}三種數據面板中選擇其中一個。同時，你為原初野獸數據面板選擇一種合適的動物，以決定其呈現的野獸外貌。無論你選擇什麼動物，其身上都帶有原初的印記，暗示其神秘的起源。

野獸對你和你同伴的態度友善並服從你的命令。若你死亡其將消失。

【戰鬥中的野獸】在戰鬥中，野獸在你的回合中行動。其能自主移動並使用其反應，但除非你採取附贈動作命令其採取其數據面板中列出的動作或是除此之外的其他動作，否則其只會採取迴避動作。你也可以在採取攻擊動作時，放棄其中的一次攻擊來命令野獸採取野獸打擊動作。若你陷入無力狀態，則野獸將自主行動而非限於採取迴避動作。

【恢復或替換野獸】若野獸死亡且未超過一小時，你可以採取魔法動作觸碰其並消耗一個法術位。野獸將在1分鐘後以全部生命值重生。

每當你完成長休時，你可以召喚一隻不同的原初野獸，這隻新的野獸將會出現在你5呎內一處未被占據的空間裡。由你選擇其數據和外觀。若你已通過此特性獲得一隻野獸，則其會在新的野獸出現時消失。

除了夥伴的特徵與動作中註明會使用你的數據外，下列屬性也會受到影響。

共用
護甲等級13 + 你的感知調整值
熟練加值等同於你的熟練加值
陸地之獸
生命值5 + 你遊俠等級的5倍
生命骰等同於你遊俠等級的d8
速度40呎、攀爬40呎
感官黑暗視覺60呎
天空之獸
生命值4 + 你遊俠等級的4倍
生命骰等同於你遊俠等級的d6
速度10呎、飛行60呎
感官黑暗視覺60呎
海洋之獸
生命值5 + 你遊俠等級的5倍
生命骰等同於你遊俠等級的d8
速度5呎、游泳60呎
感官黑暗視覺90呎

Foundry Note

The Summon activity will allow you to choose the type of your Primal Companion. Its stat block will automatically be configured with the correct values.

The Restore with Spell Slot activity will allow you to resummon it and consume a spell slot.

The Command activity only needs to be used if you're tracking your Bonus Action usage as it does not do anything.

Primal Knowledge.name: 原初知識
Primal Knowledge.description:
你獲得1級野蠻人級能列表上可用的另一項技能熟練。

此外，在你啟用狂暴時，你在嘗試完成特定任務時可以引導原初之力。每當你使用下列其中一項技能進行能力檢定時，即時其通常使用不同屬性，你可以使其作為力量檢定：特技、威嚇、察覺、隱匿、生存。當你使用此能力時，你的力量表現出流淌於你體內的原始之力，它強化了你的敏捷、氣勢與感官。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which will cause those skills to automatically use your Strength modifier if it is higher than the normal Ability Score associated with the Skill.

Primal Order.name: 原初誓約
Primal Order.description:
你已將自己奉獻給以下一種神聖使命：

【巫祝】你額外知曉一個從德魯伊法術列表中選擇的戲法。此外，你與自然的緊密聯繫使你的智力（奧秘或自然）檢定獲得等同於感知調整值的加值（至少+1）。

【衛士】接受戰鬥訓練後，你獲得軍用武器的熟練，並接受了中甲訓練。

Foundry Note

You will be prompted to choose during advancement.

Primal Order: Magician.name: 原初誓約：巫祝
Primal Order: Magician.description:
額外知曉一個從@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.LhvuDQEyrCdg5EfU#cantrip]{德魯伊法術列表}中選擇的戲法。此外，你與自然的緊密聯繫使你的智力（奧秘或自然）檢定獲得等同於感知調整值的加值（至少+1，當前感知調整值：[[lookup @abilities.wis.mod]]）。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which automates the increase to your known cantrips and the bonus to your Arcane and Nature checks.

Primal Order: Warden.name: 原初誓約：衛士
Primal Order: Warden.description:
>接受戰鬥訓練後，你獲得軍用武器的熟練，並接受了中甲訓練。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which automates the addition of your Martial weapons proficiency and Medium armor training.

Projected Ward.name: Projected Ward
Projected Ward.description:
When a creature that you can see within 30 feet of yourself takes damage, you can take a Reaction to cause your Arcane Ward to absorb that damage. If this damage reduces the ward to 0 Hit Points, the warded creature takes any remaining damage. If that creature has any Resistances or Vulnerabilities, apply them before reducing the ward’s Hit Points.

Foundry Note

The Project Ward activity uses your reaction and can be used to reduce the Ward's uses ("HP").

Project Ward.name: Project Ward
Project Ward.condition: When a creature that you can see within 30 feet of yourself takes damage

Psi Warrior.name: 靈能武士
Psi Warrior.description:
Augment Physical Might with Psionic Power

Psi Warriors awaken the power of their minds to augment their physical might. They harness this psionic power to infuse their weapon strikes, lash out with telekinetic energy, and create barriers of mental force.

Guarded Mind.title: Guarded Mind
Guarded Mind.hint: You have Resistance to Psychic damage.

Psionic Power.name: Psionic Power
Psionic Power.description:
You harbor a wellspring of psionic energy within yourself. It is represented by your Psionic Energy Dice, which fuel certain powers you have from this subclass. The Soulknife Energy Dice table shows the number of these dice you have when you reach certain Rogue levels, and the table shows the die size.

Soulknife Energy Dice
Rogue LevelDie SizeNumber
3D64
5D86
9D88
11D108
13D1010
17D1212

Any features in this subclass that use a Psionic Energy Die use only the dice from this subclass. Some of your powers expend a Psionic Energy Die, as specified in a power’s description, and you can’t use a power if it requires you to use a die when your Psionic Energy Dice are all expended.

You regain one of your expended Psionic Energy Dice when you finish a Short Rest, and you regain all of them when you finish a Long Rest.

Psi-Bolstered Knack. If you fail an ability check using a skill or tool with which you have proficiency, you can roll one Psionic Energy Die and add the number rolled to the check, potentially turning failure into success. The die is expended only if the roll then succeeds.

Psychic Whispers. You can establish telepathic communication between yourself and others. As a Magic action, choose one or more creatures you can see, up to a number of creatures equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and then roll one Psionic Energy Die. For a number of hours equal to the number rolled, the chosen creatures can speak telepathically with you, and you can speak telepathically with them. To send or receive a message (no action required), you and the other creature must be within 1 mile of each other. A creature can end the telepathic connection at any time (no action required).

The first time you use this power after each Long Rest, you don’t expend the Psionic Energy Die. All other times you use the power, you expend the die.

Foundry Note

This feature automatically regains a use on a Short Rest and all on a Long Rest.

The Psi-Bolstered Knack activity expends a die and includes a bonus roll. If it still fails you can refund the expended die.

This feature includes a Psychic Whispers activity and a Psychic Whispers (Free) activity. They both include an Active Effect which can be used for tracking creatures you've included.

Psionic Strike.name: Psionic Strike
Psionic Strike.condition: Once on each of your turns, immediately after you hit a target within 30 feet of yourself with an attack and deal damage to it with a weapon

Telekinetic Movement.name: Telekinetic Movement
Telekinetic Movement.condition: One target within 30 feet, if an object it must be Large or smaller, if a creature, it must be willing

Telekinetic Movement Using Psionic Energ.name: Telekinetic Movement Using Psionic Energy
Telekinetic Movement Using Psionic Energ.condition: One target within 30 feet, if an object it must be Large or smaller, if a creature, it must be willing

Protective Field.name: Protective Field
Protective Field.condition: When you or another creature you can see within 30 feet takes damage

Psionic Sorcery.name: Psionic Sorcery
Psionic Sorcery.description:
When you cast any level 1+ spell from your Psionic Spells feature, you can cast it by expending a spell slot as normal or by spending a number of Sorcery Points equal to the spell’s level. If you cast the spell using Sorcery Points, it requires no Verbal or Somatic components, and it requires no Material components unless they are consumed by the spell or have a cost specified in it.

Foundry Note

The Expend Sorcery Points activity will allow you to select how many Sorcery Points to expend. You can then cast the spell and uncheck the "Consume Spell Slot" option.

Psionic Spells.name: 靈能法術
Psionic Spells.description:
當你達到靈能法術表中所述的相應術士等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

靈能法術
術士等級Spells
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplArmsofHada]{Arms of Hadar}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCalmEmotio]{Calm Emotions}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDetectThou]{偵測思想}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDissonantW]{噪音暗語}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMindSliver]{Mind Sliver}
5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHungerofHa]{哈達之慾}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSending000]{Sending}
7@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplEvardsBlac]{Evard's Black Tentacles}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSummonAber]{異怪召喚術}
9@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplRarysTelep]{Rary's Telepathic Bond}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplTelekinesi]{心靈遙控}

Foundry Note

法術會隨著你升級時自動獲得。

Psychic Blade.name: 心靈之刃
Psychic Blade.description:
你能將自己的心靈異能塑造為由靈能構成的閃亮劍刃。每當你採取攻擊動作或進行藉機攻擊時，你能從空手中塑造出心靈之刃，並以其來進行攻擊。

緊接在劍刃命中目標或失手後，其將消失且不會在造成傷害後留下任何痕跡。

當你在自己的回合中以心靈之刃發動攻擊後，只要你的另一隻手空閒，就能以附贈動作在那隻手中塑造第二把心靈之刃，並以其進行一次近戰或遠程攻擊。此次附贈攻擊的傷害骰為1d4而非1d6。

Psychic Blades.name: 心靈之刃
Psychic Blades.description:
你能將自己的心靈異能塑造為由靈能構成的閃亮劍刃。每當你採取攻擊動作或進行藉機攻擊時，你能從空手中塑造出心靈之刃，並以其來進行攻擊。這把魔法劍刃具有下列特徵：

武器種類：簡易近戰

命中傷害：1d6心靈傷害 + 攻擊檢定使用的屬性調整值

屬性：靈巧、投擲（射程60/120呎）

精通：精通（你可以使用此精通屬性，且不計入你可以使用的武器精通屬性數量）

緊接在劍刃命中目標或失手後，其將消失且不會在造成傷害後留下任何痕跡。

當你在自己的回合中以心靈之刃發動攻擊後，只要你的另一隻手空閒，就能以附贈動作在那隻手中塑造第二把心靈之刃，並以其進行一次近戰或遠程攻擊。此次附贈攻擊的傷害骰為1d4而非1d6。

Foundry Note

When you gain this feature you are granted a [[/item Psychic Blade]] as an item that will appear in your inventory and includes the above features.

Psychic Defenses.name: Psychic Defenses
Psychic Defenses.description:
You have Resistance to Psychic damage, and you have Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Charmed or Frightened condition.

Foundry Note

You will receive the Psychic damage resistance as you level up. The Advantage on saving throws is not automated.

Psychic Spells.name: 心靈法術
Psychic Spells.description: 當你施放一個可造成傷害的契術師法術時，你可以將其傷害類型改為心靈傷害。此外，當你施放惑控學派或幻術學派的契術師法術時，你不需要聲音或姿勢構材。

Psychic Veil.name: Psychic Veil
Psychic Veil.description:
You can weave a veil of psychic static to mask yourself. As a Magic action, you gain the &Reference[Invisible]{隱形} condition for 1 hour or until you dismiss this effect (no action required). This invisibility ends early immediately after you deal damage to a creature or you force a creature to make a saving throw.

Once you use this feature, you can’t do so again until you finish a Long Rest unless you expend a Psionic Energy Die (no action required) to restore your use of it.

Foundry Note

The Psychic Veil (Free) activity contains a free use. The Psychic Veil activity consumes a Psionic Die. They both include an Active Effect that applies the Invisible condition.

Veiled.name: Veiled
Veiled.description: You gain the Invisible condition for 1 hour or until you dismiss this effect (no action required). This invisibility ends early immediately after you deal damage to a creature or you force a creature to make a saving throw.

Pushing Attack.name: Pushing Attack
Pushing Attack.description:
When you hit a creature with an attack roll using a weapon or an Unarmed Strike, you can expend one Superiority Die to attempt to drive the target back. Add the Superiority Die to the attack's damage roll. If the target is Large or smaller, it must succeed on a Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 15 feet directly away from you.

Foundry Note

This feature includes a Strength Save activity and a Dexterity Save activity which will consume a use of your Superiority Die.

The Damage activity allows you to select the type of damage it should deal in the roll dialog.

save.condition: When you hit a creature with an attack roll

Quickened Spell.name: 瞬發法術
Quickened Spell.description:
消耗：2術法點

當你施放一道施法時間為動作的法術時你可以消耗2術法點將其施法時間改為附贈動作。你無法在已施放過1環以上法術的回合中以此方式修改法術，也無法在已經以此方式修改過法術的回合中再施放1環以上法術。

Quickened Spell.name: 瞬發法術
Quickened Spell.condition: 當你施放施法時間為動作的法術時

Quivering Palm.name: Quivering Palm
Quivering Palm.description:
You gain the ability to set up lethal vibrations in someone's body. When you hit a creature with an Unarmed Strike, you can expend 4 Focus Points to start these imperceptible vibrations, which last for a number of days equal to your Monk level. The vibrations are harmless unless you take an action to end them. Alternatively, when you take the Attack action on your turn, you can forgo one of the attacks to end the vibrations. To end them, you and the target must be on the same plane of existence. When you end them, the target must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 10d12 Force damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

You can have only one creature under the effect of this feature at a time. You can end the vibrations harmlessly (no action required).

Foundry Note

The Instill Vibrations activity expends 4 Focus Points and includes an Active Effect which can be used to track the target you have set up lethal vibrations in.

The End Vibrations activity includes the Saving Throw and Damage rolls.

Instill Vibrations.name: Instill Vibrations
Instill Vibrations.condition: When you hit a creature with an Unarmed Strike

End Vibrations.name: End Vibrations
End Vibrations.condition: When you take the Attack action on your turn

Radiance of the Dawn.name: 黎明曙光
Radiance of the Dawn.description: 作為魔法動作，你展示聖徽並消耗一次引導神力使用次數，在以你自身為原點的30呎擴散區域內釋放一陣閃光。區域內任何源自魔法的&Reference[Darkness]{黑暗}將被驅散（例如@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDarkness00]所創造的黑暗）。此外，區域內每個你所選擇的生物必須進行體質豁免。豁免失敗將承受 2d10 + 你牧師等級的光耀傷害，豁免成功則傷害減半。

Radiant Soul.name: Radiant Soul
Radiant Soul.description:
Your link to your patron allows you to serve as a conduit for radiant energy. You have Resistance to Radiant damage. Once per turn, when a spell you cast deals Radiant or Fire damage, you can add your Charisma modifier to that spell’s damage against one of the spell’s targets.

Foundry Note

As you level up you will automatically be granted the Resistance to Radiant damage.

The Damage activity includes a damage roll that allows you to select the damage type in the roll's dialog. Alternatively, you can add your Charisma modifier in the Spell's Situational Bonus field when rolling damage.

Radiant Strikes.name: Radiant Strikes
Radiant Strikes.description:
Your strikes now carry supernatural power. When you hit a target with an attack roll using a Melee weapon or an Unarmed Strike, the target takes an extra 1d8 Radiant damage.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which automatically adds the Radiant damage to all Damage Rolls made with your Melee Weapon Attacks and Unarmed Strikes.

Rage.name: 狂暴
Rage.description:
你可以灌輸自己一種被稱作狂暴的原初之力，其為你帶來極致的力量與強韌。若你為穿戴重甲，作為一個附贈動作，你可以進入狂暴。

你可以進入狂暴的次數，如同你野蠻人等級在野蠻人特性表中狂暴次數（Rages）欄所示。（當前 [[lookup @scale.barbarian.rage]]）。當你完成一次短休時，你重獲一次已消耗的使用次數，並在你完成一次長休時，重獲所有已消耗使用次數。

在啟用狂暴時，你須遵守以下規則。

【傷害抗性】你具有對鈍擊、穿刺、揮砍傷害的抗性。

【狂暴傷害】當你以武器或徒手打擊使用力量對目標進行攻擊並造成傷害時，你造成的傷害獲得額外加值，且此加值會隨著你野蠻人等級提升而成長，如野蠻人特性表中的狂暴傷害（Rage Damage）欄所示。

【力量優勢】你在力量檢定與力量豁免上具有優勢。

【無專注或法術】你無法維持專注，並且你不能施放法術。

【持續時間】狂暴持續到你下回合結束，且若你穿戴重甲或陷入無力狀態則提前終止。若在你啟用後的下回合仍處於狂暴，你可以執行下列其中一項以延長狂暴一輪：

  • 對敵人進行攻擊檢定。
  • 迫使敵人進行豁免檢定。
  • 以附贈動作延長你的狂暴。

每次延長狂暴，將使其持續至你的下個回合結束。你可以維持狂暴至多10 分鐘。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which automates the Resistance and additional damage. This feature will also automatically recharge your Rage uses on a Short and Long Rest.

Rage of the Gods.name: 眾神之怒
Rage of the Gods.description:
When you activate your Rage, you can assume the form of a divine warrior. This form lasts for 1 minute or until you drop to 0 Hit Points. Once you use this feature, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

While in this form, you gain the benefits below.

Flight. You have a Fly Speed equal to your Speed and can hover.

Resistance. You have Resistance to Necrotic, Psychic, and Radiant damage.

Revivification. When a creature within 30 feet of you would drop to 0 Hit Points, you can take a Reaction to expend a use of your Rage to instead change the target's Hit Points to a number equal to your Barbarian level (currently [[lookup @classes.barbarian.levels]]).

Foundry Note

The Rage of the Gods activity includes an Active Effect for automatically adding the resistances and hover but does not provide the fly speed.

The Revivification activity includes a healing roll of your Barbarian level.

Revivification.name: Revivification
Revivification.condition: When a creature within 30 feet of you would drop to 0 Hit Points

Rage of the Gods.name: Rage of the Gods
Rage of the Gods.description:
While in this form, you gain the benefits below.

Flight. You have a Fly Speed equal to your Speed and can hover.

Resistance. You have Resistance to Necrotic, Psychic, and Radiant damage.

Revivification. When a creature within 30 feet of you would drop to 0 Hit Points, you can take a Reaction to expend a use of your Rage to instead change the target's Hit Points to a number equal to your Barbarian level.

Rage of the Wilds.name: Rage of the Wilds
Rage of the Wilds.description:
Your Rage taps into the primal power of animals. Whenever you activate your Rage, you gain one of the following options of your choice.

Bear. While your Rage is active, you have Resistance to every damage type except Force, Necrotic, Psychic, and Radiant.

Eagle. When you activate your Rage, you can take the Disengage and Dash actions as part of that Bonus Action. While your Rage is active, you can take a Bonus Action to take both of those actions.

Wolf. While your Rage is active, your allies have Advantage on attack rolls against any enemy of yours within 5 feet of you.

Foundry Note

The Bear activity includes an Active Effect which can automate the addition of the resistances.

The Eagle activity uses a Bonus Action for Disengage and Dash.

The Wolf activity includes a 5 foot target template for identifying impacted creatures.

Rally.name: Rally
Rally.description: As a Bonus Action, you can expend one Superiority Die to bolster the resolve of a companion. Choose an ally of yours within 30 feet of yourself who can see or hear you. That creature gains Temporary Hit Points equal to the Superiority Die roll plus half your Fighter level (round down).

Ranger.name: 遊俠
Ranger.description:
身懷原初魔法的流浪武者

遊俠核心特徵

關鍵屬性

敏捷和感知

生命骰

每遊俠等級D10

豁免熟練

力量與敏捷

技能熟練

從馴獸、運動、洞悉、調查、自然、察覺、隱匿和求生中選擇3項

武器熟練

簡易和軍用武器

護甲訓練

輕甲、中甲、盾牌

起始裝備

選擇A或B： (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmStuddedLea]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepScimitar00]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepShortsword]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepLongbow000]、20支@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbamoArrows0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagQuiver00000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagDruidicFocu]（@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbdfcSprigofmis]）、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagExplorersPa]、[[/award 7GP]]；(B) [[/award 150GP]]

離開城鎮的喧囂，即是茂密的森林和廣袤的原野。這正是遊俠們進行無盡守望之地。他們向掠食者們學習如何追蹤獵物，借助荒野中的灌木叢和碎石在陰影中潛行。

熟悉荒野的遊俠們得以利用自然之力施展法術。為保護世界免受魔物和暴君的破壞，遊俠們的天賦和魔法往往都需要經歷刀口舔血般的磨練。

成為遊俠…

作為首級角色

  • 獲得遊俠核心特徵表中的所有特徵。
  • 獲得遊俠特性表中列出的1級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得遊俠核心特徵表中的以下特徵：生命骰，軍用武器熟練，遊俠技能熟練中選擇其一，以及輕甲、中甲、盾牌訓練。
  • 獲得遊俠特性表中列出的1級特性。請參閱第2章的兼職規則以確定可用的法術位。

Reckless Attack.name: 魯莽攻擊
Reckless Attack.description:
你可以拋下防禦以展開不顧一切的猛烈攻擊。當你在自己回合進行第一次攻擊時，你可以選擇魯莽地攻擊。這麼做直到你下回合開始時，會讓你使用力量的攻擊檢定具有優勢，但在該持續時間內對你的攻擊檢定也具有優勢。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect for tracking whether you are reckless or not but it does not automate Advantage on your attacks or attacks against you.

Relentless.name: Relentless
Relentless.description: Once per turn, when you use a maneuver, you can roll [[/r 1d8]] and use the number rolled instead of expending a Superiority Die.

Relentless Avenger.name: Relentless Avenger
Relentless Avenger.description:
Your supernatural focus helps you close off a foe’s retreat. When you hit a creature with an Opportunity Attack, you can reduce the creature’s Speed to 0 until the end of the current turn. You can then move up to half your Speed as part of the same Reaction. This movement doesn’t provoke Opportunity Attacks.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which will reduce the enemies Speed to 0.

Relentless Hunter.name: Relentless Hunter
Relentless Hunter.description: Taking damage can’t break your Concentration on Hunter’s Mark.

Relentless Rage.name: Relentless Rage
Relentless Rage.description:
狂暴的力量讓你即使身受重傷也能持續戰鬥。在你狂暴啟用且未立即死亡時，若你的生命值被降至0，你可以進行DC10體質豁免檢定。若你豁免成功，則你的生命值變為等同於你野蠻人等級的兩倍。

在第一次使用後，每次你使用此特性，DC提升5。當你完成一次短休或長休時，DC重設為10。

Foundry Note

This feature will automatically increase the DC by 5 if you consume the resource when activating it. It will also automatically reset to 10 after a Short or Long Rest.

Reliable Talent.name: Reliable Talent
Reliable Talent.description:
Whenever you make an ability check that uses one of your skill or tool proficiencies, you can treat a d20 roll of 9 or lower as a 10.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which automates the minimum roll of 10 on your skill and tool proficiencies.

Remarkable Athlete.name: Remarkable Athlete
Remarkable Athlete.description:
Thanks to your athleticism, you have Advantage on Initiative rolls and Strength (Athletics) checks.

In addition, immediately after you score a Critical Hit, you can move up to half your Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

Foundry Note

This feature automatically grants Advantage on Initiative rolls.

Rend Mind.name: Rend Mind
Rend Mind.description:
You can sweep your Psychic Blades through a creature’s mind. When you use your Psychic Blades to deal Sneak Attack damage to a creature, you can force that target to make a Wisdom saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and Proficiency Bonus). If the save fails, the target has the Stunned condition for 1 minute. The Stunned target repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Once you use this feature, you can’t do so again until you finish a Long Rest unless you expend three Psionic Energy Dice (no action required) to restore your use of it.

Foundry Note

The Rend Mind (Free) activity includes a free use of this feature. The Rend Mind activity will consume three Psionic Energy Dice. Both activities include the save and an Active Effect that applies the Stunned condition.

Rend Mind (Free).condition: When you deal Sneak Attack damage with your Psychic Blades
Rend Mind (Free).name: Rend Mind (Free)

Rend Mind.name: Rend Mind
Rend Mind.condition: When you deal Sneak Attack damage with your Psychic Blades

Rend Mind.name: Rend Mind
Rend Mind.description: The target has the Stunned condition for 1 minute. The Stunned target repeats the save at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

Repelling Blast.name: 斥力衝擊
Repelling Blast.description:
先決條件：契術師等級2以上，具有經過攻擊檢定而造成傷害的契術師戲法。

選擇一個你知曉需要攻擊檢定的契術師戲法。當你以該戲法命中大型以下的生物時，你可以將其推離至多10呎。

【可複選】你可以重複選擇此祈喚，但每次你都必須選擇不同且符合條件的戲法。

Foundry Note

The Make Repelling activity can be used to enchant a cantrip which adds ", Repelling" as a reminder.

Repelling Blast.name: Repelling Blast
Repelling Blast.description: 選擇一個你知曉需要攻擊檢定的契術師戲法。當你以該戲法命中大型以下的生物時，你可以將其推離至多10呎。

Restore Balance.name: 歸復平衡
Restore Balance.description:
你與絕對秩序之位面的聯繫使你能重整混沌的時刻。當你60尺內一個你可見的生物即將進行一次具有優勢或劣勢的檢定時，你可以用反應使其擲骰免受到所有的優勢劣勢影響。

你可以使用此能力的次數等同於你魅力調整值（最少一次）。每當你完成一次長休時，你恢復所有已消耗的使用次數。

Prevent Advantage/Disadvantage.name: Prevent Advantage/Disadvantage
Prevent Advantage/Disadvantage.condition: When a creature you can see within 60 feet is about to roll d20 with Advantage/Disadvantage

Restoring Touch.name: Restoring Touch
Restoring Touch.description:
When you use Lay On Hands on a creature, you can also remove one or more of the following conditions from the creature: Blinded, Charmed, Deafened, Frightened, Paralyzed, or Stunned. You must expend 5 Hit Points from the healing pool of Lay On Hands for each of these conditions you remove; those points don’t also restore Hit Points to the creature.

Foundry Note

This feature includes a Scale prompt for selecting how many conditions you would like to remove that will automatically consume the correct number from your Lay on Hands pool.

Retaliation.name: Retaliation
Retaliation.description: When you take damage from a creature that is within 5 feet of you, you can take a Reaction to make one melee attack against that creature, using a weapon or an Unarmed Strike.

Retaliate.name: Retaliate
Retaliate.condition: When you take damage from a creature within 5 feet of you

Revelation in Flesh.name: Revelation in Flesh
Revelation in Flesh.description:
You can unleash the aberrant truth hidden within yourself. As a Bonus Action, you can spend 1 Sorcery Point or more to magically alter your body for 10 minutes. For each Sorcery Point you spend, you gain one of the following benefits of your choice, the effects of which last until the alteration ends.

Aquatic Adaptation. You gain a Swim Speed equal to twice your Speed, and you can breathe underwater. Gills grow from your neck or flare behind your ears, and your fingers become webbed or you grow wriggling cilia.

Glistening Flight. You gain a Fly Speed equal to your Speed, and you can hover. As you fly, your skin glistens with mucus or otherworldly light.

See the Invisible. You can see any Invisible creature within 60 feet of yourself that isn’t behind Total Cover. Your eyes also turn black or become writhing sensory tendrils.

Wormlike Movement. Your body, along with any equipment you are wearing or carrying, becomes slimy and pliable. You can move through any space as narrow as 1 inch, and you can spend 5 feet of movement to escape from nonmagical restraints or the Grappled condition.

Foundry Note

The Expend Sorcery Points activity will let you select the number of Sorcery Points you would like to expend. It includes an Active Effect for each option which can be used for tracking but does not automate their changes.

Riposte.name: Riposte
Riposte.description:
When a creature misses you with a melee attack roll, you can take a Reaction and expend one Superiority Die to make a melee attack roll with a weapon or an Unarmed Strike against the creature. If you hit, add the Superiority Die to the attack's damage.

Foundry Note

The Riposte Damage reaction activity allows you to select the type of damage it should deal in the roll dialog and will consume a use of your Superiority Die.

Riposte Damage.condition: When a creature misses you with a melee attack roll
Riposte Damage.name: Riposte Damage

Ritual Adept.name: 儀式專家
Ritual Adept.description: 你可以將你的法術書中任何帶有儀式標籤的法術以@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.YSB1QtxZW2BI9f4Y#casting-without-slots]{儀式}方式施放。你無需準備這些法術，但你必須閱讀法術書才能以此方法施放法術。

Rogue.name: 遊蕩者
Rogue.description:
精於隱匿和潛行的敏捷大師

遊蕩者核心特徵

關鍵屬性

敏捷

生命骰

每遊蕩者等級D8

豁免熟練

敏捷與智力

技能熟練

從特技、運動、欺瞞、洞悉、威嚇、調查、察覺、遊說、巧手、隱匿中選擇4項

武器熟練

簡易武器與具有靈巧或輕型屬性的軍用武器

工具熟練

盜賊工具

護甲訓練

輕甲

起始裝備

選擇A或B： (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmLeatherArm]、2 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepDagger0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepShortsword]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepShortbow00]、20支@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbamoArrows0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagQuiver00000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbtulThievesToo]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagBurglarsPac]、[[/award 8GP]]； (B) [[/award 100GP]]

遊蕩者們靠著靈巧的變通和隱匿的身法，針對敵人的弱點獲得優勢。他們總有解決問題的訣竅。其中少數還會學習運用詭術魔法來作為其能力的補充。很多遊蕩者專注於潛行和騙術，而另一些則精於針對地下城環境的有效技能，諸如攀爬、搜索、解除裝置和開鎖。

戰鬥中的遊蕩者更偏愛狡猾的策略而非蠻橫行事。與其用密集的攻擊放倒敵人，他們更喜歡進行精準打擊。

有些遊蕩者以犯罪為生，但也有些使用其技巧打擊犯罪。而每當遊蕩者涉及法律時，那些尋常罪犯或執法官員通常都無法匹敵遊蕩者們高超的才智。

作為遊蕩者…

作為首級角色

  • 獲得遊蕩者核心特徵表中的所有特徵。
  • 獲得遊蕩者特性表中列出的1級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得遊蕩者核心特徵表中的以下特徵：生命骰，遊蕩者技能熟練中選擇其一，盜賊工具熟練，以及輕甲訓練。
  • 獲得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbRogue00000000.JournalEntryPage.gJV8iDqdNhRMLi5r#class-features]{遊蕩者特性表}中列出的1級特性。

Expertise.title: 專精
Expertise.hint: 你獲得兩項你所選擇的已熟練技能的專精。推薦在擁有巧手與隱匿熟練時選擇他們。

Thieves' Cant.title: 盜賊黑話
Thieves' Cant.hint: 你在街頭巷尾中學會了多種語言，並在此掌握了盜賊間的黑話。你知曉盜賊黑話與以下一個你所選擇的其他語言。

FiaNLovfP6tnY4tD.hint: 你的心理素質獲得了非凡的增強。你獲得感知和魅力豁免熟練。

Epic Boon.title: 史詩恩惠
Epic Boon.hint: 你獲得一項史詩恩惠專長或另一個符合先決條件的自選專長。推薦選擇暗夜精魂恩惠。

Roving.name: Roving
Roving.description:
Your Speed increases by 10 feet while you aren’t wearing Heavy armor. You also have a Climb Speed and a Swim Speed equal to your Speed.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which increases your Speed by 10 feet. It does not automatically grant an equivalent Climb and Swim Speed though. It can be disabled if you choose to wear Heavy armor.

Sacred Weapon.name: Sacred Weapon
Sacred Weapon.description:
When you take the Attack action, you can expend one use of your Channel Divinity to imbue one Melee weapon that you are holding with positive energy. For 10 minutes or until you use this feature again, you add your Charisma modifier to attack rolls you make with that weapon (minimum bonus of +1), and each time you hit with it, you cause it to deal its normal damage type or Radiant damage.

The weapon also emits Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light 20 feet beyond that.

You can end this effect early (no action required). This effect also ends if you aren’t carrying the weapon.

Scholar.name: 學者
Scholar.description: 學習法術之餘，你也在鑽研其他的學術領域。選擇下列一項你具有熟練的技能：奧秘、歷史、調查、醫藥、自然或宗教。你獲得所選技能的專精。

Sculpt Spells.name: Sculpt Spells
Sculpt Spells.description: You can create pockets of relative safety within the effects of your evocations. When you cast an Evocation spell that affects other creatures that you can see, you can choose a number of them equal to 1 plus the spell’s level. The chosen creatures automatically succeed on their saving throws against the spell, and they take no damage if they would normally take half damage on a successful save.

Sear Undead.name: Sear Undead
Sear Undead.description:
Whenever you use Turn Undead, you can roll a number of d8s equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of 1d8, currently [[lookup @abilities.wis.mod]]) and add the rolls together. Each Undead that fails its saving throw against that use of Turn Undead takes Radiant damage equal to the roll's total. This damage doesn't end the turn effect.

Foundry Note

This feature can be used in place of Turn Undead. It consumes a use of Channel Divinity, includes the Save, Active Effects for the conditions, and this feature's damage roll.

Searing Vengeance.name: Searing Vengeance
Searing Vengeance.description:
When you or an ally within 60 feet of you is about to make a Death Saving Throw, you can unleash radiant energy to save the creature. The creature regains Hit Points equal to half its Hit Point maximum and can end the &Reference[Prone] condition on itself. Each creature of your choice that is within 30 feet of the creature takes Radiant damage equal to 2d8 plus your Charisma modifier, and each has the &Reference[Blinded] condition until the end of the current turn.

Once you use this feature, you can’t use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

Foundry Note

Healing up to half their Hit Point maximum is not automated but the Damage activity includes the relevant targeting template and damage roll. It also includes an Active Effect which applies the Blinded condition.

damage.condition: When you or an ally within 60 feet of you is about to make a Death Saving Throw

Second Wind.name: 回氣
Second Wind.description:
你的身心都儲有底力，能夠從中汲取力量。作為一個附贈動作，你恢復1d10 + 你戰士等級的生命值。

你可以使用此特性兩次。當你完成短休時重獲一次已消耗的使用次數，並在完成長休時重獲所有已消耗的使用次數。

當你達到特定的戰士等級後，你將獲得更多此特性的使用次數，如@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFighter000000.JournalEntryPage.wDELe3k25FQvYdrq#class-features]{戰士特性}表中的回氣一欄所示。

Foundry Note

This feature automatically scales in usage and recovers the correct number of uses on a Short and Long Rest.

Second-Story Work.name: Second-Story Work
Second-Story Work.description:
You’ve trained to get into especially hard-to-reach places, granting you these benefits.

Climber. You gain a Climb Speed equal to your Speed.

Jumper. You can determine your &Reference[Jumping]{jump} distance using your Dexterity rather than your Strength.

Foundry Note

This feature does not automatically add the Climb Speed and will have to be added manually.

Seeking Spell.name: 追蹤法術
Seeking Spell.description:
消耗：1術法點

若你為一道法術進行攻擊檢定並失手時，你可以消耗1術法點以重擲d20，且你必須使用新的結果。

即使你已經在施法時應用了另一個不同的超魔法選項，你仍可以使用追蹤法術。

Seeking Spell.name: 追蹤法術
Seeking Spell.condition: 當你為一道法術進行攻擊檢定並失手時

Self-Restoration.name: 還元返本
Self-Restoration.description:
Through sheer force of will, you can remove one of the following conditions from yourself at the end of each of your turns: &Reference[Charmed apply=false], &Reference[Frightened apply=false], or &Reference[Poisoned apply=false].

In addition, forgoing food and drink doesn't give you levels of &Reference[Exhaustion apply=false].

Shadow Arts.name: 影之技藝
Shadow Arts.description:
你已習得喚出墮影冥界的力量，獲得下列好處。

【黑暗術】你可以消耗1點內力不需要任何材料施放@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDarkness00]{黑暗術}。你在以該特性施放的法術範圍內依然看得見，不受黑暗影響。法術持續時間內，在你的回合開始時，你可以將該法術區域移動到你60呎範圍內的任意一處空間。

【黑暗視覺】你獲得60呎黑暗視覺，若你已經有黑暗視覺則其範圍再增加60呎。

【陰影幻象】你知曉次級幻象法術，在該法術上你的施法屬性為感知。

Foundry Note

The Expend Focus Point activity expends a use and you can then use the [[/item Darkness]] spell which is granted to you at this level.

This feature includes an Active Effect that increases your Darkvision.

You are granted the Minor Illusion spell when you reach this level.

Shadow Step.name: Shadow Step
Shadow Step.description: While entirely within Dim Light or Darkness, you can use a Bonus Action to teleport up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space you can see that is also in Dim Light or Darkness. You then have Advantage on the next melee attack you make before the end of the current turn.

Shadow Step.condition: While entirely within Dim Light or Darkness
Shadow Step.name: Shadow Step

Shadowy Dodge.name: Shadowy Dodge
Shadowy Dodge.description: When a creature makes an attack roll against you, you can take a Reaction to impose Disadvantage on that roll. Whether the attack hits or misses, you can then teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

Shadowy Dodge.name: Shadowy Dodge
Shadowy Dodge.condition: When a creature makes an attack roll against you

Share Spells.name: Share Spells
Share Spells.description: 當你施放目標為自身的法術時，若你的原初伙伴野獸處於你身邊30呎內，則該法術效應也同時作用於野獸。

Signature Spells.name: Signature Spells
Signature Spells.description:
Choose two level 3 spells in your spellbook as your signature spells. You always have these spells prepared, and you can cast each of them once at level 3 without expending a spell slot. When you do so, you can’t cast them in this way again until you finish a Short or Long Rest. To cast either spell at a higher level, you must expend a spell slot.

Foundry Note

The Make Signature activity can be used to enchant two spells which marks them as "Always Prepared" and adds ", Signature" to their title for easy identification.

The Expend First Spell and Expend Second Spell activities can be used for tracking your free use of each spell and refresh on a Short and Long Rest.

Signature.name: Signature
Signature.description: Choose two level 3 spells in your spellbook as your signature spells. You always have these spells prepared, and you can cast each of them once at level 3 without expending a spell slot. When you do so, you can’t cast them in this way again until you finish a Short or Long Rest. To cast either spell at a higher level, you must expend a spell slot.

Slippery Mind.name: Slippery Mind
Slippery Mind.description:
Your cunning mind is exceptionally difficult to control. You gain proficiency in Wisdom and Charisma saving throws.

Foundry Note

These proficiencies are granted automatically as you level up.

Slow Fall.name: 輕身墜
Slow Fall.description:
當你墜落時，你可以採取一個反應將任何你所受到的墜落傷害減少等同於你武僧等級五倍的數值。

Foundry Note

This feature includes a Reduce activity which can be used to restore lost Hit Points equal to five times your Monk level.

Smite of Protection.name: Smite of Protection
Smite of Protection.description:
Your magical smite now radiates protective energy. Whenever you cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDivineSmit]{Divine Smite}, you and your allies have Half Cover while in your Aura of Protection. The aura has this benefit until the start of your next turn.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which provides the Half Cover status but it is not automatically granted as creatures enter/exit your aura.

Sneak Attack.name: 偷襲
Sneak Attack.description:
你知曉如何精確地攻擊分心的敵人。每回合一次，若你使用靈巧或遠程武器進行攻擊並在擲骰具有優勢時，你可以對你以攻擊檢定命中的生物造成額外1d6傷害。該額外傷害的類型與你武器的傷害類型相同。

若目標的5呎內至少有一名同伴，且其未陷入無力狀態，而你的攻擊檢定也不具劣勢時，則你無需在進行攻擊檢定時具有優勢。

該額外傷害會隨著遊蕩者等級的提升而增加，如遊蕩者特性表中偷襲一欄所示。

【當前偷襲傷害】 [[lookup @scale.rogue.sneak-attack]]

Foundry Note

Your sneak attack damage will automatically scale as you level up. You can select the damage type in the damage roll's dialog box.

Sorcerer.name: 術士
Sorcerer.description:
魔力與生俱來的耀眼巫師

術士核心特徵

關鍵屬性

魅力

生命骰

每術士等級D6

豁免熟練

體質與魅力

技能熟練

從奧秘、欺瞞、洞悉、威嚇、遊說、宗教中選擇兩項

武器熟練

簡易武器

護甲訓練

無

起始裝備

選擇A或B： (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepSpear00000]、2 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepDagger0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagArcaneFocus] (@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbafcCrystal000])、 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagDungeoneers]、[[/award 28GP]]；(B) [[/award 50GP]]

術士的魔法力量與生俱來，這種魔力已經融進了他們的血脈裡。有些術士已經說不清他們力量起源究竟是什麼，而另一些術士認為自己的力量來自於他或是家族的某些奇遇。出生時受到龍或樹靈的祝福，又或者萬里無雲降閃電，這些事情都有可能激起術法天賦的火苗。除此之外，神明的恩賜、暴露在另一個位面的怪誕魔法下，又或是一窺現實世界的內裡，都有可能賜予術士力量。不論這股力量起源如何，所造成的結果已然成為術士身上不可磨滅的印記，那便是這世代傳承的湧動魔力。

術士無需學習魔法，這原始而沸騰的魔力本就是他們的一部分。但他們仍需要精進駕馭引導天生魔力的技巧，以此來尋獲更高效，更強力的方式去釋放他們的力量。隨著術士得以掌控與生俱來的魔力，他們與自己的術法起源也越來越協調，最終展現出與之來源相呼應的獨特力量。

術士十分罕見。有些家族每一代只會出現一個術士，不多也不少。不過多數時候，術法天賦的出現純屬偶然。擁有這股魔法的人將很快發現，力量不喜歡沉默。它渴望被運用。

成為一位術士 …

作為首級角色

  • 獲得術士核心特徵表中所有特徵。
  • 獲得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSorcerer00000.JournalEntryPage.fsqRUA4acVXH4I3O#class-features]{術士特性表}中列出的 1 級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得術士核心特徵表中的生命骰。
  • 獲得術士特性表中列出的 1 級特性。參見@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbCreatingAChar.JournalEntryPage.vcs4jfEKRxPCsgXm]{兼職規則}以決定你所能使用的法術槽。

Metamagic.title: 超魔法
Metamagic.hint: 因為你的魔力由體內流動，因此你可以扭曲所施放的法術使其符合你的需求。你獲得兩項超魔法選項。

Sorcerous Restoration.name: 術法復原
Sorcerous Restoration.description:
當你完成短休時，你可以重獲數量等同於不超過你術士等級一半的已消耗術法點（向下取整）。一旦你使用此特性後，直到你完成一次長休前無法再次使用。

Foundry Note

This feature includes 1 free user per Long Rest. Use it to automatically regain the correct number of Sorcery Points.

Sorcery Incarnate.name: 術法化身
Sorcery Incarnate.description:
If you have no uses of Innate Sorcery left, you can use it if you spend 2術法點 when you take the Bonus Action to activate it.

In addition, while your Innate Sorcery feature is active, you can use up to two of your Metamagic options on each spell you cast.

Foundry Note

Use this feature to consume 2術法點 and restore a use of Innate Sorcery.

Soul Blades.name: Soul Blades
Soul Blades.description:
You can now use the following powers with your Psychic Blades.

Homing Strikes. If you make an attack roll with your Psychic Blade and miss the target, you can roll one Psionic Energy Die and add the number rolled to the attack roll. If this causes the attack to hit, the die is expended.

Psychic Teleportation. As a Bonus Action, you manifest a Psychic Blade, expend one Psionic Energy Die and roll it, and throw the blade at an unoccupied space you can see up to a number of feet away equal to 10 times the number rolled. You then teleport to that space, and the blade vanishes.

Foundry Note

The Homing Strikes activity will expend a die and provides a roll. If the check still fails you can refund the die.

The Psychic Teleportation activity expends a die and provides a roll. You can then place a template within the rolled range to indicate where you would like to teleport to (though you are not automatically teleported).

Homing Strikes.name: Homing Strikes
Homing Strikes.condition: Miss an Attack Roll with your Psychic Blades

Soul of Vengeance.name: Soul of Vengeance
Soul of Vengeance.description: Immediately after a creature under the effect of your Vow of Enmity hits or misses with an attack roll, you can take a Reaction to make a melee attack against that creature if it’s within range.

Soulknife.name: 魂刃
Soulknife.description:
馭靈能之刃擊潰敵群

魂刃利用心靈的力量發動攻擊和滲透，能同時擊穿他們於物理與心靈兩個層面的障壁。這些遊蕩者發現了自身擁有的靈能力量，並將之融合於自己的老本行上善加利用。作為魂刃，靈能可能從你的孩童時代起就一直困擾著你，但直到面臨冒險的壓力時這些潛能才完全顯露。又或者，你可能找到了一個隱居的靈能修士團，花了多年時間學習如何顯現你的力量。

Psionic Power.title: 靈能力量
Psionic Power.hint: 你蘊藏著一股靈能力量。這股能量表現為靈能骰，其為你從此職業所擁有的各種心靈異能提供能量。

Psychic Blade.title: 心靈之刃
Psychic Blade.hint: 你獲得一把心靈之刃，可用於你的心靈之刃特性。

Spell Breaker.name: Spell Breaker
Spell Breaker.description:
You always have the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCounterspe]{Counterspell} and @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDispelMagi]{Dispel Magic} spells prepared. In addition, you can cast Dispel Magic as a Bonus Action, and you can add your Proficiency Bonus to its ability check.

When you cast either spell with a spell slot, that slot isn’t expended if the spell fails to stop a spell.

Foundry Note

The spells are granted to you automatically as you level up.

Spell Mastery.name: Spell Mastery
Spell Mastery.description:
You have achieved such mastery over certain spells that you can cast them at will. Choose a level 1 and a level 2 spell in your spellbook that have a casting time of an action. You always have those spells prepared, and you can cast them at their lowest level without expending a spell slot. To cast either spell at a higher level, you must expend a spell slot.

Whenever you finish a Long Rest, you can study your spellbook and replace one of those spells with an eligible spell of the same level from the book.

Foundry Note

The Master activity includes an enchantment that marks the spells as "Always Prepared" and adds ", Mastered" to their name for easy identification.

Uncheck the "Consumption" box when casting at the lowest level. You can drag multiple spells to the same chat card.

Spell Resistance.name: Spell Resistance
Spell Resistance.description:
You have Advantage on saving throws against spells, and you have Resistance to the damage of spells.

Foundry Note

This feature does not automate the Advantage or Resistance.

With your token selected you can either right click on the damage roll's chat card and select  Apply Half Damage or click the "1/2" button and then the  Apply button.

Spell Thief.name: Spell Thief
Spell Thief.description:
You gain the ability to magically steal the knowledge of how to cast a spell from another spellcaster.

Immediately after a creature casts a spell that targets you or includes you in its area of effect, you can take a Reaction to force the creature to make an Intelligence saving throw. The DC equals your spell save DC. On a failed save, you negate the spell’s effect against you, and you steal the knowledge of the spell if it is at least level 1 and of a level you can cast (it doesn’t need to be a Wizard spell). For the next 8 hours, you have the spell prepared. The creature can’t cast it until the 8 hours have passed.

Once you steal a spell with this feature, you can’t use this feature again until you finish a Long Rest.

Spell Thief.condition: Immediately after a creature casts a spell that targets you or includes you in its area of effect
Spell Thief.name: Spell Thief

Stolen Spell.name: Stolen Spell
Stolen Spell.description: This creature has had a spell stolen from it and cannot cast it for 8 hours.

Spellcasting.name: 施法
Spellcasting.description:
你透過鑽研詩人技藝而學會了施法。有關施法的規則請參見@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.mh3akteBDiLegqFK]{chapter 7} 。以下資訊詳細說明了如何將這些規則與吟遊詩人法術結合使用。吟遊詩人法術即該職業描述後的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.wwia6Wwo4BgE9GSI]{吟遊詩人法術列表}中羅列的法術。

【戲法】你知曉兩個從吟遊詩人法術列表中你所選擇的戲法。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDancingLig]和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplViciousMoc] 。

每當你獲得吟遊詩人等級時，你可以將一個戲法替換為另一個吟遊詩人法術列表中你所選擇的戲法。

當你達到吟遊詩人 4 級和 10 級時，你可以從吟遊詩人法術列表中學習一個新的戲法，正如@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbBard000000000.JournalEntryPage.V8pqIWlaL9GhY61t#class-features]{吟遊詩人特性}表中戲法一欄所示。

【法術位】吟遊詩人特性表記錄了你有多少法術位用以施放 1+環階的法術。當你完成長休時，你會重獲所有消耗的法術位。

【準備1環以上的法術】通過該特性施法前，你需要選擇數個可用的1環以上的法術構成準備列表。首先，從吟遊詩人法術列表中選擇四個 1 環法術。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCharmPerso]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplColorSpray]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDissonantW]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHealingWor]。

準備列表上的法術數量將隨著你的吟遊詩人等級而增加，正如吟遊詩人特性表中準備法術一欄所示。每當該數量增加時，從吟遊詩人法術列表中選擇額外的法術來新增到你的準備列表中，直到你準備列表上的法術數量與吟遊詩人特性表中的數量相匹配。你只能準備已經獲得相應環階法術位的法術。例如，作為 3 級吟遊詩人，你的準備法術列表應該包括六個任意組合的1環或2環法術。

若另一個吟遊詩人特性給予你額外的準備法術，這些法術不會計入你在該特性中的準備法術數量，但是這些法術對你而言仍算作吟遊詩人法術。

【更改準備法術】每當你獲得一個吟遊詩人等級時， 你可以將準備列表中的一個法術，替換為另一個你擁有法術位的吟遊詩人法術。

【施法屬性】魅力是你施放吟遊詩人法術的施法屬性。

【師法法器】你可以使用樂器作為吟遊詩人法術的施法法器。

Stalker's Flurry.name: Stalker's Flurry
Stalker's Flurry.description:
The Psychic damage of your Dreadful Strike becomes 2d8. In addition, when you use the Dreadful Strike effect of your Dread Ambusher feature, you can cause one of the following additional effects.

Sudden Strike. You can make another attack with the same weapon against a different creature that is within 5 feet of the original target and that is within the weapon’s range.

Mass Fear. The target and each creature within 10 feet of it must make a Wisdom saving throw against your spell save DC. On a failed save, a creature has the &Reference[Frightened] condition until the start of your next turn.

Foundry Note

The damage of your Dreadful Strike activity will automatically scale as you level up.

To use the Sudden Strike effect simply make another attack.

The Mass Fear activity on this feature includes the save.

Mass Fear.name: Mass Fear
Mass Fear.condition: When you use the Dreadful Strike effect

Star Map.name: Star Map
Star Map.description:
You've created a star chart as part of your heavenly studies. It is a Tiny object, and you can use it as a Spellcasting Focus for your Druid spells. You determine its form by rolling on the Star Map table or by choosing one.

While holding the map, you have the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGuidance00]{Guidance} and @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGuidingBol]{光導箭} spells prepared, and you can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGuidingBol]{光導箭} without expending a spell slot. You can cast it in that way a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once), and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

If you lose the map, you can perform a 1-hour ceremony to magically create a replacement. This ceremony can be performed during a Short or Long Rest, and it destroys the previous map.

@Embed[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.tables.RollTable.phbStarMapForms0 rollable]

Foundry Note

The spells are granted to you automatically and 光導箭 includes the limited uses. They are not automatically removed if you do not have a Star Map however.

Starry Form.name: Starry Form
Starry Form.description:
As a Bonus Action, you can expend a use of your Wild Shape feature to take on a starry form rather than shape-shifting.

While in your starry form, you retain your game statistics, but your body becomes luminous, your joints glimmer like stars, and glowing lines connect them as on a star chart. This form sheds Bright Light in a 10-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 10 feet. The form lasts for 10 minutes. It ends early if you dismiss it (no action required), have the Incapacitated condition, or use this feature again.

Whenever you assume your starry form, choose which of the following constellations glimmers on your body; your choice gives you certain benefits while in the form.

Archer. A constellation of an archer appears on you. When you activate this form and as a Bonus Action on your subsequent turns while it lasts, you can make a ranged spell attack, hurling a luminous arrow that targets one creature within 60 feet of yourself. On a hit, the attack deals Radiant damage equal to 1d8 plus your Wisdom modifier.

Chalice. A constellation of a life-giving goblet appears on you. Whenever you cast a spell using a spell slot that restores Hit Points to a creature, you or another creature within 30 feet of you can regain Hit Points equal to 1d8 plus your Wisdom modifier.

Dragon. A constellation of a wise dragon appears on you. When you make an Intelligence or a Wisdom check or a Constitution saving throw to maintain Concentration, you can treat a roll of 9 or lower on the d20 as a 10.

Foundry Note

The Consume Wild Shape activity will consume your use of Wild Shape and provide an Active Effect for tracking your Starry Form. It also includes activities for the Archer, Chalice, and Dragon form. The Dragon form also includes an Active Effect though it does not automate the minimum rolls.

This feature does not automate the light changes.

Chalice.name: Chalice
Chalice.condition: Whenever you cast a spell using a spell slot that restores Hit Points

Dragon Form.name: Dragon Form
Dragon Form.description: A constellation of a wise dragon appears on you. When you make an Intelligence or a Wisdom check or a Constitution saving throw to maintain Concentration, you can treat a roll of 9 or lower on the d20 as a 10.

Steady Aim.name: 守穩就準
Steady Aim.description: 作為附贈動作，你在當前回合為你的下次攻擊檢定提供優勢。你只有在此回合尚未移動過時才能使用此特性，並且你的速度將在你使用後變為0直到當前回合結束。

Steps of the Fey.name: 妖精步伐
Steps of the Fey.description:
你的宗主賜予你在各個位面邊界之間移動的能力。你可以不消耗任何法術位施放等同於你魅力調整值（至少一次）次數的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMistyStep0]{迷蹤步}，並且在你完成一次長休時恢復所有已消耗的使用次數。

此外，每當你施放該法術時，你可以選擇下列額外效果之一：

【振奮步伐】緊接在你傳送後，你或10呎內你所能看見的生物獲得1d10的臨時生命值。

【嘲弄步伐】位於你傳送前5呎空間內的生物都必須通過一次你法術豁免DC的感知豁免，否則在你下個回合開始前，該生物對你之外的目標進行攻擊檢定時都具有劣勢。

Foundry Note

The Refreshing Step activity includes the Temporary Hit Points.

The Taunting Step activity includes the save and an Active Effect for tracking but it does not automate the effect.

You are granted the spell with free uses as you level up.

Taunted.name: Taunted
Taunted.description: This creature has Disadvantage on attack rolls against creatures other than you until the start of your next turn.

Stormborn.name: 風暴降生
Stormborn.description:
Your Wrath of the Sea confers two more benefits while active, as detailed below.

Flight. You gain a Fly Speed equal to your Speed.

Resistance. You have Resistance to Cold, Lightning, and Thunder damage.

Foundry Note

You can use this feature in place of Wrath of the Sea. It includes an Active Effect which will automate the addition of the Resistances. It does not add the Fly Speed though.

Stride of the Elements.name: Stride of the Elements
Stride of the Elements.description:
While your Elemental Attunement is active, you also have a Fly Speed and a Swim Speed equal to your Speed.

Foundry Note

This feature does not automatically grant the Fly and Swim Speed.

Stroke of Luck.name: Stroke of Luck
Stroke of Luck.description:
You have a marvelous knack for succeeding when you need to. If you fail a D20 Test, you can turn the roll into a 20.

Once you use this feature, you can’t use it again until you finish a Short or Long Rest.

Stroke of Luck.name: Stroke of Luck
Stroke of Luck.condition: When you fail a D20 Test

Student of War.name: Student of War
Student of War.description:
You gain proficiency with one type of Artisan's Tools of your choice, and you gain proficiency in one skill of your choice from the skills available to Fighters at level 1.

Foundry Note

You will be prompted for these choices while leveling up.

Studied Attacks.name: Studied Attacks
Studied Attacks.description:
You study your opponents and learn from each attack you make. If you make an attack roll against a creature and miss, you have Advantage on your next attack roll against that creature before the end of your next turn.

Foundry Note

This feature does not automate the Advantage on your next attack roll.

Stunning Strike.name: 震懾拳
Stunning Strike.description:
Once per turn when you hit a creature with a Monk weapon or an Unarmed Strike, you can expend 1 Focus Point to attempt a stunning strike. The target must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the target has the Stunned condition until the start of your next turn. On a successful save, the target's Speed is halved until the start of your next turn, and the next attack roll made against the target before then has Advantage.

Foundry Note

This feature includes the Saving Throw and a Stunned Active Effect which applies the Stunned status if they fail and a Slowed Active Effect for tracking that their Speed is halved and that the next attack roll made against them has Advantage if they succeed.

save.condition: Once per turn when you hit a creature with a Monk weapon or an Unarmed Strike

Subtle Spell.name: 精妙法術
Subtle Spell.description:
消耗：1術法點

當你施放法術時，你可以消耗 1 術法點忽略施放該法術所需的任何言語、姿勢或材料構材，除了法術中需被消耗或註明價值的材料構材

Superior Critical.name: Superior Critical
Superior Critical.description:
Your attack rolls with weapons and Unarmed Strikes can now score a Critical Hit on a roll of 18–20 on the d20.

Foundry Note

This feature automatically increases the Critical Hit threshold to 18.

Superior Defense.name: Superior Defense
Superior Defense.description:
At the start of your turn, you can expend 3 Focus Points to bolster yourself against harm for 1 minute or until you have the Incapacitated condition. During that time, you have Resistance to all damage except Force damage.

Foundry Note

This feature will expend 3 Focus Points and includes an Active Effect which will apply the relevant Resistances.

utility.condition: At the start of your turn

Superior Hunter's Defense.name: Superior Hunter's Defense
Superior Hunter's Defense.description:
When you take damage, you can take a Reaction to give yourself Resistance to that damage and any other damage of the same type until the end of the current turn.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect for resisting each type of damage which can be applied to get the relevant resistance. Be sure you disable/delete the previous Active Effect in the "Effects" tab of your sheet when you change Resistances.

Superior Hunter's Prey.name: 高等狩者獵物
Superior Hunter's Prey.description:
Once per turn when you deal damage to a creature marked by your Hunter’s Mark, you can also deal that spell’s extra damage to a different creature that you can see within 30 feet of the first creature.

Foundry Note

You can apply the damage from Hunter's Mark or use the Damage activity on this feature.

Superior Inspiration.name: Superior Inspiration
Superior Inspiration.description: 當你擲先攻骰時，若你擁有的吟遊激勵少於2次，則你重獲已消耗的使用次數直到2次為止。

Supreme Healing.name: Supreme Healing
Supreme Healing.description:
When you would normally roll one or more dice to restore Hit Points to a creature with a spell or Channel Divinity, don't roll those dice for the healing; instead use the highest number possible for each die. For example, instead of restoring 2d6 Hit Points to a creature with a spell, you restore 12.
