Foundry Note

This feature does not automate the maximizing of all of your rolls.

Supreme Sneak.name: Supreme Sneak
Supreme Sneak.description:
You gain the following Cunning Strike option.

Stealth Attack (消耗：1d6). If you have the &Reference[Hide] action’s Invisible condition, this attack doesn’t end that condition on you if you end the turn behind &Reference[Three-Quarters Cover] or &Reference[Total Cover].

Survivor.name: Survivor
Survivor.description:
You attain the pinnacle of resilience in battle, giving you these benefits.

Defy Death. You have Advantage on Death Saving Throws. Moreover, when you roll 18–20 on a Death Saving Throw, you gain the benefit of rolling a 20 on it.

Heroic Rally. At the start of each of your turns, you regain Hit Points equal to 5 plus your Constitution modifier if you are Bloodied and have at least 1 Hit Point.

Foundry Note

This feature does not automate the Death Saving Throw changes. It includes an activity for healing but does not automatically add it when you are Bloodied.

heal.condition: At the start of each of your turns

Sweeping Attack.name: Sweeping Attack
Sweeping Attack.description:
When you hit a creature with a melee attack roll using a weapon or an Unarmed Strike, you can expend one Superiority Die to attempt to damage another creature. Choose another creature within 5 feet of the original target and within your reach. If the original attack roll would hit the second creature, it takes damage equal to the number you roll on your Superiority Die. The damage is of the same type dealt by the original attack.

Foundry Note

The Damage activity allows you to select the type of damage it should deal in the roll dialog and consumes a use of your Superiority Die.

Tactical Assessment.name: Tactical Assessment
Tactical Assessment.description: When you make an Intelligence (History or Investigation) check or a Wisdom (Insight) check, you can expend one Superiority Die and add that die to the ability check.

utility.condition: When you make an Intelligence (History or Investigation) check or a Wisdom (Insight) check

Tactical Master.name: Tactical Master
Tactical Master.description: 當你以一把可以使用精通屬性的武器進行攻擊時，你可以將該次攻擊的精通屬性替換為推離、削弱或緩速屬性。

Tactical Mind.name: 戰術思維
Tactical Mind.description: 無論在戰場內外，你都具有卓越的戰術思維。當你屬性檢定失敗時，你可以消耗一次回氣使用次數讓自己更接近成功。你擲1d10並將結果加入屬性檢定中而非恢復生命值，此舉可能使結果變為成功。若檢定依舊失敗，則回氣使用次數將不會被消耗。

Tactical Shift.name: Tactical Shift
Tactical Shift.description: 每當你以附贈動作啟用回氣時，你可以移動最多等同於你速度一半的距離，且不觸發藉機攻擊。

Tamed Surge.name: Tamed Surge
Tamed Surge.description:
Immediately after you cast a Sorcerer spell with a spell slot, you can create an effect of your choice from the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.tables.RollTable.phbWildMagicSurg]{Wild Magic Surge} table instead of rolling on that table. You can choose any effect in the table except for the final row, and if the chosen effect involves a roll, you must make it.

Once you use this feature, you can’t do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

Tandem Footwork.name: Tandem Footwork
Tandem Footwork.description:
When you roll Initiative, you can expend one use of your Bardic Inspiration if you don't have the &Reference[Incapacitated] condition. When you do so, roll your Bardic Inspiration die; you and each ally within 30 feet of you who can see or hear you gains a bonus to Initiative equal to the number rolled.

Foundry Note

Using this feature will consume a usage of your Bardic Inspiration.

Initiative Bonus.condition: When rolling initiative and not Incapacitated.
Initiative Bonus.name: Initiative Bonus

Telekinetic Adept.name: Telekinetic Adept
Telekinetic Adept.description:
You have mastered new ways to use your telekinetic abilities, detailed below.

Psi-Powered Leap. As a Bonus Action, you gain a Fly Speed equal to twice your Speed until the end of the current turn. Once you take this Bonus Action, you can't do so again until you finish a Short or Long Rest unless you expend a Psionic Energy Die (no action required) to restore your use of it.

Telekinetic Thrust. When you deal damage to a target with your Psionic Strike, you can force the target to make a Strength saving throw (DC 8 plus your Intelligence modifier and Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, you can give the target the Prone condition or transport it up to 10 feet horizontally.

Foundry Note

The Psi-Powered Leap activity includes a free use and you can use the Psi-Powered Leap Using Psionic Energy activity to use it again with a Psionic Energy Die. It does not automate the addition of the Fly Speed.

The Telekinetic Thrust activity includes an Active Effect which will can apply the Prone condition.

Telekinetic Thrust.name: Telekinetic Thrust
Telekinetic Thrust.condition: When you deal damage to a target with your Psionic Strike

Telekinetic Master.name: Telekinetic Master
Telekinetic Master.description:
You always have the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplTelekinesi]{心靈遙控} spell prepared. With this feature, you can cast it without a spell slot or components, and your spellcasting ability for it is Intelligence. On each of your turns while you maintain Concentration on it, including the turn when you cast it, you can make one attack with a weapon as a Bonus Action.

Once you cast the spell with this feature, you can't do so in this way again until you finish a Long Rest unless you expend a Psionic Energy Die (no action required) to restore your use of it.

Foundry Note

You are automatically granted the Telekinesis spell as you level up. It includes a free use and configures it to use Intelligence as your spellcasting modifier. You can manually consume a use of your Psionic Energy Die and give yourself another use of the spell.

Telepathic Speech.name: 傳心談話
Telepathic Speech.description:
你能夠在自己與他人的意識中構建一道心靈感應的連結。作為一個附贈動作，你可以選擇30尺內一個你可見的生物，只要你與你所選擇的生物在等同於你魅力調整值（最少1里，當前[[lookup @abilities.cha.mod]]里）的里數內，你們就可以通過心靈感應的方式進行交流。為了理解彼此，你們都必須在心靈交流中使用對方知曉的語言。

心靈感應的連結將持續等同於你術士等級的分鐘。當你使用此能力與其他生物構建連結時，其將提前結束。

The Third Eye.name: The Third Eye
The Third Eye.description:
You can increase your powers of perception. As a Bonus Action, choose one of the following benefits, which lasts until you start a Short or Long Rest. You can’t use this feature again until you finish a Short or Long Rest.

Darkvision. You gain Darkvision with a range of 120 feet.

Greater Comprehension. You can read any language.

See Invisibility. You can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSeeInvisib]{See Invisibility} without expending a spell slot.

Foundry Note

The Darkvision activity includes an Active Effect which grants you Darkvision.

The Greater Comprehension activity includes an Active Effect for tracking.

The See Invisibility activity includes a limited use and an Active Effect for tracking.

Third Eye: Darkvision.name: Third Eye: Darkvision
Third Eye: Darkvision.description: The Third Eye feature grants you Darkvision with a range of 120 feet.

Third Eye: Greater Comprehension.name: Third Eye: Greater Comprehension
Third Eye: Greater Comprehension.description: The Third Eye feature grants you the ability to read any language.

Thief.name: 竊賊
Thief.description:
Hunt for Treasure as a Classic Adventurer

A mix of burglar, treasure hunter, and explorer, you are the epitome of an adventurer. In addition to improving your agility and stealth, you gain abilities useful for delving into ruins and getting maximum benefit from the magic items you find there.

Thief's Reflexes.name: 竊賊反射
Thief's Reflexes.description: You are adept at laying ambushes and quickly escaping danger. You can take two turns during the first round of any combat. You take your first turn at your normal Initiative and your second turn at your Initiative minus 10.

Thieves' Cant.name: 盜賊黑話
Thieves' Cant.description:
你在街頭巷尾中學會了多種語言，並在此掌握了盜賊間的黑話。你學會了盜賊黑話和另一門從@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbCreatingAChar.JournalEntryPage.t1WP9VEevo4TOTXw#choose-languages]{第二章}語言表中自選的語言。

Foundry Note

Thieves' Cant will be added to your sheet automatically and you will be prompted to choose the additional language.

Thirsting Blade.name: Thirsting Blade
Thirsting Blade.description:
先決條件：Level 5+ Warlock, @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.classes.Item.phbinvPactBlade0]{Pact of the Blade} Invocation.

You gain the Extra Attack feature for your pact weapon only. With that feature, you can attack twice with the weapon instead of once when you take the Attack action on your turn.

Thought Shield.name: Thought Shield
Thought Shield.description: Your thoughts can’t be read by telepathy or other means unless you allow it. You also have Resistance to Psychic damage, and whenever a creature deals Psychic damage to you, that creature takes the same amount of damage that you take.

Your thoughts can’t be read by telepathy or other means unless you allow it. You also have Resistance to Psychic damage, and whenever a creature deals Psychic damage to you, that creature takes the same amount of damage that you take.
Thought Shield.name: Thought Shield

Three Extra Attacks.name: Three Extra Attacks
Three Extra Attacks.description: You can attack four times instead of once whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

Tides of Chaos.name: 混亂之潮
Tides of Chaos.description:
你可以操作混沌本身，讓自己在一個D20檢定具有優勢，你必須在擲出D20前決定是否使用。一旦你這麼做，你必須以法術位施放一次術士法術或完成一次長休後才能再次使用此能力。

如果你在完成長休前以法術位施放一次術士法術，則你自動在@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.tables.RollTable.phbWildMagicSurg]{狂野魔法浪湧}表上擲骰。

Tireless.name: Tireless
Tireless.description:
Primal forces now help fuel you on your journeys, granting you the following benefits.

Temporary Hit Points. As a Magic action, you can give yourself a number of Temporary Hit Points equal to 1d8 plus your Wisdom modifier (minimum of 1). You can use this action a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once), and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

Decrease Exhaustion. Whenever you finish a Short Rest, your Exhaustion level, if any, decreases by 1.

Foundry Note

The Temporary Hit Points activity can apply the Temporary Hit Points to you.

The Decrease Exhaustion activity will decrease your Exhaustion.

Decrease Exhaustion.name: Decrease Exhaustion
Decrease Exhaustion.condition: Whenever you finish a Short Rest

Trance of Order.name: Trance of Order
Trance of Order.description:
You gain the ability to align your consciousness with the endless calculations of Mechanus. As a Bonus Action, you can enter this state for 1 minute. For the duration, attack rolls against you can’t benefit from Advantage, and whenever you make a D20 Test, you can treat a roll of 9 or lower on the d20 as a 10.

Once you use this feature, you can’t use it again until you finish a Long Rest unless you spend 5 Sorcery Points (no action required) to restore your use of it.

Foundry Note

The Enter Trance (Free) activity includes a free use.

The Enter Trance (Sorcery Points) activity will expend five Sorcery Points.

The minimum roll is not automated.

Trance of Order.name: Trance of Order
Trance of Order.description: For the duration, attack rolls against you can’t benefit from Advantage, and whenever you make a D20 Test, you can treat a roll of 9 or lower on the d20 as a 10.

Transmuted Spell.name: 轉化法術
Transmuted Spell.description:
消耗：1術法點

當你施放造成以下某種類型傷害的法術時，你可以消耗 1 術法點將法術的傷害類型轉換為其中另一種傷害類型：強酸、寒冷、火焰、閃電、毒素、雷鳴。

Transmuted Spell.name: 轉化法術
Transmuted Spell.condition: 當你施放造成強酸、寒冷、火焰、閃電、毒素或雷鳴傷害的法術時

Travel Along the Tree.name: Travel Along the Tree
Travel Along the Tree.description:
When you activate your Rage and as a Bonus Action while your Rage is active, you can teleport up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space you can see.

In addition, once per Rage, you can increase the range of that teleport to 150 feet. When you do so, you can also bring up to six willing creatures who are within 10 feet of you. Each creature teleports to an unoccupied space of your choice within 10 feet of your destination space.

Trickery Domain.name: 詭術領域
Trickery Domain.description:
Make Mischief and Challenge Authority

The Trickery Domain offers magic of deception, illusion, and stealth. Clerics who wield this magic are a disruptive force in the world, puncturing pride, mocking tyrants, freeing captives, and flouting hollow traditions. They prefer subterfuge and pranks to direct confrontation.

Gods of trickery are mischief-makers and instigators who stand as a constant challenge to the accepted order among both gods and mortals. They embody the forces of change and social upheaval, and they're patrons of thieves, scoundrels, gamblers, rebels, and liberators. Religious orders that operate in secret, especially those that seek to undermine oppressive governments or hierarchies, also draw on the power of the Trickery Domain.

Trickery Domain Spells.name: 詭術領域法術
Trickery Domain Spells.description:
你與此神聖領域的連結保證你始終準備特定法術。當你達到詭術領域法術列表上指定的牧師等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

詭術領域法術
牧師等級準備法術
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCharmPerso]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDisguiseSe]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplInvisibili]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplPasswithou]
5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHypnoticPa]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplNondetecti]
7@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplConfusion0]{困惑術}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDimensionD]
9@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDominatePe]{支配人類}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplModifyMemo]{修改記憶}

Foundry Note

These spells are granted automatically as you advance.

Trickster's Transposition.name: Trickster's Transposition
Trickster's Transposition.description:
Whenever you take the Bonus Action to create or move the illusion of your Invoke Duplicity, you can teleport, swapping places with the illusion.

Foundry Note

This feature includes a Transpose activity for tracking the use of your Bonus Action but you will have to manually swap your Token and the Duplicate's position.

Trip Attack.name: Trip Attack
Trip Attack.description:
When you hit a creature with an attack roll using a weapon or an Unarmed Strike, you can expend one Superiority Die and add the die to the attack's damage roll. If the target is Large or smaller, it must succeed on a Strength saving throw or have the &Reference[Prone] condition.

Foundry Note

This feature includes a Strength Save activity and a Dexterity Save activity which will consume a use of your Superiority Die. They include an Active Effect which can apply the Prone condition.

The Damage activity allows you to select the type of damage it should deal in the roll dialog.

save.condition: When you hit a creature with an attack roll

Twinkling Constellations.name: Twinkling Constellations
Twinkling Constellations.description:
The constellations of your Starry Form improve. The 1d8 of the Archer and the Chalice becomes 2d8, and while the Dragon is active, you have a Fly Speed of 20 feet and can hover.

Moreover, at the start of each of your turns while in your Starry Form, you can change which constellation glimmers on your body.

Foundry Note

The dice increase is handled automatically. This feature does not automatically add the Fly Speed.

Twinned Spell.name: 孿生法術
Twinned Spell.description:
消耗：1術法點

當你施放可以透過升環以指定額外生物作為目標的法術（例如魅惑人類）時，你可以消耗1術法點將該法術的生效環階提升1環。

Twinned Spell.name: 孿生法術
Twinned Spell.condition: 當你施放可以透過升環施法以指定額外生物作為目標的法術時

Two Extra Attacks.name: Two Extra Attacks
Two Extra Attacks.description: You can attack three times instead of once whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

Umbral Sight.name: 陰影視野
Umbral Sight.description:
你獲得60呎黑暗視覺。若你在獲得此特性時已經擁有黑暗視覺，則視覺範圍額外增加60呎。

你還擅長迴避依賴黑暗視覺的生物。完全處於黑暗中時，你對任何依賴黑暗視覺觀察你的生物視為處於&Reference[Invisible]{隱形}狀態。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which will automatically increase your Darkvision range.

Unarmored Defense.name: 無甲防禦
Unarmored Defense.description: 當你未穿戴任何護甲時，你的護甲等級（AC）等同於10 + 你的敏捷調整值 + 你的感知調整值。你使用盾牌仍可以獲得此好處。

Unarmored Movement.name: 無甲移動
Unarmored Movement.description:
未穿戴任何護甲與持握盾牌時，你的移動速度增加10呎。該加值將隨著武僧等級的提升而增加，具體數值詳見武僧特性表。

當前提升： [[lookup @scale.monk.unarmored-movement]]

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Unarmored Movement Active Effect which adds 10 feet to your Movement. It can not automatically update as you level up though. You can edit the value to match your current increase.

Unbreakable Majesty.name: Unbreakable Majesty
Unbreakable Majesty.description:
As a Bonus Action, you can assume a magically majestic presence for 1 minute or until you have the &Reference[Incapacitated] condition. For the duration, whenever any creature hits you with an attack roll for the first time on a turn, the attacker must succeed on a Charisma saving throw against your spell save DC, or the attack misses instead, as the creature recoils from your majesty.

Once you assume this majestic presence, you can't do so again until you finish a Short or Long Rest.

Foundry Note

The Majestic Presence activity includes an Active Effect for tracking your presence and a Saving Throw.

The Save activity includes a saving throw for simply sending the save to chat if you need to post it again without expending a use of this feature.

Uncanny Dodge.name: Uncanny Dodge
Uncanny Dodge.description:
When an attacker that you can see hits you with an attack roll, you can take a Reaction to halve the attack’s damage against you (round down).

Foundry Note

With your token selected you can either right click on the damage roll's chat card and select  Apply Half Damage or click the "1/2" button and then the  Apply button.

Uncanny Dodge.name: Uncanny Dodge
Uncanny Dodge.condition: When an attacker that you can see hits you with an attack roll

Uncanny Metabolism.name: 運氣入化
Uncanny Metabolism.description:
當你骰先攻時，你可以恢復所有已消耗的內力點。當你這麼做時，投擲你的武藝骰，並恢復等同於你武僧等級加上武藝骰結果的生命值。

一旦你使用此特性，直到你完成一次長休前無法再次使用。

Foundry Note

Using this feature will restore all expended Focus Points and offers a Healing roll for restoring your Hit Points. It includes a single free use per Long Rest.

Undying Sentinel.name: Undying Sentinel
Undying Sentinel.description:
When you are reduced to 0 Hit Points and not killed outright, you can drop to 1 Hit Point instead, and you regain a number of Hit Points equal to three times your Paladin level. Once you use this feature, you can’t do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

Additionally, you can’t be aged magically, and you cease visibly aging.

heal.condition: When you are reduced to 0 Hit Points

Use Magic Device.name: Use Magic Device
Use Magic Device.description:
You’ve learned how to maximize use of magic items, granting you the following benefits.

Attunement. You can attune to up to four magic items at once.

Charges. Whenever you use a magic item property that expends charges, roll [[/r 1d6]]. On a roll of 6, you use the property without expending the charges.

Scrolls. You can use any Spell Scroll, using Intelligence as your spellcasting ability for the spell. If the spell is a cantrip or a level 1 spell, you can cast it reliably. If the scroll contains a higher-level spell, you must first succeed on an [[/skill arc]] check (DC 10 plus the spell’s level). On a successful check, you cast the spell from the scroll. On a failed check, the scroll disintegrates.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect that automatically increases your attunement maximum.

When using an item property that expends charges roll the d6 and uncheck the consumption box to use it for free.

Attunement Bonus.name: Attunement Bonus
Attunement Bonus.description: The Use Magic Device feature allows you to attune to up to four magic items at once.

Versatile Trickster.name: Versatile Trickster
Versatile Trickster.description: You gain the ability to distract targets with your Mage Hand. When you use the [[/item Cunning Strike activity="Trip"]]{Trip} option of your Cunning Strike on a creature, you can also use that option on another creature within 5 feet of the spectral hand.

Visions of Distant Realms.name: Visions of Distant Realms
Visions of Distant Realms.description:
先決條件：Level 9+ Warlock

You can cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplArcaneEye0]{Arcane Eye} without expending a spell slot.

Foundry Note

This feature can be used in place of Arcane Eye and includes a Summon activity.

Vitality of the Tree.name: Vitality of the Tree
Vitality of the Tree.description:
你的狂暴會汲取世界之樹的生命力。你獲得下列好處。

【活力如潮】當你啟用狂暴時，你獲得等同於你野蠻人等級的臨時生命值。

【生命賦予】狂暴啟用期間，在你每一回合開始時，你可以選擇自身10呎內另一個生物獲得臨時生命值。擲數量等同於你狂暴傷害加值的d6，並將他們加在一起，以決定臨時生命值的數值。當你的狂暴結束，若這些臨時生命值尚有剩餘，將會消失。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an activity for Vitality Surge and Life-Giving Force which can be used to roll the Temporary HP. It does not automatically remove Life-Giving Force's Temporary Hit Points when your Rage ends.

Life-Giving Force.condition: Start of each of your turns while your Rage is active
Life-Giving Force.name: Life-Giving Force

Vow of Enmity.name: Vow of Enmity
Vow of Enmity.description:
When you take the Attack action, you can expend one use of your Channel Divinity to utter a vow of enmity against a creature you can see within 30 feet of yourself. You have Advantage on attack rolls against the creature for 1 minute or until you use this feature again.

If the creature drops to 0 Hit Points before the vow ends, you can transfer the vow to a different creature within 30 feet of yourself (no action required).

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect for tracking the creature you have vowed against but it does not automate the Advantage.

utility.condition: When you take the Attack action

War Bond.name: War Bond
War Bond.description:
You learn a ritual that creates a magical bond between yourself and one weapon. You perform the ritual over the course of 1 hour, which can be done during a Short Rest. The weapon must be within your reach throughout the ritual, at the conclusion of which you touch the weapon and forge the bond. The bond fails if another Fighter is bonded to the weapon or if the weapon is a magic item to which someone else is attuned.

Once you have bonded a weapon to yourself, you can't be disarmed of that weapon unless you have the Incapacitated condition. If it is on the same plane of existence, you can summon that weapon as a Bonus Action, causing it to teleport instantly to your hand.

You can have up to two bonded weapons, but you can summon only one at a time with a Bonus Action. If you attempt to bond with a third weapon, you must break the bond with one of the other two.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an activity for summoning your weapon that can be used if you're tracking usage of your Bonus Action.

It also includes a Bond with Weapon activity which can be used to enchant your bonded weapons. It will append ", War Bonded" to its name for easy identification.

War Domain.name: 戰爭領域
War Domain.description:
Inspire Valor and Smite Foes

War has many manifestations. It can make heroes of ordinary people. It can be desperate and horrific, with acts of cruelty and cowardice eclipsing instances of excellence and courage. Clerics who tap into the magic of the War Domain excel in battle, inspiring others to fight the good fight or offering acts of violence as prayers.

Gods of the War Domain watch over warriors and reward them for their great deeds. They include champions of honor and chivalry as well as gods of destruction and pillage. Other war gods take a more neutral stance, promoting war in all its manifestations and supporting warriors in any circumstance.

War Domain Spells.name: 戰爭領域法術
War Domain Spells.description:
你與此神聖領域的連結保證你始終準備特定法術。當你達到戰爭領域法術列表上指定的牧師等級時，你視為始終準備法術表上的法術。

戰爭領域法術
牧師等級準備法術
3@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGuidingBol]{光導箭}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMagicWeapo]{Magic Weapon}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplShieldofFa]{Shield of Faith}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSpiritualW]{Spiritual Weapon}
5@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCrusadersM]{Crusader's Mantle}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSpiritGuar]{Spirit Guardians}
7@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFireShield]{火焰護盾}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFreedomofM]{Freedom of Movement}
9@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHoldMonste]{Hold Monster}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSteelWindS]{Steel Wind Strike}

Foundry Note

These spells are granted automatically as you advance.

War God's Blessing.name: War God's Blessing
War God's Blessing.description:
You can expend a use of your Channel Divinity to cast @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplShieldofFa]{Shield of Faith} or @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSpiritualW]{Spiritual Weapon} rather than expending a spell slot. When you cast either spell in this way, the spell doesn't require Concentration. Instead the spell lasts for 1 minute, but it ends early if you cast that spell again, have the Incapacitated condition, or die.

Foundry Note

When casting the spell uncheck the "Consumption" checkbox and the "Concentration" checkbox.

War Magic.name: War Magic
War Magic.description: 當你在自己回合採取攻擊動作時，你可以施放一道師法時間為動作的法師戲法，已替代動作中的一次攻擊。

War Priest.name: War Priest
War Priest.description: 作為附贈動作，你能以武器或徒手打擊進行一次攻擊。你可以使用此附贈動作的次數等同於你的感知調整值（最少一次，當前最多[[lookup @abilities.wis.mod]]次）。當你完成一次短休或長休時，你重獲所有已消耗的使用次數。

Warding Flare.name: 守護閃光
Warding Flare.description:
當30呎內你所能看見的生物進行攻擊檢定時，你可以採取反應使強光在該生物攻擊命中或失手前閃爍，迫使其在攻擊檢定具有劣勢。

你可以使用此特性的次數等同於你的感知調整值（至少一次，當前[[lookup @abilties.wis.mod]]次）。當你完成一次長休時重獲所有已消耗的使用次數。

Foundry Note

閃光行動包含一個半徑30呎的擴散範圍，用於識別受影響的生物。其不會自動套用劣勢效果。

Flare.name: 閃光
Flare.condition: 當30呎內你所能看見的生物進行攻擊檢定時

Warlock.name: 契術師
Warlock.description:
受異界契約賦能的神秘學家

核心契術師特徵

關鍵屬性

魅力

生命骰

每契術師等級D8

豁免熟練

感知與魅力

技能熟練

從奧秘、欺瞞、歷史、威嚇、調查、自然、宗教中選擇2項

武器熟練

簡易武器

護甲訓練

輕甲

起始裝備

選擇A或B： (A) @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbarmLeatherArm]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepSickle0000]、2把@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepDagger0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagArcaneFocus]（@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbafcOrb0000000]）、 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phiPN9UzkXk3i5xh]（秘學典籍）、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagScholarsPac]、 [[/award 15GP]]；(B) [[/award 100GP]]

契術師追尋隱於多元宇宙之下的知識。在追尋魔法力量之處，他們鑽研大量的禁忌學識，進而知曉了那些吸引著異界存在的法術，或是尋覓到了足以感受異界之力的神秘地點。在此之後，契術師便與一位強大的宗主簽下彼此綁定的契約。契術師們從天使、至高妖精、惡魔、魔鬼、鬼婆，乃至遙遠國度的外星存在處汲取著遠古學識，並將這些玄奧之秘拼湊起來，進而轉為自己的力量。

契術師們將自己的宗主視為一種資源，也可以說是他們獲取魔法力量的手段。某些契術師尊重、敬畏甚至熱愛他們的宗主；而另一些則並不那麼心甘情願為自己的宗主服務；有些人會嘗試削弱他們的宗主，即使自己所操弄的力量也正來自於它們。

一旦簽下契約，契術師對知識和力量的渴求便難以僅透過學習來滿足。大部分契術師畢生都在追求更卓越的力量與更深邃的知識，而這往往通向一條冒險之路。

成為契術師…

作為首級角色

  • 獲得契術師核心特徵表中的所有特徵。
  • 獲得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbWarlock000000.JournalEntryPage.znue6EaGDDXgeQb0#class-features]{契術師特性}表中列出的 1 級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得下列契術師核心特徵表中的特徵：生命骰和輕甲訓練。
  • 獲得契術師特性表中列出的 1 級特性。請參閱第 2 章的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbCreatingAChar.JournalEntryPage.vcs4jfEKRxPCsgXm]{兼職規則}來確定可用的法術位。

bwCLOdauuzoHofil.hint: 你獲得屬性值提升專長或另一個符合條件你所選擇的專長。當契術師等級達到8、12和16時，你將再次獲得此特性。

mRSh9oUVjLU33e7p.hint: 你獲得屬性值提升專長或另一個符合條件你所選擇的專長。當契術師等級達到8、12和16時，你將再次獲得此特性。

mhZh3LfLMa15tXee.hint: 你獲得屬性值提升專長或另一個符合條件你所選擇的專長。當契術師等級達到8、12和16時，你將再次獲得此特性。

FOf5CkGnSs0OlppY.hint: 你獲得屬性值提升專長或另一個符合條件你所選擇的專長。當契術師等級達到8、12和16時，你將再次獲得此特性。

KTLPtUpPuGbXWiap.hint: You gain a Warlock subclass of your choice. A subclass is a specialization that grants you features at certain Warlock levels. For the rest of your career, you gain each of your subclass’s features that are of your Warlock level or lower.

Eldritch Invocations.title: 魔能祈喚
Eldritch Invocations.hint: 發掘禁忌的知識殘章賦予了你恆久的魔法能力。

Contact Patron.title: 聯繫宗主
Contact Patron.hint: 在過往，想聯絡你的宗主都需要一些中間手段，但今時不同往日，你可以直接與他對話了。你始終準備著法術異界探知。

Epic Boon.title: 史詩恩惠
Epic Boon.hint: 你獲得一個史詩恩惠專長或另一個符合條件你所選擇的專長。推薦選擇扭曲命運恩惠。

Warping Implosion.name: Warping Implosion
Warping Implosion.description:
You can unleash a space-warping anomaly. As a Magic action, you teleport to an unoccupied space you can see within 120 feet of yourself. Immediately after you disappear, each creature within 30 feet of the space you left must make a Strength saving throw against your spell save DC. On a failed save, a creature takes 3d10 Force damage and is pulled straight toward the space you left, ending in an unoccupied space as close to your former space as possible. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage only.

Once you use this feature, you can’t do so again until you finish a Long Rest unless you spend 5 Sorcery Points (no action required) to restore your use of it.

Warrior of Mercy.name: 命流武者
Warrior of Mercy.description:
Manipulate Forces of Life and Death

Warriors of Mercy manipulate the life force of others. These Monks are wandering physicians, but they bring a swift end to their enemies. They often wear masks, presenting themselves as faceless bringers of life and death.

Warrior of Shadow.name: 暗影武者
Warrior of Shadow.description:
Harness Shadow Power for Stealth and Subterfuge

Warriors of Shadow practice stealth and subterfuge, harnessing the power of the Shadowfell. They are at home in darkness, able to draw gloom around themselves to hide, leap from shadow to shadow, and take on a wraithlike form.

Warrior of the Elements.name: 四象武者
Warrior of the Elements.description:
Wield Strikes and Bursts of Elemental Power

Warriors of the Elements tap into the power of the Elemental Planes. Harnessing their supernatural focus, these Monks momentarily tame the energy of the Elemental Chaos to empower themselves in and out of battle.

Warrior of the Gods.name: Warrior of the Gods
Warrior of the Gods.description:
某個神聖的存在總能使你持續不斷地戰鬥。你擁有4枚d12所構成的治療池，可以消耗以治療自己。作為一個附贈動作，從治療池中消耗並擲出任意數量的骰子，恢復結果總數的生命值。

當你完成一次長休時，你的治療池重獲所有已消耗的骰子。

治療池中骰子的數量將會在你達到特定野蠻人等級時增加，分別為6級時5枚，12級時6枚，17級時7枚。

Foundry Note

The pool's increase is automatically handled in this feature. This feature also allows scaling up the number of dice you would like to expend for healing.

Warrior of the Open Hand.name: 散打武者
Warrior of the Open Hand.description:
Master Unarmed Combat Techniques

Warriors of the Open Hand are masters of unarmed combat. They learn techniques to push and trip their opponents and manipulate their own energy to protect themselves from harm.

Weapon Mastery.name: 武器精通
Weapon Mastery.description:
你對武器的訓練使你能夠使用兩種你所選擇且擁有熟練的武器精通屬性，例如長弓與短劍。

每當你完成一次長休時，你可以更換你所選擇的武器種類，例如你可以改為使用彎刀和長劍的精通屬性。

Whispers of the Grave.name: Whispers of the Grave
Whispers of the Grave.description:
先決條件：契術師等級7以上

你可以不消耗任何法術位施放@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSpeakwithD]。

Wholeness of Body.name: Wholeness of Body
Wholeness of Body.description:
You gain the ability to heal yourself. As a Bonus Action, you can roll your Martial Arts die. You regain a number of Hit Points equal to the number rolled plus your Wisdom modifier (minimum of 1 Hit Point regained).

You can use this feature a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of once), and you regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

Wild Companion.name: 荒野夥伴
Wild Companion.description:
你可以召喚一個具有動物外形的自然精魂來幫助你。作為魔法動作，你可以消耗一個法術位或荒野形態次數來施放一次無需材料構材的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFindFamili]法術。

當你以此方式施放法術，魔寵的生物類型為精類，並會在你完成長休時消失。

Foundry Note

This feature includes a Summon activity which can be used to summon your wild companion. You can choose whether to expend a use of wild shape or a spell slot when activating it.

The summon does not automatically disappear when you finish a Long Rest.

Wild Magic Sorcery.name: 狂野術法
Wild Magic Sorcery.description:
釋放混沌魔力

你的天生魔法來自於潛伏於創造秩序之下的混沌之力。你或你的先祖可能因為穿越一扇位面傳送門到混沌海或元素位面，而曾暴露於原初魔法之下。或者，你曾被一個精類生物祝福或被一名惡魔所標記。又或者，你只是僥倖獲得沒有顯著的原因。無論其來源為何，這道混亂魔力在你體內翻湧著，等待著被以任何方式釋放出來。

Wild Magic Surge.name: 狂野魔法浪湧
Wild Magic Surge.description:
你的施法可以釋放出未經馴服的魔法浪湧。一回合一次，緊接在你以法術位施放一個術士法術骰一顆d20。若你骰出20，則在狂野魔法浪湧表上擲骰，以確定將創造的魔法效果。

若狂野魔法效果為一個法術，則它太過狂野以至於它無法被超魔法影響。

@Embed[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.tables.RollTable.phbWildMagicSurg rollable caption=false classes="wild-magic-surge"]

Wild Resurgence.name: 荒野復甦
Wild Resurgence.description:
Once on each of your turns, if you have no uses of Wild Shape left, you can give yourself one use by expending a spell slot (no action required).

In addition, you can expend one use of Wild Shape (no action required) to give yourself a level 1 spell slot, but you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest.

Foundry Note

The Regain Wild Shape activity consumes a spell slot and grants you another use of Wild Shape.

The Regain Spell Slot activity will consume a use of Wild Shape and grant you a level 1 spell slot.

Regain Spell Slot.name: Regain Spell Slot
Regain Spell Slot.condition: Once on each of your turns

Wild Shape.name: 荒野形態
Wild Shape.description:
自然之力使你能夠變身為動物形態。作為附贈動作，你可以變形為此特性中已習得的野獸形態（見下文「已知形態」）。你可以保持變形的時間等同於你德魯伊等級一半的小時（當前[[lookup @classes.druid.levels]]級）或者直到你再次使用荒野形態、或是陷入無力狀態、抑或死亡時，變形提前終止。你也能以附贈動作提前恢復成原本的形態。

【使用次數】你可以使用荒野形態兩次。當你完成短休時重獲一次已消耗的使用次數，並在完成長休時重獲所有已消耗的使用次數。

當你達到特定的德魯伊等級時，你會獲得額外的荒野形態次數，如@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbDruid00000000.JournalEntryPage.UCOh3zlvGxyk5jLr#class-features]{德魯伊特性}表中的荒野形態一欄所示。

當前使用次數：[[lookup @scale.druid.wild-shape-uses]]

【已知形態】通過此特性你知曉四種野獸形態，從挑戰等級最高為1/4且不具有飛行速度的野獸中選擇。推薦選擇 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobRat0000000]{老鼠}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobRidingHors]{馱馬}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobSpider0000]{蜘蛛}、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.actors.Actor.phbmobWolf000000]{狼}。當你完成長休時，你可以用另一個符合條件的野獸替換你已知的某個形態。

Wild Shape Automation

When you've selected the creature you would like to wild shape into you can drag it onto your character sheet, select the Wild Shape option, and Foundry will automatically update your sheet. You can revert the transformation at the top of your sheet or by right clicking on your Actor in the sidebar.

當你提升到特定的德魯伊等級，你已知形態的數量與其形態的最高挑戰等級將隨之增加，如野獸形態表所示。此外，當你到達8級德魯伊後，你可以選取具有飛行速度的野獸。

當前已知形態上限： [[lookup @scale.druid.known-forms]]

當前挑戰等級上限： [[lookup @scale.druid.wild-shape]]

當你選擇已知形態時，只要你的 DM 允許，你便可以參考《怪物圖鑑》或其他來源中適合的野獸。

野獸形態
德魯伊等級已知形態最高CR飛行速度
241/4否
461/2否
881是

變形時的規則，在變形狀態下，你保留你的個性，記憶和說話的能力，並適用下列規則：

【臨時生命值】當你進入荒野形態時，你將獲得等同於你德魯伊等級的臨時生命值。

【遊戲數據】 你的遊戲數據會被所選野獸的數據替代，但你保留你的生物類型、生命值、生命骰，智力、感知、魅力屬性，職業特性、語言、專長。你同時還會保留你所有的技能和豁免熟練，並在其中使用你的熟練加值，同時額外獲得所變生物具有的熟練。若該野獸數據列出的技能或豁免調整值比你的更高，則你可以使用其數據面板。

【無法施法】變形期間你不能施放法術，然而變形並不會中斷你已施放法術的專注，也不會影響你已經施放的法術。

【物件】你持握物件的能力取決於變形後的四肢，而非你原本的。此外，你需要選擇你原本的裝備是否會掉在地上、還是融入新形態、抑或是被新形態所穿戴。穿戴的裝備可以正常使用，但DM將根據生物的體型和形狀，決定你的新形態是否適合穿戴某件裝備。你的裝備並不會改變形狀或尺寸以符合你的新形態，而任何新形態無法穿戴的裝備會掉在地上或者融入新形態。當你處於變形形態時，融入新形態的裝備不會產生任何效果。

Foundry Note

You can activate this feature to track uses of your Wild Shape.

It will automatically restore a use on a Short Rest and all uses on a Long Rest.

Witch Sight.name: Witch Sight
Witch Sight.description:
先決條件：契術師等級15以上

你擁有30呎的真實視野。

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which automatically grants you Truesight.

Wizard.name: 法師
Wizard.description:
研習奧術力量的魔法學者

核心法師特徵

關鍵屬性

智力

生命骰

每法師等級D6

豁免熟練

智力與感知

技能熟練

從奧秘、歷史、洞悉、調查、醫學、自然、宗教中選擇2項

武器熟練

簡易武器

護甲訓練

無

起始裝備

選擇A或B： (A) 2把@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepDagger0000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagArcaneFocus]（@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbwepQuartersta]）、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagRobe0000000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd5e.items.Item.LBajgahniRJbAgDr]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.equipment.Item.phbagScholarsPac]、[[/award 5GP]]；(B) [[/award 55GP]]

所謂法師，便是對魔法運作原理鑽研探索之人。噴射火焰，奧法閃電，欺詐幻象以及變換身形，這一切都可以由法師施法得來。不止如此，他們手中的魔法還可以喚來異界存在，一瞥未來明細，又或是降下護佑屏障。而最為強大的法術甚至可以點石成金，墜下隕石，打開通往異界的傳送門。

大多數法師都對魔法抱有學術研究的態度。他們研究魔法的理論基礎，尤其是魔法學派的法術分類。畢格比、塔莎、魔鄧肯和悠蘭德等知名法師在研究的基礎上發明了他們的招牌法術，如今這些法術已在多元宇宙中廣泛使用。

法師最接近普通人的生活就是擔任智者或講師。還有一些法師則會出售其服務而成為預言家，服役於軍隊，甚至用其力量實施犯罪或支配他人。

不過，知識與力量的誘惑還是足以令最不想冒險的法師走出其安全的圖書館和實驗室，前往那些廢墟和失落城市中。絕大多數法師堅信遠古時代的同行們掌握了一些現今已失傳許久的魔法奧秘。而只要找到這些秘密，就能獲得遠超現有魔法的強大力量。

成為法師…

作為首級角色

  • 獲得法師核心特徵表中的所有特徵。
  • 獲得法師特性表中列出的 1 級特性。

作為兼職角色

  • 獲得法師核心特徵表中的生命骰。
  • 獲得@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbWizard0000000.JournalEntryPage.g7cMRWzsgAsEF7zC#class-features]{法師特性表}中列出的 1 級特性。請參閱第 2 章的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbCreatingAChar.JournalEntryPage.vcs4jfEKRxPCsgXm]{兼職規則}來確定可用的法術位。

擴充和替換法術書

你在提升等級時添加到法術書中的法術正體現了你所進行的魔法研究，但你也可能在冒險中發現其他可以抄錄進法術書中的法術。例如，你可以在發現一張記載法師法術的卷軸後，將其抄錄到你的法術書中。

將法術抄入法術書，當你發現一道1環以上法師法術時，只要你能夠準備該法術，並且也有時間去解讀和複製它，你便可以將其抄入你的法術書中。這個過程將消耗每法術環階2小時和50 GP。之後你就可以如法術書中的其他法術一般準備該法術了。

複製法術書，你可以將法術書中的法術複製到另一本書中。由於你已經知道如何施放這個法術，所以這個過程會比複製新法術到你的法術書中更快。你只需花費每個法術環階1小時和 10金幣。

若你的法術書遺失，則你可以用同樣的方法將你準備的法師法術複製到新的法術書中。而填寫新法術書剩餘的內容則需要你尋找新法術完成。因此，許多法師都會保留一本備用法術書。

Scholar.title: 學者
Scholar.hint: 學習法術之餘，你也在鑽研其他的學術領域。選擇下列一項你具有熟練的技能。你獲得所選技能的專精。

Epic Boon.title: 史詩恩惠
Epic Boon.hint: 你獲得一項史詩恩惠專長或另一個符合條件你所選擇的專長。推薦選擇咒法回流恩惠。

Words of Creation.name: Words of Creation
Words of Creation.description:
You have mastered two of the Words of Creation: the words of life and death. You therefore always have the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplPowerWordH]{Power Word Heal} and @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplPowerWordK]{Power Word Kill} spells prepared. When you cast either spell, you can target a second creature with it if that creature is within 10 feet of the first target.

Foundry Note

You are automatically granted these spells as you level up.

Wrath of the Sea.name: 海洋之怒
Wrath of the Sea.description:
As a Bonus Action, you can expend a use of your Wild Shape to manifest a 5-foot Emanation that takes the form of ocean spray that surrounds you for 10 minutes. It ends early if you dismiss it (no action required), manifest it again, or have the Incapacitated condition.

When you manifest the Emanation and as a Bonus Action on your subsequent turns, you can choose another creature you can see in the Emanation. The target must succeed on a Constitution saving throw against your spell save DC or take Cold damage and, if the creature is Large or smaller, be pushed up to 15 feet away from you. To determine this damage, roll a number of d6s equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum of one die).

Foundry Note

The size of the emanation increases automatically when you gain the @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.classes.Item.phbdrdAquaticAff]{Aquatic Affinity} feature.

The Save activity consumes a use and the Bonus Action Save activity does not.

Zealous Presence.name: Zealous Presence
Zealous Presence.description:
As a Bonus Action, you unleash a battle cry infused with divine energy. Up to ten other creatures of your choice within 60 feet of you gain Advantage on attack rolls and saving throws until the start of your next turn.

Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest unless you expend a use of your Rage (no action required) to restore your use of it.

Foundry Note

This Battle Cry activity includes an Active Effect for tracking impacted creatures but does not automate the advantage on attack rolls and saving throws.

The Recharge with Rage expends a Rage and restores a use of this feature.

Zealous Presence.name: Zealous Presence
Zealous Presence.description: You gain Advantage on attack rolls and saving throws until the start of Zealots next turn.

phbbrdEpicBoon00.name: 史詩恩惠
phbbrdEpicBoon00.description: You gain an @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.GxfrwkJbrIvn7reC]{Epic Boon} feat or another feat of your choice for which you qualify. Boon of Spell Recall is recommended.

phbclcEpicBoon00.name: 史詩恩惠
phbclcEpicBoon00.description: You gain an @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.GxfrwkJbrIvn7reC]{Epic Boon feat} or another feat of your choice for which you qualify. @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.feats.Item.phbBoonofFate000]{Boon of Fate} is recommended.

phbdrdEpicBoon00.name: 史詩恩惠
phbdrdEpicBoon00.description: You gain an @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.GxfrwkJbrIvn7reC]{Epic Boon feat} or another feat of your choice for which you qualify. @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.feats.Item.phbBoonofDimensi]{Boon of Dimensional Travel} is recommended.

Psi-Bolstered Knack.name: Psi-Bolstered Knack
Psi-Bolstered Knack.condition: When you fail an ability check using a skill or tool with which you're proficient

Psychic Whispers.name: Psychic Whispers
Psychic Whispers.description: The chosen creatures can speak telepathically with you, and you can speak telepathically with them. To send or receive a message (no action required), you and the other creature must be within 1 mile of each other. A creature can end the telepathic connection at any time (no action required).

phbrgePsionicPow.name: Psionic Power
phbrgePsionicPow.description:
You harbor a wellspring of psionic energy within yourself. It is represented by your Psionic Energy Dice, which fuel certain powers you have from this subclass. The Soulknife Energy Dice table shows the number of these dice you have when you reach certain Rogue levels, and the table shows the die size.

Soulknife Energy Dice
Rogue LevelDie SizeNumber
3D64
5D86
9D88
11D108
13D1010
17D1212

Any features in this subclass that use a Psionic Energy Die use only the dice from this subclass. Some of your powers expend a Psionic Energy Die, as specified in a power’s description, and you can’t use a power if it requires you to use a die when your Psionic Energy Dice are all expended.

You regain one of your expended Psionic Energy Dice when you finish a Short Rest, and you regain all of them when you finish a Long Rest.

Psi-Bolstered Knack. If you fail an ability check using a skill or tool with which you have proficiency, you can roll one Psionic Energy Die and add the number rolled to the check, potentially turning failure into success. The die is expended only if the roll then succeeds.

Psychic Whispers. You can establish telepathic communication between yourself and others. As a Magic action, choose one or more creatures you can see, up to a number of creatures equal to your Proficiency Bonus, and then roll one Psionic Energy Die. For a number of hours equal to the number rolled, the chosen creatures can speak telepathically with you, and you can speak telepathically with them. To send or receive a message (no action required), you and the other creature must be within 1 mile of each other. A creature can end the telepathic connection at any time (no action required).

The first time you use this power after each Long Rest, you don’t expend the Psionic Energy Die. All other times you use the power, you expend the die.

Foundry Note

This feature automatically regains a use on a Short Rest and all on a Long Rest.

The Psi-Bolstered Knack activity expends a die and includes a bonus roll. If it still fails you can refund the expended die.

This feature includes a Psychic Whispers activity and a Psychic Whispers (Free) activity. They both include an Active Effect which can be used for tracking creatures you've included.

phbclcSpellcasti.name: 施法
phbclcSpellcasti.description:
你透過祈禱和冥想習得了施法。有關施法的規則請參見@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.mh3akteBDiLegqFK]{第7章}。以下資訊詳細說明了如何將這些規則與牧師法術結合使用。牧師法術即該職業描述後的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.SkHptN2PTzFGDaEj]{牧師法術列表}中羅列的法術。

【戲法】你知曉三個牧師法術列中你所選擇的戲法。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGuidance00]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSacredFlam]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplThaumaturg]。

每當你獲得牧師等級時，你可以將一個戲法替換為另一個牧師法術列表中你所選擇的戲法。

當你達到牧師4級和10級時，你可以從牧師法術列表中習得另一個戲法，如@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbCleric0000000.JournalEntryPage.acPyA6A4DQBSnuZB#class-features]{牧師特性}表中戲法一欄所示。

【法術位】牧師特性表記錄了你有多少法術位以施放1環以上的法術。當你完成長休時，你會重獲所有消耗的法術位。

【準備1環以上的法術】通過此特性施法前，你需要準備數個可用的1環以上法術所構成的準備列表。首先，從牧師法術列表中選擇4個1環法術。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplBless00000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCureWounds]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplGuidingBol]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplShieldofFa]。

你的準備列表上的法術數量將隨著牧師等級而增加，如牧師特性表中準備法術一欄所示。每當該數量增加時，選擇額外的牧師法術來添加到你的準備列表中，直到你準備列表上的法術數量與牧師特性表中的數量相匹配。所選法術的環階必須是你擁有的法術位。例如，作為3級牧師，你的準備法術列表應該包括六個任意組合的1環或2環術士法術。

若其他牧師特性給予你始終準備的法術，則這些法術不會計入你在此特性中的準備法術數量，但是這些法術對你而言仍視為牧師法術。

【更換準備法術】每當你完成長休時，你可以更換準備法術列表，將任意法術替換為其他你擁有法術位的牧師法術。

【施法屬性】感知是你施放牧師法術的施法屬性。

【施法法器】你可以使用聖徽作為牧師法術的施法法器。

phbdrdSpellcasti.name: 施法
phbdrdSpellcasti.description:
透過深入了解大自然的奇妙力量，你學會了施法。有關施法的規則請參見@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.mh3akteBDiLegqFK]{第7章}。以下資訊詳細說明了如何將這些規則與德魯伊法術結合使用。德魯伊法術即該職業描述後的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.LhvuDQEyrCdg5EfU]{德魯伊法術列表}中羅列的法術。

【戲法】你知曉兩個從德魯伊法術列表中你所選擇的戲法。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDruidcraft]和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplProduceFla]。

每當你獲得德魯伊等級時，你可以將一個戲法替換為另一個德魯伊法術列表中你所選擇的戲法。

當你達到德魯伊4級和10級時，你可以從德魯伊法術列表中習得一個新的戲法，如@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbDruid00000000.JournalEntryPage.UCOh3zlvGxyk5jLr#class-features]{德魯伊特性}表中戲法一欄所示。

【法術位】 The Druid Features table記錄了你有多少法術位以施放1環以上的法術。當你完成長休時，你會重獲所有消耗的法術位。

【準備1環以上的法術】通過此特性施法前，你需要準備數個可用的1環以上法術所構成的準備列表。首先，從德魯伊法術列表中選擇四個 1 環法術。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplAnimalFrie]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCureWounds]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFaerieFire]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplThunderwav]。

你的準備列表上的法術數量將隨著德魯伊等級而增加，如德魯伊特性表中準備法術一欄所示。每當該數量增加時，從德魯伊法術列表中選擇額外的法術來添加到你的準備列表中，直到你準備列表上的法術數量與德魯伊特性表中的數量相匹配。所選法術的環階必須是你擁有的法術位。例如，作為 3 級德魯伊，你的準備法術列表應該包括六個任意組合的1環或2環法術。

如果其他的德魯伊特性給予了額外始終準備的法術，這些法術不會計入你在此特性中的準備法術數量，但是這些法術對你而言仍視為德魯伊法術。

【更換準備法術】每當你完成長休時，你可以更改準備法術列表，將其中的任意個法術替換為其他你擁有法術位的德魯伊法術。

【施法屬性】 感知是你施放德魯伊法術的施法屬性。

【施法法器】 你可以使用德魯伊法器作為德魯伊法術的施法法器。

phbpdnSpellcasti.name: 施法
phbpdnSpellcasti.description:
你學會透過冥想與祈禱施法。參見第七章的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.mh3akteBDiLegqFK]{施法規則}。以下資訊詳細說明了如何將這些規則與聖騎士法術結合使用。聖騎士法術即該職業描述後的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.8yD9Jgp404hfZ9ie]{聖騎士法術列表}中羅列的法術。

【法術位】@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbPaladin000000.JournalEntryPage.A34CXe4HdzXHoBEl#class-features]{聖騎士特性表}記錄了你有多少法術位以施放1環以上的法術。當你完成長休時，你會重獲所有消耗的法術位。

【準備1環以上的法術】通過此特性施法前，你需要準備數個可用的1環以上法術所構成的準備列表。首先，選擇兩個 1 環聖騎士法術。推薦選擇英雄氣概和熾炎斬。

你的準備列表上的法術數量將隨著聖騎士等級而增加，如聖騎士特性表中準備法術一欄所示。每當該數量增加時，選擇額外的聖騎士法術來添加到你的準備列表中，直到你準備列表上的法術數量與聖騎士特性表中的數量相匹配。所選法術的環階必須是你擁有的法術位。例如，作為 5 級聖騎士，你的準備法術列表應該包括六個任意組合的1環或2環聖騎士法術。

若其他聖騎士特性給予你始終準備的法術，則這些法術不會計入你在此特性中的準備法術數量，但是這些法術對你而言仍視為聖騎士法術。

【更換準備法術】每當你完成長休時，你可以將準備列表中的一個法術，替換為另一個你擁有法術位的聖騎士法術。

【施法屬性】 魅力是你施放聖騎士法術的施法屬性。

【施法法器】 你可以使用聖徽作為聖騎士法術的施法法器。

phbrgeSpellcasti.name: 施法
phbrgeSpellcasti.description:
你已習得施法的技巧。見第7章的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.mh3akteBDiLegqFK]{施法規則}。以下資訊將詳細說明作為詭術師時如何運作這些規則。

【戲法】你知曉三個戲法：@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMageHand00和另外兩個從@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.6AnqLUowgdsqMFvz]{法師法術列表}中你所選擇的戲法。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMindSliver]和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMinorIllus]。

每當你獲得遊蕩者等級時，你可以將Mage Hand以外的一個戲法替換為另一個你所選擇的法師戲法。

當你達到遊蕩者10級時，你將習得一個新的法師戲法。

【法術位】@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbRogue00000000.JournalEntryPage.yiBzQeWdFjXrWxY2]{詭術師施法表}記錄了你有多少法術位用以施放1環以上的法術。當你完成長休時，你將重獲所有消耗的法術位。

【準備1環以上的法術】通過此特性施法前，你需要準備數個可用的1環以上法術所構成的準備列表。首先，選擇三個1環法師法術。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCharmPerso]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDisguiseSe]、UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFogCloud00]。

T你的準備列表上的法術數量將隨著遊蕩者等級而增加，如遊蕩者施法表中準備法術一欄所示。每當該數量增加時，選擇額外的法術來添加到你的準備列表中，直到你準備列表上的法術數量與詭術師施法表中的數量相匹配。所選法術的環階必須是你擁有的法術位。例如，作為7級遊蕩者，你的準備法術列表應該包括五個任意組合的1環或2環法師法術。

【更換準備法術】每當你獲得一個遊蕩者等級時，你可以將準備列表中的一個法術，替換為另一個你擁有法術位的法師法術。

【施法屬性】智力是你施放法師法術的施法屬性

【施法法器】你可以使用奧術法器作為法師法術的施法法器。

phbmnkUnarmoredD.name: 無甲防禦
phbmnkUnarmoredD.description:
While you aren't wearing armor or wielding a Shield, your base Armor Class equals 10 plus your Dexterity and Wisdom modifiers.

Foundry Note

This feature includes an Active Effect which updates your Armor Class.

phbrgeWeaponMast.name: 武器精通
phbrgeWeaponMast.description:
你對武器的訓練使你能夠使用兩種你所選擇且擁有熟練的武器精通屬性，例如匕首與短弓。

每當你完成一次長休時，你可以更換你所選擇的武器種類，例如你可以改為使用彎刀和短劍的精通屬性。

phbrgrWeaponMast.name: 武器精通
phbrgrWeaponMast.description:
你對武器的訓練使你能夠使用兩種你所選擇且擁有熟練的武器精通屬性，例如長弓與短弓。

每當你完成一次長休時，你可以更換你所選擇的武器種類，例如你可以改為使用彎刀和長劍的精通屬性。

phbpdnChannelDiv.name: 引導神力
phbpdnChannelDiv.description:
你可以引導來自外層位面的神聖力量，激發各種魔法效果。你首先學會創造一種效應：神聖感知，如下所述。其他聖騎士特性提供了額外的引導神力效應選項。每當你使用本職業的引導神力，你都需要從本職業的引導神力中選擇你要創造的效應。

你可以使用本職業的引導神兩次。當你完成短休時重獲一次已消耗的使用次數，並當你完成長休時重獲所有已消耗的使用次數。你在聖騎士等級到達 11 級時額外獲得一次使用次數。

若一個引導神力效應需要豁免檢定，則該DC等同於本職業施法特性的法術豁免DC。

【神聖感知】作為附贈動作，你擴展自己的意識以偵測天界、邪魔、不死生物。在接下來的10分鐘或直到你陷入無力狀態前，你能知曉自身60呎內上述類型生物的位置以及其生物類型。在同樣的範圍內，你也能偵測任何受到類似法術@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplHallow0000]祝福或褻瀆的地點或物件。

Foundry Note

The uses of your Channel Divinity increase automatically as you level up. It automatically regains the correct uses after Short and Long Rests.

The Divine Sense activity includes an Active Effect but it does not automatically reveal the given creatures.

phbftrEpicBoon00.name: 史詩恩惠
phbftrEpicBoon00.description: You gain an @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.GxfrwkJbrIvn7reC]{Epic Boon feat} or another feat of your choice for which you qualify. @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.feats.Item.phbBoonofCombatP]{Boon of Combat Prowess} is recommended.

phbmnkEpicBoon00.name: 史詩恩惠
phbmnkEpicBoon00.description:
You gain an @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.GxfrwkJbrIvn7reC]{Epic Boon feat} or another feat of your choice for which you qualify. @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.GxfrwkJbrIvn7reC#boon-of-irresistible-offense]{Boon of Irresistible Offense} is recommended.

Foundry Note

You will be prompted for a choice while leveling up.

You will be prompted for a choice while leveling up.

You will be prompted for a choice while leveling up.

You will be prompted for a choice while leveling up.

You will be prompted for a choice while leveling up.

You gain an @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.GxfrwkJbrIvn7reC]{Epic Boon feat} or another feat of your choice for which you qualify. @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.feats.Item.phbBoonofSpellRe]{Boon of Spell Recall} is recommended.

phbwzdEpicBoon00.name: 史詩恩惠

phbrgeEvasion000.name: Evasion
phbrgeEvasion000.description:
You can nimbly dodge out of the way of certain dangers. When you’re subjected to an effect that allows you to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, you instead take no damage if you succeed on the saving throw and only half damage if you fail. You can’t use this feature if you have the Incapacitated condition.

Foundry Note

With your token selected you can either right click on the damage roll's chat card and select  Apply Half Damage or click the "1/2" button and then the  Apply button.

phbrgeExpertise0.name: 專精
phbrgeExpertise0.description:
你獲得兩項你所選擇的已熟練技能的專精。推薦在擁有巧手與隱匿熟練時選擇他們。

在遊蕩者6級時，你再獲得兩項你所選擇的已熟練技能的專精。

Foundry Note

You will be prompted for your expertise choices as you level up.

phbrgrExpertise0.name: 專精
phbrgrExpertise0.description:
Choose two of your skill proficiencies with which you lack Expertise. You gain Expertise in those skills.

Foundry Note

You will be prompted with a choice when you reach this level.

phbbrdExtraAttac.name: 額外攻擊
phbbrdExtraAttac.description:
每當你在你的回合採取攻擊動作時，你可以攻擊兩次，而非一次。

此外，你可以施放一個施法時間為一個動作的戲法以替代其中一次攻擊。

phbpdnFightingSt.name: 戰鬥風格
phbpdnFightingSt.description:
你獲得你一項你所選擇的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.sbHImaCB8ZMEHYkb]{戰鬥風格專長}。你可以選擇以下選項，而非上述這些專長。

@Embed[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.feats.Item.phbfstBlessedWar caption=false]

phbrgrFightingSt.name: 戰鬥風格
phbrgrFightingSt.description:
你獲得一項你所選擇的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFeats00000000.JournalEntryPage.sbHImaCB8ZMEHYkb]{戰鬥風格專長} 。你可以選擇以下選項，而非上述這些專長。

@Embed[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.feats.Item.phbfstDruidicWar caption=false]

phbftrSpellcasti.name: 施法
phbftrSpellcasti.description:
你已習得施法的技巧。見第7章的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.mh3akteBDiLegqFK]{施法規則}。以下資訊詳細說明了如何將這些規則與魔能騎士結合使用。

【戲法】你知曉兩個從@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.6AnqLUowgdsqMFvz]{法師法術列表}中你所選擇的戲法。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplRayofFrost]和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplShockingGr]。每當你獲得戰士等級時，你可以將這些戲法中的一個替換為另一個法師法術列表中你所選擇的戲法。

當你達到戰士10級時，你可以學習一個新的法師戲法。

【法術位】魔能騎士施法表記錄了你有多少法術位以施放1環以上的法術。當你完成長休時，你會重獲所有消耗的法術位。

【準備1環以上的法術】通過此特性施法前，你需要準備數個可用的1環以上法術所構成的準備列表。首先，從法師法術列表中選擇三個 1 環法術。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplBurningHan]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplJump000000、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplShield0000]。

你的準備列表上的法術數量將隨著戰士等級而增加，如魔能騎士施法表中準備法術一欄所示。每當該數量增加時，從法師法術列表中選擇額外的法術來添加到你的準備列表中，直到你準備列表上的法術數量與奧法騎士施法表中的數量相匹配。所選法術的環階必須是你擁有的法術位。例如，作為 7 級戰士，你的準備法術列表應該包括五個任意組合的1環或2環法師法術。

【更換準備法術】每當你獲得一個戰士等級時，你可以將準備列表中的一個法術，替換為另一個你擁有法術位的法師法術。

【施法屬性】智力是你施放法師法術的施法屬性

【施法法器】你可以使用奧術法器作為法師法術的施法法器。

phbrgrSpellcasti.name: 施法
phbrgrSpellcasti.description:
你學會運用自然世界的魔法本源進行施法。參見@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.mh3akteBDiLegqFK]{施法規則}。以下資訊詳細說明了如何將這些規則與遊俠法術結合使用。遊俠法術即該職業描述後的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.5HnIk6HsrSxkvkz5]中羅列的法術。

【法術位】@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbRanger0000000.JournalEntryPage.fgzoeAJE4EEUSOYQ#class-features]{遊俠特性表}記錄了你有多少法術位以施放1環以上的法術。當你完成長休時，你會重獲所有消耗的法術位。

【準備1環以上的法術】通過此特性施法前，你需要準備數個可用的1環以上法術所構成的準備列表。首先，選擇兩個1環遊俠法術。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplCureWounds]和@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplEnsnaringS]。

你的準備列表上的法術數量將隨著遊俠等級而增加，如遊俠特性表中準備法術一欄所示。每當該數量增加時，選擇額外的遊俠法術來添加到你的準備列表中，直到你準備列表上的法術數量與遊俠特性表中的數量相匹配。所選法術的環階必須是你擁有的法術位。例如，作為 5 級遊俠，你的準備法術列表應該包括六個任意組合的 1 環或 2 環遊俠法術。

若其他遊俠特性給予你始終準備的法術，則這些法術不會計入你在此特性中的準備法術數量，但是這些法術對你而言仍視為遊俠法術。

【更換準備法術】每當你完成長休時，你可以將準備列表中的一個法術，替換為另一個你擁有法術位的遊俠法術。

【施法屬性】感知是你施放遊俠法術的施法屬性。

【施法法器】 你可以使用德魯伊法器作為遊俠法術的施法法器。

phbscrSpellcasti.name: 施法
phbscrSpellcasti.description:
借助你的天生魔力，你可以施放法術。參見 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.mh3akteBDiLegqFK]{施法規則}。以下資訊詳細說明了如何將這些規則與術士法術結合使用。術士法術即該職業描述後的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.VfZ5mH2ZuyFq82Ga]{術士法術列表}中羅列的法術。

【戲法】你知曉四個你所選擇的術士戲法。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplLight00000]、 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplPrestidigi]、 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplShockingGr]、 @UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSorcerousB]。每當你獲得術士等級時，你可以將一個從特性所獲得的戲法替換為另一個你所選擇的術士戲法。

當你達到術士4級和10級時，你習得另一個你所選擇的術士戲法，如術士特性表中戲法一欄所示。

【法術位】@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSorcerer00000.JournalEntryPage.fsqRUA4acVXH4I3O#class-features]{術士特性表}記錄了你有多少法術位以施放1環以上的法術。當你完成長休時，你會重獲所有消耗的法術位。

【準備1環以上的法術】通過此特性施法前，你需要準備數個可用的1環以上法術所構成的準備列表。首先，選擇兩個1環術士法術。推薦選擇 燃燒之手與偵測魔法。

你的準備列表上的法術數量將隨著術士等級而增加，如術士特性表中準備法術一欄所示。每當該數量增加時，選擇額外的術士法術來添加到你的準備列表中，直到你準備列表上的法術數量與術士特性表中的數量相匹配。所選法術的環階必須是你擁有的法術位。例如，作為3級術士，你的準備法術列表應該包括六個任意組合的1環或2環術士法術。

若其他術士特性給予你始終準備的法術，則這些法術不會計入你在此特性中的準備法術數量，但是這些法術對你而言仍視為術士法術。

【更換你的準備法術】每當你獲得術士等級時，你可以將準備列表中的一個法術，替換為另一個你擁有法術位的術士法術。

【施法屬性】 魅力是你施放術士法術的施法屬性。

【施法法器】你可以使用奧術法器作為術士法術的施法法器。

phbwzdSpellcasti.description:
作為一名奧術魔法的研習者，你已習得如何施放法術。見第7章的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.mh3akteBDiLegqFK]{施法規則}。以下資訊詳細說明了如何將這些規則與法師法術結合使用。法師法術即該職業描述後的@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbSpells0000000.JournalEntryPage.6AnqLUowgdsqMFvz]{法師法術列表}中羅列的法術。

【戲法】你知曉三個你所選擇的法師戲法。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplLight00000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMageHand00]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplRayofFrost]。每當你完成長休後，你可以將一個從此特性獲得的戲法替換為另一個你所選擇的法師戲法。

當你達到法師4級和10級時，你習得一個新的法師戲法，如@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbWizard0000000.JournalEntryPage.g7cMRWzsgAsEF7zC#class-features]{法師特性表}中戲法一欄所示。

【法術書】你的法師學徒生涯因完成一本獨特的書而劃上句號—你的法術書。這本書是一個微型物件，重 3 磅，有 100 頁，只能由你或施放@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplIdentify00]的人閱讀。你可以自行決定書的外觀和材料，例如鍍金邊的小冊子或用麻繩捆綁的牛皮紙集。

這本書囊括了所有你所知曉1環以上的法術。起初，書中記錄著六個你所選擇的1環法師法術。推薦選擇@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplDetectMagi]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplFeatherFal]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMageArmor0]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplMagicMissi]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplSleep00000]、@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.spells.Item.phbsplThunderwav]。

此後，每當你獲得法師等級時，將兩個你所選擇的法師法術加入你的法術書中。你只能加入已經獲得相應環階法術位的法術，如法師特性表所示。這些法術是你定期進行奧術研究的結晶。

【法術位】法師特性表記錄了你有多少法術位以施放1環以上的法術。當你完成長休時，你會重獲所有消耗的法術位。

【準備1環以上的法術】通過此特性施法前，你需要準備數個可用的1環以上法術所構成的準備列表。從你的法術書中選擇四個法術，所選法術必須是你已經獲得相應環階法術位的法術。

你的準備列表上的法術數量將隨著法師等級而增加，如法師特性表中準備法術一欄所示。每當該數量增加時，選擇額外的法師法術來添加到你的準備列表中，直到你準備列表上的法術數量與法師特性表中的數量相匹配。所選法術的環階必須是你擁有的法術位。例如，作為 3 級法師，你的準備法術列表應該包括六個從你法術書中任意組合的1環或2環法術。

若其他的法師特性給予你額外的始終準備法術，這些法術不會計入你以此特性中的準備法術數量，但是這些法術對你而言仍視為法師法術。

【更換準備法術】每當你完成長休時，你可以更改準備法術列表，將其中的任意個法術替換為你法術書中的法術。

【施法屬性】智力是你施放法師法術的施法屬性。

【施法法器】 你可以使用奧術法器或你的法術書作為法師法術的施法法器。
phbwzdSpellcasti.name: 施法

phbbrdUnarmedStr.description: 你可以使用敏捷取代力量進行徒手打擊的攻擊檢定。當你以徒手傷害造成傷害時，你可以造成你的吟遊激勵所擲出的結果 + 你的敏捷調整值的鈍擊傷害，而非一般的徒手打擊傷害。此擲骰不會消耗吟遊激勵骰。
phbbrdUnarmedStr.name: 徒手打擊

phbftrWeaponMast.description:
你對武器的訓練使你能夠使用三種你所選擇且擁有熟練的武器精通屬性。每當你完成一次長休時，你可以進行武器練習從而更換其中一種武器的選擇。

你可以掌握精通的武器數量將隨著戰士職業到達特定等級而增加如@UUID[Compendium.dnd-players-handbook.content.JournalEntry.phbFighter000000.JournalEntryPage.wDELe3k25FQvYdrq#class-features]{戰士特性}表中武器精通一欄所示。

Foundry Note

To change your masteries toggle on the "Edit" mode of your sheet. On the "Details" tab click on the cog icon next to "Weapons" in the bottom right. You can place a check in the mastery column of your chosen weapons.
phbftrWeaponMast.name: 武器精通

phbpdnWeaponMast.name: 武器精通
phbpdnWeaponMast.description:
你對武器的訓練使你能夠使用兩種你所選擇且擁有熟練的武器精通屬性，例如長劍與標槍。

每當你完成一次長休時，你可以更換你所選擇的武器種類，例如你可以改為使用斧槍和連枷的精通屬性。
